column2: Little brat, Old Monster has a task for you.
What's the matter? Given our Relations, Old Monster, you just need to give the order.
Old Monster has a mangy dog here, locked in a dog cage. I heard it's going to be thrown to some godforsaken place in a few days.
Little brat, do you have the ability to get this mangy dog out?
Are you talking about a person or a dog...
Little brat, are you stupid? Can a mangy dog be a dog!
(Who could understand this without your explanation...)
In short, there's a person locked up in jail, and he's going to be exiled in a few days. Old Monster, do you want me to help him escape?
Little brat, you're really smart, you get it right away!
Alright, alright, little brat, go quickly. Old Monster needs to go to the toilet.
Uh... It seems I can only go to the jail and ask that friend what happened...
I'm innocent!
It wasn't me, let me out!
{yell} Shut your mouth!
How many people who come in here don't claim to be innocent?
If you have money at home, just call someone to ransom you.
If you don't have money, just wait to be exiled.
You believe that fat man's nonsense?!
You go tell the prefect, I don't care about that!
Officer, may I ask what this person has done?
Who are you? Why are you asking about him?
column3: ท่านคือใคร? ทำไมท่านถึงถามเกี่ยวกับเขา?

column2: I am... I am his distant relative, I heard he was arrested and wanted to find out what happened.
Oh, I don't know the specifics, I just heard that it was reported by Master Ding. He said he stole a White jade cup...

The prefect investigated and found both the person and the stolen goods. Here, he was thrown in here. He's going to be exiled three thousand miles away in a few days. If you want to ransom him, you'd better hurry.
{yell} I'm innocent!
{yell} Shut up!
So, if you want to ransom him, give me <color=#c44b0e>5 guan</color> as his fine, and you can take him away.
Do you want to ransom someone? A fine of <color=#c44b0e>5 guan</color> is required, not a wen less.
This is a prison, not a place for you to wander around!\nGet out of here!
Oh, someone is actually willing to pay the ransom.
I've received the fine, I'll release the prisoner now.
I'm rich!
Thank you for saving my life! I owe you a great debt, I'll repay you in the next life!
So I have to wait until the next life for you to repay me...\nYou should go back to Dirty Street, tell Old Monster that I'll be there soon.
You were claiming to be wronged just now, what exactly happened?
Master Ding lied! I didn't steal the White jade cup!
Are you saying he framed you? Why would a rich man like him frame you?
Because his daughter and I are in love! But Master Ding looks down on my background and doesn't agree to our marriage, so...
Yes, he must have taken a liking to that brat from the General's mansion,\nand wants to send me away to break his daughter's heart!
I see, I'll find a way to get you out.
It seems that Master Ding is involved in this matter,\nshould I save up the ransom or go to Master Ding's house to discuss the situation?
Master Ding, I want to talk to you about your servant stealing the White jade cup.
Ah, {PlayerSurName} young hero, you're not an outsider, I'll tell you the truth.
Indeed, I set this up. That boy is always around my daughter,\nhe's just a ruffian, he's not good enough for my daughter!
However, since {PlayerSurName} young hero is involved, I can make a concession.\nI can pay the 5 taels of ransom for you, but on the condition that the boy never sets foot in Chuxiang City again!
I trust {PlayerSurName} young hero's character, I hope we can live a peaceful life from now on...
In that case, please go back, {PlayerSurName} young hero.
This is a scandal in my family, I don't want to talk about it, please go back, young hero.
Miss Ding, could you tell me about your relationship with your servant?
My servant... Oh, you mean that man.\nHe was originally a ruffian from Dirty Street. Once when I was harassed by some thugs, he stepped in to help, so I introduced him to work in my house.
Who would have thought that he would show his true colors after coming to my house, constantly bothering me.\nI didn't want to make a scene, so I had to ask my father to do something.
I see, thank you for your honesty, Miss Ding.
Wow, you've got some nerve! You dare to...
Enough talk, you need to run away from here.\nOnce you get to Dirty Street, you should be safe.
Are you joking? Escaping from prison is a serious crime!\nThe jailer is still here, are you trying to get me sentenced to death?
Thank you for saving my life! I owe you a great debt, I'll repay you in the next life!\nI'll go first, see you at Dirty Street!
It's you! Do you have any orders?
...5 guan, is that all my love with the young lady is worth?
Sigh...
column3: เฮ้อ...

column2: Well, since you've already agreed to Master Ding's terms, I have no choice.\nPlease tell Master Ding that I'll leave Chuxiang City immediately and never come back.
So that's what happened...
Hehe, hehe... I was so naive.
Sir, please tell Miss Ding that I will run away from Chuxiang City and never return.
This life was saved by you, sir, so of course I should give you these things!
White jade cup?! Didn't you say you didn't steal it?
It's funny, I really thought I was caught because I was discovered.\nI didn't expect that Master Ding really didn't find out, this is really a fluke.
You little brat, why are you back? Did you save the mangy dog?
If you didn't save it, go quickly, what are you dawdling here for!
What? The dog is dead? How could it be...\nAlright, you little brat, go home, old monster is fine.
Yo, you really live up to your name, little brat, old monster didn't misjudge you!\nHow about we call you little monster from now on?
Uh, let's not...
What's wrong with that! You little brat really don't understand.\nIf you have any problems in the future, just come to old monster, your problems are old monster's problems!

{PlayerSurName}Young hero really keeps his word!\nI, Ding, have prepared 10 guan of coins to give to the young hero, firstly to admire the young hero's character, and secondly as a token of gratitude for solving a big problem for my Ding family.
Did that scoundrel really run away from Chuxiang City?\nThank you for your help, young hero, I have nothing to repay you with, so I'll give you this.
Madam, I have a question to ask you.
Why is my husband being so formal? Just ask whatever you want.
Did we have a servant named "Er Mazi" in our house before?
"Er Mazi"...\nIndeed, there was such a person, originally a rogue from Dirty Street, he helped someone who was being harassed by Dirty Street hooligans, so they introduced him to work at our house.
I didn't expect him to show his true colors shortly after he came to our house, harassing people over and over again.\nI didn't want to fall out with him, so I had to let my father figure out a way.
Why did you ask about that guy, husband?
Nothing, just asking.
Oh, okay...\nDon't work too hard, husband, come home early to rest~
Yes, definitely~

Did that guy run away from Chuxiang City? My husband is really amazing~\nThis is a little trinket I spotted on the street a few days ago, it matches perfectly with my husband, do you like it, husband?
Thank you for your thoughtfulness, madam.
People from the Central Plain, what are you doing here!
I am {PlayerName}, wandering around and accidentally came here. May I ask who you are?
This is the Jiuli tribe, and I am Miao Muli, the chief of the Jiuli tribe.
I heard that recently, a young man from from the Central Plain wiped out the guards at the West Border Patrol, I wonder if it's your doing?
Yes, I did it.
You've really done me a great favor. In the future, if I ever want to venture into the Central Plain, it'll save me a lot of trouble.
You're born and raised in the southwest region, why bother crossing mountains and rivers to go to the Central Plain?
This place is remote and food is scarce. Even though we've delved into cultivating parasites, we can't withstand the torment of injuries and illnesses.

Ever since I witnessed the prosperity of the Central Plain, I've been determined to lead my people out of this region. I want their descendants to also enjoy a life of luxury, away from natural disasters and diseases.
{PlayerName}, your arrival has created new opportunities for us. You will become one of the few Central Plain friends we have.
I've heard from my people that recently, a young man from the Central Plain helped them deal with the people from the Melody House. I wonder if that young man has anything to do with you?
I am indeed the young man from the Central Plain you mentioned.

Although I don't trust people from the Central Plain, you are willing to prioritize justice over kinship and become enemies with the Melody House, which is also from the Central Plain. I have to admire you.
I don't trust people from the Central Plain, including you!
I don't care if you came here by mistake or intentionally, get out of here now!
(Such a high level of vigilance...)
You! Caidie remembers you, you are the big bad guy!
I am {PlayerName}, it was a misunderstanding that day, please don't blame me, little girl.
You scared away Caidie's friends, Caidie doesn't like you!
You actually followed me here, haven't you had enough trouble?
Enemies on a narrow road...
It's you! The big brother who bullied Caidie in Lin'an City that day!
Humph, Caidie is not afraid of you here!
(Such a young age, but already has white hair)
Big brother, why are you staring at Caidie?
I am curious why you have white hair at a young age.
Hehe, it's a secret, Caidie won't tell you~
By the way, who are you? Caidie hasn't seen you before.
I am {PlayerName}, from a very far away place in the east.
East, far away, how far? Is it farther than Lin'an City?
You know about Lin'an City?
Caidie not only knows, Caidie has been there~\nBut it's a pity, I had to come back before I had enough fun.
By the way, I don't know your name yet.
column3: จริงสิ ข้ายังไม่รู้ชื่อเจ้าเลย

column2: Butterfly heard from her brother that in the Central Plains, you can't casually ask what a girl's name is. Aren't you from the Central Plains?
I'm just following the local customs. We've talked so much, it would be rude if I don't even know your name.
Caidie's name is Miao, Cai, Die~ Die means butterfly.
Got it, I won't get it wrong.
Wow, how did you grow so big!
It seems like I heard a little girl's voice, what is a little girl doing in this place?
That little girl doesn't seem to be from the Central Plain. I wonder what she's doing here?
{yell}Hey!
You...you...
Little girl, don't cry, I was just joking with you.
Boo... boo... you're a bad person... you scared away all of Caidie's friends!
Wu wu...
I seem to have really become a bad guy...
Don't run, don't run!
Boo... boo... you're a bad person... you scared away all of Caidie's friends!
Little girl, why are you here alone, what are you looking at--
Bugs?! Actually looking at bugs!
Hello little brother, are you also interested in these cute little guys?
Caidie has found a lot of special little guys here!\nLook, big brother, they are really cute.
This is Little Flower. The colorful patterns on its body are exceptionally beautiful.
Isn't this a big moth?
This is Skinny Bamboo, with a big temper and and an equally big dose of venom.\nLook, it seems like it's still mad at me for not feeding it enough just now!
This flower-patterned centipede looks like it's not easy to mess with...
This is Little Jade Flute. Look at its chubby and cute appearance, isn't it adorable?
The name of this big fleshy worm is truly elegant...
Big brother, come on, touch them.\nThis way they will remember your scent and consider you a friend.
It, it, it bit me! It hurts, it hurts so much, why does it hurt so much...
Something seems wrong with my body...
Big brother, it's Caidie's fault, Caidie forgot that people with poor constitution can't withstand its toxicity...
What should we do now?
column3: เราควรทำอย่างไรตอนนี้?

column2: The toxicity of Little Jade Flute is too strong, Caidie has no solution...
Little Jade Flute is expressing friendliness to you! \nAlthough you lost a bit of vitality, you also gained some benefits.
Okay, okay...
column3: โอเค โอเค...

column2: Oh no, my brother repeatedly warned Caidie not to chat with strangers...
How about this, you tell Caidie your name, then you won't be a stranger!
My name is {PlayerName}...
column3: ข้าชื่อ {PlayerName}

column2: My name is Miao Caidie, from the Jiuli tribe, {PlayerName} you can just call me Caidie!
Where is the Jiuli tribe?
It's in a forest in the southwest region, Caidie has traveled a long, long way.
Southwest region...
column3: ภูมิภาคตะวันตกเฉียงใต้...

column2: Running to Lin'an City from such a far place, there must be something important, right?
Well, my brother wants to cultivate a new Parasite King. I heard that this place is rich in resources, so Caidie was sent to see if there are any highly toxic insects or toxins.
Oh dear, it's getting late, Caidie needs to get busy.\nIf I can't find the right toxin, my brother will blame Caidie for being lazy.
Unfortunately, time is too short, <color=#c44b0e>three days later</color> Caidie has to rush back to the Jiuli Tribe, it's a pity, I haven't had time to have fun in the city.
You're not from the Central Plain. What brings you here?
Catching bugs, look, aren't there many beautiful bugs?
What are you catching bugs for?
Catching bugs is naturally for cultivating parasites.

As expected, it's a wicked practice, you must not be from any decent sect, you better run away from Lin'an City, don't practice parasite cultivation here, so as not to cause disaster to the people in the city!
Big brother, you're so ill tempered. If you keep this attitude to Caidie, Caidie will let the bugs bite you.
Hmph, let me see what you can do!
I didn't expect little brother from the Central Plain to be so domineering.
Caidie won't cry, Caidie won't cry!
My brother was right, people from the Central Plain are not good people!
Little Caidie, I finally found you!\nEarlier, you mentioned that you are from the Jiuli Tribe, right?
Ah, it's big brother {PlayerName}.\nCaidie is from the Jiuli tribe, what's the matter?
Hmm? Wait, big brother, squat down and let Caidie take a look...
Seven-day Gut Breaking Parasite...\nHow did you get this...
Let's not worry about how it happened... Can you help me detoxify?
Um... this poison is easy to cure, Caidie has the antidote...\nBut my brother said not to give valuable things to people casually...
How about this, if brother has something that Caidie likes, Caidie will exchange it with you. It's what you Central Plain folks call <color=#c44b0e>Trade</color>!
Besides, if big brother can find friends skilled in toxicology or medicine, that would also be a solution!
I see, thank you, Little Caidie!
Big brother, Caidie is developing a new poisonous parasite, can you help Caidie?
How can I help you?
Caidie will plant the poisonous parasite in your body to see what reactions will occur.\nThis way, Caidie can improve these poisonous parasites according to the situation.
That's terrifying, testing parasites on me?
Should I help her?
Who knows what adverse effects these poisonous parasites will have when they are planted in my body, I dare not let you try randomly.
Big brother is not willing to help either... sob...
Come on, let me experience what effects your poisonous parasites have.
Miao Caidie has planted a poisonous insect on you, after one shichen...
How could this happen! Why did all the poisonous insects planted on you die?
Oh no, Caidie forgot that you are also a poison user, the poison on your body is too strong and killed these poisonous insects.
Little brother, I'm really sorry, you don't need to help anymore, Caidie will think of another way.
No need to be so polite (finally relieved).
Little brother, you cooperated well.\nThat's it for today, don't forget to come to Butterfly for the Gu test tomorrow.
More parasite tests tomorrow?!
Of course, Caidie will have to work on this for a long time. Don't you want to help Caidie, young man?
Alright, one task doesn't befall on two people, I'll continue to help you.
Big brother, today's parasite test starts~
Miao Caidie has planted a poisonous insect on you, after one shichen...
How could this happen! Why did all the poisonous parasites plant planted on you die?
Oh no, Caidie forgot that big brother is also a poison user, the poison on your body is too strong and killed these poisonous parasites.
Big brother, I'm really sorry, you don't need to help anymore, Caidie will think of another way.
No need to be so polite (finally relieved).
Big brother, you cooperated well.\nLet's stop here for today, don't forget to come to Caidie for the parasite test tomorrow.
Got it.
Big brother, can you play the flute?
No...
Playing the xiao is also fine, they're all similar; or do you have any friends who can play the flute or xiao?
What did you ask this for?
Caidie's insect control technique originally comes from a fragmentary score in the clan, which only contains some basic methods of Musical insect control.
To further advance the insect control technique, you need to learn more powerful songs.
But Caidie doesn't have many friends, and the clan people are Untrained in Music, so...
What's the difficulty, I'll teach you!
One shichen later...
column3: หนึ่งชั่วยามต่อมา...

column2: Big brother, you're so amazing~ Caidie wishes I can be like you one day.
I, Li Leya, have a basic understanding of Music, and I'm willing to give you some guidance.
One shichen later...
column3: หนึ่งชั่วยามต่อมา...

column2: This big brother is so amazing~ Cai Die wishes I can be like him one day.
Wei can play the xiao, let Wei play a song for big sister.
One shichen later...
column3: หนึ่งชั่วยามต่อมา...

column2: This little girl is so amazing~ Caidie wishes she could be like her one day.
Well, don't worry, I'll think of another way for you.
Did big brother bring a surprise for Cai Die?
Big brother, I found that you have raised a very rare top-quality love insect on your body, you are really lucky.
Can it be the "Ding family blood worm" planted in Chuxiang City?\nShould I take this opportunity to let Miao Cai Die help me get rid of this blood parasite in my body?
Big brother, there are not many men hopelessly in love like you.
Such a passionate man like you, willing to plant a blood insect for the one you love, enduring unnecessary pain, Cai Die is really moved.
Little Cai Die, you are good at breeding and removing parasites, can you tell me how to remove this "Ding family blood worm" from my body?
This is a very rare top-quality love insect, you are really lucky, big brother.
It's too late to regret, quickly, you have to help me remove the parasite.
If you are a person with a single-minded love, you don't need to fear the toxicity of this blood insect, can it be that you, big brother...
So big brother, you are not faithful in love, so you suffer from the pain of the blood insect, right?!
Good girl, only you can help me remove the insect, I don't want to die from this blood insect when I'm in a duel to the death with others.
Alright, Cai Die will help you this time.\nSigh, I don't know which young lady is going to have her heart broken.
One shichen later...
column3: หนึ่งชั่วยามต่อมา...

column2: The blood insect has been cleared, if you get a love insect again in the future, Cai Die won't help you.
Little Cai Die, I'm curious, why do you have white hair at such a young age?

Brother Ah said that Cai Die has suffered from a strange disease since she was a child, so she had to eat all kinds of strange-tasting herbs and insects from a young age, saying that it was to control the disease from worsening.
Since then, Cai Die's body has not grown, always like a child, but in fact, Cai Die is no longer a child.
Did you get better from the disease in your body later?

Not yet, a few years ago, Cai Die began to have severe pain all over her body and unstoppable bleeding. Brother Ah said that the medicinal properties can no longer suppress the disease in Cai Die's body, which led to the reversal of inner energy and blood.

Brother Ah said that drawing blood appropriately every day can relieve the pain, so Brother Ah has to draw a lot of Cai Die's blood every day. Although bleeding is scary, Cai Die does feel less pain after bleeding.
As for the hair, since Brother Ah started to draw Cai Die's blood, it gradually becomes to what it is now, and Cai Die doesn't know why.
(Listening to Cai Die's symptoms, it seems like a method of making human elixir I saw in a medical book before, and this method comes from ancient times when witchcraft was popular in the south...)
(Is Jiuli tribe somehow related to the ancient South? Why does this Miao Muli want to transform his sister into human elixir...
Big brother, what are you thinking about?
Little Cai Die, I've seen your symptoms in a medical book. You need to find cure from the <color=#c44b0e>Dragon Gallbladder</color> of a mutated poisonous komodo dragon.
Big brother, are you talking about the poisonous komodo dragon in Poison Dragon Cave?

I'm not quite sure if it's the Poisonous Komodo Dragon mentioned in the books. Generally, a Poisonous Komodo Dragons is mutated from ordinary ones that have been domesticated until they reach a certain size.
(Listening to Cai Die's symptoms, it seems like a method of making human elixir I saw in a medical book before, and this method comes from ancient times when witchcraft was popular in the south...)
Big sister, do you have a way to heal me?
Sister Cai Die, I've seen your symptoms in a medical book. You need to take the <color=#c44b0e>Dragon Gallbladder</color> from a mutated lizard to cure it.
Big sister, are you talking about the poisonous kodomo dragon in Poison Dragon Cave?
I'm not sure if it's the poison komodo dragon mentioned in the book.
Don't worry, Little Cai Die, I will find a way to get the Poisonous Dragon Gallbladder and cure your illness completely.
Thank you in advance, big brother.
Big brother, have you found the Poison Dragon Gallbladder?
Here is the Poison Dragon Gallbladder!
Big brother is really amazing!
But, is the poisonous komodo dragon in Poison Dragon Cave already...
Will Brother Ah blame Cai die when he finds out...
I am the one who found your cure, so he can't blame you; if your Brother Ah dares to scold you for this, I will stand up for you. I believe he will respect me for my decision.
Cai Die's illness finally has a cure, Cai Die likes big brother so much.
Not yet, please be patient for a while longer.
Such a strange illness! If my medical skills were better or if I had a companion with extraordinary medical skills, I would definitely find the root cause of your problem.
Little Cai Die, rest assured, I will definitely find a way to cure your strange disease.
Little Cai Die, can you tell me about your symptoms again?
Brother Ah said that before Cai Die's strange disease is cured, she can't leave from the tribe again.
Big brother, Cai Die is the tribe's saintess, destined to guard this place for generations.
Big brother, Cai Die hates you now, don't disturb Cai Die.
Big brother, there are so many fun places in the Central Plains, Cai Die wants to experience them all.
Big brother, your team has no extra space, Cai Die can't go with you.
Cai Die will return to the tribe soon, can't play with you anymore.
Is this the place where young men and women from the Central Plains pledge their love?
This place is called the God of Marriage's Shrine, where he blesses men and women who come here, sealing their fate together in marriage.
It sounds quite similar to the place where we worship the God of Jiuli in our tribe.
In our tribe, there is a saying that if a man and woman love each other, they can go to Jiuli tribe's altar to receive the blessing of the God of Jiuli.

If a person from the tribe falls in love with an outsider, they must go to the altar to receive the forgiveness of the God of Jiuli, and finally leave the tribe forever, having no connection with the tribe in this life or the next.
I'm quite curious about your God of Jiuli, I must visit if I get the chance.
Big brother, this is where our tribe worships God of Jiuli.
The statue of Jiuli's god is very majestic.
Of course, God of Jiuli is a god of war in our tribe's legend, possessing extraordinary courage and supernatural power.
It seems that you worship the God of Jiuli to gain blessings in battle or power.

It's roughly like that, but there's also a saying in our tribe: if a man and woman love each other, they can go to the altar to receive the blessing of the God of Jiuli, and the couple will stay together for life, growing old together.
If a tribesman is in love with an outsider, they must seek forgiveness from the God of Jiuli at the altar, and then sever all ties with the tribe forever and ever.
What's wrong, Little Cai Die?
No, nothing.
Do you like Cai Die? Big brother
Of course I do, Cai Die, you're so adorable.
You know what I mean. Despite her small size, Cai Die is no longer a child.
Big brother, I need you to tell me honestly, do you really like Cai Die?
So that's what happened...
Cai Die accepts your feelings, big brother. She is very happy to be treated as your little sister.
Cai Die is our tribe's holy maiden, destined to guard this place for all eternity.\nCai Die can no longer accompany you, big brother. I wish you a smooth journey in the martial arts world.
Big brother, do you know what it means to be this tribal's holy maiden?
A holy maiden is to be sacrificed to god of Jiuli when she turns sixteen, such is our fate. This will ensure prosperity of our tribe for generations to come.
And Caidie will soon turn sixteen this year...
Doesn't that mean you will be sacrificed to God of Jiuli?
Caidie just recovered from her illness, Caidie doesn't want to die, Caidie still wants to see the outside world.
Big brother, if you like me, Cai Die will confess and atone for her sins in front of the God of Jiuli, renounce her status as holy maiden, and then you take me away from here, okay?
You haven't done anything wrong, why should you confess and atone for your sins?

As a holy maiden, Caidie failed to fulfill her duties and should accept punishment from God of Jiuli. To atone for my sin, I have to go through gnawing of ten thousand snakes to gain God's forgiveness.
How can I allow you to go through torture from thousands of snakes' gnawing!\nIf you were to accept punishment, let me take your place. I want to see what's so great about this torture!
Little Cai Die, I did my best...
What are you doing!
Little sister, what did you do?!
Brother, Caidie doesn't want to be sacrificed, Caidie doesn't want to be a saint anymore, Caidie wants to run away from here with you.
{yell} You are not allowed to leave, you are not allowed to go anywhere!
{PlayerName}, how dare you kidnap my Ah Mei, you can go to hell!!!
You are not allowed to leave, NOT ALLOWED, YOU HEAR!
Miao Cai Die, if you dare to take one step out of here, I will activate parasite in your body, making you wish you were dead!

The disease on Little Cai Die is your doing, wasn't it? Your goal is to transform her into human elixir, and then, under the name of sacrifice, use her fresh blood to enhance your power when she turns sixteen, right?
Big brother Ah, tell Cai Die this is not true, this is not true!!!
So what if you see through me, Cai Die's life is in my hands.
What a pity, we already got rid of your parasite in Little Cai Die. We treated her with the Poisonous Dragon Gallbladder from the Poisonous komodo Dragon you painstakenly raised~
{yell}{PlayerName} I'm going to kill you, I'm going to kill you!!!
Big brother, he is Cai Die's brother Ah after all, can you not stoop to his level, please?
Hmph, I'll spare his life for your sake, let's go!
Big brother Ah is already dead, I have no attachment to here anymore.\nBig brother, let's go, never come back again.
Uh... big brother... Cai Die doesn't feel too good...
What's wrong, Little Cai Die?

The medicine that suppresses the illness in Cai Die's body has been used up, brother specifically told me not to stay away from the tribe for too long, otherwise the illness on my body will get worse...
Hang in there, I'll take you back right away.
I have a way, a way to get back to the tribe quickly...\nBig brother, Cai Die will go first, remember to come to Jiuli tribe if you miss Cai Die.
Uh... Big brother... Cai Die feels uncomfortable...
I should be damned, I forgot that your illness is not treated yet.
Cai Die is going back to the tribe first. Big brother, take care of yourself.
We came a long way, and there's nothing wrong with Cai Die, it seems that the illness on Cai Die's body is really cured~
Stop right there, wanderer of the martial arts world!
Who are you and what do you want from me?
column3: ท่านเป็นใคร และท่านต้องการอะไรจากข้า

column2: I am Hatori Hyoe from Dragonfly City. I've heard about Martial Arts of the Central Plains are powerful and unfathomable. I am here to experience it first hand!
column3: ข้าฮาโตริ เฮียวเอะแห่งเมืองแมลงปอ ข้าได้ยินมาว่าศิลปะการต่อสู้ของจงหยวนนั้นทรงพลังและไม่อาจหยั่งได้ ข้ามาที่นี่เพื่อสัมผัสมันโดยตรง!

column2: Wanderer, you are my first trial. I ask that you hold nothing back!
Are you suggesting that we should have a fight here?
Exactly!

Engarde!
Martial Arts of the Central Plains indeed have many aspects worth learning.
Wanderer, what is your name?
Listen up! I won't run nor hide! {PlayerName} is my name!
{PlayerSurName}, {PlayerGivenName}. I will remember this, next time we meet, I will defeat you!
Is this strength of a warrior from the Central Plain? you are simply too weak!
I'm just a newbie in the martial arts world, what's the big deal about defeating me! Strengths of real top-notch experts are beyond your imagination.
Hmph, you are just a loser who only knows how to talk big.
Alright, I'll be waiting for you at the ruined temple in the north of the city!
You are a man of your words, I've been waiting for you for a long time.
Today's battle is inevitable, you can't avoid it!
Alright, let me show you what I've got, so you won't be so arrogant in the future!
Engarde!

Benefactor, this is a pure land of Buddhism, we don't involve ourselves in worldly disputes or martial world conflicts. If it's about martial arts competition, I'm afraid our temple can't comply, please find another place.

column2: If you refuse to fight, then hand over <color=#c44b0e>Cloud Forest Staff Manual</color> kept in your temple!
column3: หากท่านปฏิเสธที่จะต่อสู้, งั้นมอบ <color=#c44b0e>คัมภีร์พลองป่าเมฆา</color> ที่เก็บไว้ในวิหารของท่านมา!

column2: What our temple possesses is none of your business, please don't make things difficult for us!

I must have this Manual, if you refuse to hand it over, Don't blame me for resorting to violence!

Amitabha, in order to prevent Martial Arts of the Central Plains from falling into the wrong hands, I had no choice but to break my vow of non violence.
Young ignorant one! Leave now, what are you waiting for?!

With this visit, I must leave with Cloud Forest Staff Manual today! No one shall stand in my way!
A blessing in disguise. Yunlin Temple is safe now.
Ugh...
Abbot, you're injured!
People of Dragonfly City finally lost their patience...
What is Dragonfly City?
I'm fine, thank you for your concern.
Dragonfly City is an isolated city overseas, their actions are unpredictable, it's better for you not to get involved in this matter.
Amitabha.

{yell}<size=200%>UNCIVILIZED ONE, STOP!</size>
This is a pure land of Buddhism, killing is forbidden!\nTake this manual, it's yours!

Ugh...
Abbot!
Abbot, you're injured!
People of Dragonfly City finally lost their patience...

Amitabha.

I've seen a lot of people like this, just ignorant newcomers to the martial arts world. Since he failed the challenge, let him leave with a tail between his legs.
{PlayerName}, you will be my lifelong enemy. When we meet again, I swear to defeat you with my own hands!
Although it's not difficult for me to teach this guy a lesson, your helping hand indeed saved this martial arts hall a lot of trouble. I should thank you.
I am not interested in a loser like you,
Hatori Hyoe, how dare you look down on me!

column2: Dojo master, please accept my challenge!
Hmph such arrogance, let me see how good you are!
I thought you are very capable, but it turns out you're just mediocre.
Trials and tribulations from others will only make me stronger. In today's battle, Hatori Hyoe has learned a lesson.

column2: The man who calls himself Hatori Hyoe has remarkable talent. Moreover, he is adaptable and flexible. Given time, he is sure to become an extremely formidable figure

column2: Even a master who imparts martial arts to others is so vulnerable! From this, it can be seen how far martial arts in the Central Plains have declined.
Do you even understand the rules? There's no one like you, challenging so ruthlessly, every move deadly, showing no mercy!

Martial arts are inherently lethal techniques, even when sparring, one must respond with full force. Your kind of superficial martial arts is truly a disgrace to practitioners. Consider your life spared and spend the rest of your days repenting.

What did this guy come from? His entire body exudes such a heavy murderous aura! With such a martial fanatic arriving in Lin'an City, I wonder how many unlucky people in the martial arts world are going to be on the receiving end.

"{PlayerSurName}, at the peak of <color=#c44b0e>Cloud Shrouded Cliff</color>, I challenge you to a duel to the death! \nNow that my swordsmanship is perfected, I must erase my past disgrace. Respectfully, Hatori Hyoe."
column3: "{PlayerSurName} ที่ยอดเขาของ <color=#c44b0e>ผาทะเลเมฆ</color> ข้าขอท้าประลองความเป็นตายกับเจ้า!\nตอนนี้ทักษะดาบของข้าสมบูรณ์แล้ว ข้าจะล้างแค้นให้กับความอัปยศในอดีตของข้า ขอแสดงความนับถือ ฮาโตริ เฮียวเอะ”

column2: What is this guy up to now...
I admire your courage, you really did show up as to my request.
Stop beating around the bush, show me whatever tricks you have up your sleeve!
Foolish and ignorant, my strength now is beyond your imagination.
You repeatedly face defeat, yet you repeatedly engage in battles. The thickness of your skin has indeed reached a level beyond the imagination of ordinary people.
Before my absolute strength, your arrogance will only lead to your own humiliation!
In today's battle, it will not only determines who's superior but also decides life and death!
I lost... I lost...
This can't be, this can't be...
Demonic Circle Blade I learned is the strongest swordsmanship in the world, how could I be defeated.

column2: Despite your long training with martial arts, don't you understand that there is no such thing as the strongest martial art? Strength of an individual is the ultimate truth.
Victors ascend to be kings while losers descend to be usurpers. Do what you will with my life.
Heaven cherishes life, I don't want to kill you.
As a martial artist, I will not accept anyone's pity!
{yell} I, Hatori Hyoe, owe nothing to anyone!!!

column2: That is...

column2: Such a big thing standing in the street, don't they find it obstructive?
I'll tell the old man when I return to my manor, send someone to demolish this statue for me.
This pampered young master, how dare he speaks ill of the great hero!
How dare you disrespect the Great Hero!

Apologize to the young master immediately! Don't you even bother to find out whose territory Chu Xiang City is!
No matter what family your young master belongs to, he shouldn't disrespect this hero's statue.
You don't seem to be a local, but you sure are nosy.
Young master, I'll drive him away right now.\nDon't let him ruin your mood today.
No, let me deal with him myself.\nI'm itching for a fight today, and I want to find someone to play with.
Both of you stand aside and watch, no one is to interfere.
Young master is about to show his might, we're in for a treat.
Kid, don't worry, if I accidentally hurt you, I'll pay for your medical bill.
Ouch, ouch...\nKid, you really dare to fight back!
Young master, let's cripple this kid now and vent your anger.
Oh, trying to gang up on me? Don't think I'm afraid of you!
{yell} Get lost, you two bring me disgrace!
Yes!
Do you dare to leave your name?
What's there to be afraid of? I won't change nor hide my name. I am {PlayerName}!
{PlayerName}, hmm, I'll remember you.
Let's go!
This guy didn't even notice when he dropped his money bag, what a fool!

column2: Young master is brave!
Young master is invincible!
Hmph, you're not even a challenge.\nI always keep my word, here's payment for your medical bill, remember to avoid me in the future!
Let's go!
An advice from you is worth ten years of studying!\nYour words are truly awe-inspiring, I really admire you.
Where did this smooth talker come from? Get lost! Don't ruin my mood.
Exactly! Everyone knows young master is wise and powerful, we don't need your compliment.
Both of you, shut up!

{yell}, who is playing tricks on me?\nIf you have the guts, show yourself to me!
{yell}, if you don't make a move, I'll tear you down right now!
Ouch! Ouch! Ouch!
This is too weird, let's get out of here quickly.

I am the son of the pacification commissioner in Chuxiang City, Lü Zixu!\nAre you scared now? Hurry up and bow down to me.
