column2: Damn, since we've been discovered, there's no choice, let's fight to the death!
Just leave the grain here.\nWhen they see it at dawn, they'll know we've been here.
After today, we'll have to find another place, I hope they can hold on for a few more days...
{PlayerSurName} junior brother?
Could it be that you guys are... brothers of Nest of Swallow?!
I can't believe the one investigating is our own junior brother, you scared me to death!
Even so, I'm here to investigate after all...
We don't want to make it difficult for junior brother, since it's in your hands, we'll leave it to you.
(What should I do?)
column3: (ข้าควรทำอย่างไรดี?)

column2: You take off your sword and stick it in the path where the two must Run away.
This is the last chance you give them, also a warning, hoping they will behave themselves.
My lord, the criminal has been caught, please decide his fate.
Stealing military rations, according to the law, should be beheaded in public.\nPut these two into the death cell, and execute them later!
I knew that {PlayerName} could catch the criminal with his talent!
I just did my best, not to let down your expectations, my lord.
Good, good. Please accept these silvers, and I hope you can continue to uphold justice in the future.
Thank you, my lord!
I'm sorry, I couldn't catch the criminal, but I've found out where the rations are.
Ah, you've done your best, knowing the whereabouts of the rations is also a merit.
I will send people to retrieve the rations, you've worked hard, go back and rest.
My lord, I have caught the criminal,\nbut they resisted fiercely, I had to...
This... I didn't expect you to encounter such danger!\nAlthough the criminals were not caught, they can no longer commit crimes, this case can be considered closed.
You've worked hard, go back and rest well.
{PlayerName}, you let the criminal escape, you have the nerve to come back!
I was blind to trust you so easily!\nGet out of here, don't dirty my eyes!
Damn, the case of the Armory food theft has not made any progress, and the deadline has passed...
What's all the fuss about?
These days are the big days of the major martial arts schools, which are held every three years, so it's extraordinary.
What big day makes them so mobilized?
The masters of Daliang Dojo, Lin'an Dojo, and Chuxiang Dojo are from the same school.\nTheir ancestor left a martial arts manual for them to keep in turns.
For this reason, they agreed to send disciples to compete every three years.\nThe winning side has the right to keep this internal strength manual, and can comprehend the peerless martial arts on it.
I see there are not only disciples from the major martial arts schools here, right?
Ah, these years everyone likes to invite external aid, who can blame their own disciples for being incompetent.
Can external aid be invited for this? I wonder what the benefits of inviting external aid are.
If you can represent a martial arts school and win, you can ask the corresponding master to spar with you for free to improve your skills in the future.
If you are ready to participate in the competition, go to the master of Chuxiang Dojo to sign up.
But this competition is only held within these two days, no waiting after the deadline, don't miss the shichen.
We are guests here and it's not appropriate to accept disciples. If you want to learn from me, go to Daliang Dojo to find me.
We are guests here and it's not appropriate to accept disciples. If you want to learn from me, go to Lin'an Dojo to find me.
Master, I'm here to sign up for the competition.
Oh, which martial arts school do you plan to represent, young man?
Please be prepared, young man. There will be ten opponents in turn. If you can hold on to the end, you will be the big winner!
Little brother, you have indeed brought honor to our Chuxiang Dojo. From now on, if you come to Chuxiang Dojo to spar with me, it will be free of charge!
Little brother, you have indeed brought honor to our Daliang Dojo. From now on, if you come to Daliang Dojo to spar with me, it will be free of charge!
Little brother, you have indeed brought honor to our Lin'an Dojo. From now on, if you come to Lin'an Dojo to spar with me, it will be free of charge!
Little brother, your skills are still quite raw. Why not come to our Chuxiang Dojo and learn a few life-saving techniques? It will help you defend yourself in the world of martial arts.
Little brother, your skills are still quite raw. Why not come to our Daliang Dojo and learn a few life-saving techniques? It will help you defend yourself in the world of martial arts.
Little brother, your skills are still quite raw. Why not come to our Lin'an Dojo and learn a few life-saving techniques? It will help you defend yourself in the world of martial arts.
What, what did you say!
I said, I will represent myself in the fight, I alone will challenge your three major martial arts schools!
Arrogant, overestimating your abilities!
A calf is not afraid of a tiger...
My master once said, if there comes a day when a foreigner can win against our three major martial arts schools with his own strength, then this Manual should be entrusted to this person...
In that case, do you dare to accept my challenge?
Why not, please!
It seems that little brother is the destined person my master spoke of. In that case, the Manual left by the master will be entrusted to you for safekeeping.
Hehe, little brother, now you know that there are always people who are better than you. The Manual left by the master is not destined for you, it should be distributed among us brothers.
This time I have brought enough capital, I should not return empty-handed again.
Brother, you are a regular customer at the <color=#c44b0e>Dirty Street Auction</color>, have you heard any inside information?

The boss of Dirty Street, Jiang Nanguai, wants to compete with Night Auction Market. Recently, there have been many good items appearing in the Dirty Street auction, attracting more and more wealthy businessmen to come and pick up bargains.
column3: เจียงหนานไกว่หัวหน้าของตรอกเล้าหมู ต้องการแข่งขันกับตลาดประมูลราตรี เมื่อไม่นานมานี้ มีสินค้าดีๆ มากมายปรากฏในงานประมูลตรอกเล้าหมู ดึงดูดพ่อค้าผู้มั่งคั่งให้มาร่วมประมูลมากขึ้นเรื่อยๆ

column2: I heard that Jiang Nanguai recently got a new treasure, a <color=#c44b0e>strange copper ring</color>, which may appear as a mysterious auction item in the next few auctions.
When is the next auction Open? I also want to broaden my horizons.
The Dirty Street Auction is Open at <color=#c44b0e>Wu Shi every day</color>, don't miss it.
In that case, I can also try my luck and see if I can bid for something I like.
Ordinary people can't enter Dirty Street at will, you need to have good Relations with them in advance.
I suppose brother is familiar with the way, I have to rely on brother to lead the way.
Well said, well said.
Today is a good day, the auction has not yet Open, why don't we go to Dirty Street first to grab a good position, it's better to be near the water.
I'll leave it all to brother's arrangement.
Today's shichen has passed, I'll take you to see the world tomorrow.
I'll leave it all to brother's arrangement.
Auction... strange copper ring... It seems interesting, why not go and have a look.
Kid, are you ready to participate in this auction prepared by the old monster?
Alright, let's get started~
column3: ตกลง เริ่มกันเลยย~

column2: Open at Wu Shi every day, don't miss it!
Oh no, I accidentally... Jiang Nanguai.\nI need to slip away before anyone else notices.
You little brat, do you really think I can't see what you're doing?\nConsidering our relationship, this is your last warning. Don't do it again!
You little brat, you've been caught red-handed by me!\nHow dare you act wildly on my territory, you must be tired of living!
You talked so much, but you're so weak.
Don't think you're something special! If I see you again, I'll skin you alive!
Even as a ghost, I...
Get out of Dirty Street, you little brat, don't let me see you again!
You little brat, you've done it over and over again, do you think I'm a vegetarian?\nI must teach you a lesson today!
You little brat, how dare you act wildly on my territory!\nGet out of Dirty Street and never think about attending my auction again!
There's going to be a <color=#c44b0e>Chuxiang Hero Conference</color> in Chuxiang City soon, have you heard about it?
column3: <color=#c44b0e>งานชุมนุมยอดยุทธเมืองฉู่เซียง</color> จะจัดขึ้นที่เมืองฉู่เซียงเร็วๆ นี้ เจ้าเคยได้ยินเรื่องนี้บ้างไหม?

column2: Of course I know about such a big event, but it's strange that the government is organizing this hero conference, which is usually a martial arts competition in the jianghu.
It's simple. The government no longer represents the court, but the local lords. The government is just doing things for these forces.
So you mean, the Hero Conference held in Chuxiang City is actually the intention of the appeasement officer?
column3: เจ้าหมายถึงงานชุมนุมยอดยุทธเมืองฉู่เซียงมีจุดประสงค์เพื่อเอาใจทูตจริงๆ เหรอ?

column2: Not only in Chuxiang City, but also in Daliang City and Lin'an City, they are also holding hero conferences these days. The intention is very clear, which is to select talents for the local lords and use them for their own purposes.
Once the people in the officialdom get involved in the affairs of the jianghu, it seems a bit off.
Why bother about all that? If it's a martial arts competition, it a chance to make a name for yourself. Who cares who organizes and manages it then?
That makes sense, but do you know how to participate in this hero conference?

It's not difficult for me. You need to go to Chuxiang Dojo first to participate in the preliminary competition. Only when you win the preliminary competition can you have the qualification to register for the Chuxiang Hero Conference with the prefect.
column3: ไม่ใช่เรื่องยากสำหรับข้า เจ้าต้องไปที่โรงฝึกยุทธเมืองฉู่เซียงก่อน เพื่อเข้าร่วมการแข่งขันรอบคัดเลือก เมื่อเจ้าชนะการแข่งขันรอบคัดเลือก จึงจะมีคุณสมบัติในการลงทะเบียนเข้าร่วมงานชุมนุมยอดยุทธเมืองฉู่เซียงกับนายอำเภอได้

column2: In that case, what are we doing here? Let's go to the preliminary competition right away.
The Hero Conference... seems to be a good opportunity to stand out.
column3: งานชุมนุมยอดยุทธ...  ดูเหมือนจะเป็นโอกาสอันดีที่จะแสดงฝีมือ

column2: Are you here to participate in the preliminary competition of the Chuxiang Hero Conference?
column3: เจ้ามาที่นี่เพื่อเข้าร่วมการแข่งขันรอบคัดเลือก ของงานชุมนุมยอดยุทธเมืองฉู่เซียงหรือไม่?

column2: Five matches, and only the final winner is eligible to participate in the Chuxiang Hero Conference!
column3: หลังจากการแข่งขันทั้งห้าครั้ง ผู้ชนะรอบสุดท้ายจะมีสิทธิ์เข้าร่วมในงานชุมนุมยอดยุทธเมืองฉู่เซียง!

column2: Congratulations to {PlayerSurName} for passing the preliminary competition. You have obtained the qualification to register for the Chuxiang Hero Conference. Please go to the Government Office to register with the prefect.
column3: ขอแสดงความยินดีกับ {PlayerSurName} ที่ผ่านการแข่งขันรอบคัดเลือก เจ้ามีคุณสมบัติที่จะลงทะเบียนสำหรับการชุมนุมจอมยุทธแห่งฉู่เซียง กรุณาไปที่ศาลาว่าการเพื่อลงทะเบียนกับนายอำเภอ

column2: If you can't even pass the preliminary competition, I advise you not to expect to participate in the Hero Conference.
column3: หากเจ้าไม่สามารถผ่านการแข่งขันรอบคัดเลือกได้ ข้าแนะนำว่าอย่าคาดหวังที่จะเข้าร่วมในงานชุมนุมยอดยุทธ

column2: Don't be too nervous, as long as you haven't won in the preliminary competition, you can keep participating until you win.
I, {PlayerName}, pay my respects to the prefect.\nI have passed the preliminary competition of the Hero Conference and came to register for the Chuxiang Hero Conference.
column3: ข้า {PlayerName} ขอคารวะท่านนายอำเภอ\nข้าผ่านการแข่งขันรอบคัดเลือกของงานชุมนุมยอดยุทธแล้ว และมาลงทะเบียนสำหรับงานชุมนุมยอดยุทธเมืองฉู่เซียง

column2: The fact that you were lucky enough to pass the preliminary competition only shows that you are lucky. If you can win the Hero Conference, it will show your true extraordinaryness.
column3: ความจริงที่ว่าเจ้าผ่านการแข่งขันรอบคัดเลือก แสดงให้เห็นว่าเจ้ายังพอมีโชคอยู่บ้าง แต่หากเจ้าสามารถเอาชนะในงานชุมนุมยอดยุทธได้ ก็จะแสดงให้เห็นว่า เจ้ามีฝีมืออย่างแท้จริง

column2: You can only participate in the Chuxiang Hero Conference once, are you ready?
column3: เจ้าสามารถเข้าร่วมงานชุมนุมยอดยุทธเมืองฉู่เซียงได้เพียงครั้งเดียว เจ้าพร้อมหรือยัง?

column2: This mansion advises you, there is only one chance, if you fail halfway, don't blame others.
This mansion will personally host the Hero Meeting for you, and I want to see how many heroes and talents are in Chuxiang City!
Congratulations to young hero {PlayerSurName} for winning the championship, this mansion should also express something. What reward do you want?

Don't worry about the honor and disgrace for a while, you people in the rivers and lakes often say: the one who laughs last is the winner. This mansion looks forward to your future performance and hopes that you can become a pillar of society as soon as possible.
column3: อย่ากังวลกับเกียรติและความอับอายไปสักระยะ คนที่อยู่ตามแม่น้ำและทะเลสาบมักพูดว่า: คนที่หัวเราะทีหลังคือผู้ชนะ คฤหาสน์หลังนี้ตั้งตารอการแสดงของเจ้าในอนาคตและหวังว่าเจ้าจะกลายเป็นเสาหลักของสังคมโดยเร็วที่สุด

column2: As you wish, this mansion will definitely make the young hero famous all over the world, known to all!
Wealth moves people's hearts, and it seems that the young hero can't avoid it. Well, this mansion will satisfy you!
This mansion personally gives you a waist card, carry it with you, and there will be an Official to rescue you in times of crisis.
Something special...
This mansion happens to have something special, I don't know what it is for, just give it to you.
Thank you, my lord!
Your skills now far exceed mine, and there won't be much progress in learning from me.\nIf you want to go further in the future, you can only find those masters in the rivers and lakes to learn from.
column3: วรยุทธของเจ้าเหนือกว่าข้ามากนัก ต่อให้จะประลองกับข้าอีกกี่ครั้งก็คงไม่มีความคืบหน้าหรอก\nหากเจ้าต้องการจะก้าวหน้าต่อไปในข้างหน้า เจ้าต้องไปพบปรมาจารย์เหล่านั้นในแม่น้ำและทะเลสาบเพื่อเรียนรู้เท่านั้น

column2: It costs to learn from me!\nHow much success do you need me to learn from you?
column3: การจะประลองกับข้ามีค่าใช่จ่าย!\nเจ้าต้องการให้ข้าใช่พลังแค่ไหนในการประลองกับเจ้า?

column2: It's definitely easier to improve EXP by practicing with real people than hitting wooden stakes.\nWith your current strength, it is the safest way to improve your strength in this way.
column3: การเพิ่ม EXP โดยการประลองกับผู้คนนั้นง่ายกว่าการตีเสาไม้อย่างแน่นอน\nด้วยพละกำลังปัจจุบันของเจ้า มันจะดีที่สุดในการเพิ่มความแข็งแกร่งด้วยวิธีนี้\n

column2: I'm sorry, I didn't control my strength this time, and I started a bit heavier.\nCome on, let's have another match, this time I will pay attention to the measure.
In the previous exchange match, you earned enough face for our martial arts gym, so I won't charge you.\nHow much success do you need me to learn from you?
Young hero {PlayerSurName}, although your kung fu is already on par with me, but you are young and energetic, and your future is bound to be limitless.
column3: จอมยุทธน้อย {PlayerSurName} วรยุทธ์ของเจ้าแทบทัดเทียมข้าแล้ว แถมเจ้ายังเด็กมีความมุ่งมั่นเต็มเปี่ยม อนาคตของเจ้าคงยากที่จะคาดเดาได้แน่

column2: Master, you are suddenly so polite, I am a little uncomfortable.
column3: อาจารย์, จู่ ๆ ท่านก็สุภาพเยี่ยงนี้,  ข้ารู้สึกไม่สบายใจนิดหน่อย

column2: Does the master have something to find me?
Young hero {PlayerSurName}, there is something that needs to bother you.\nI hope you can serve as a role model for these martial arts disciples and practice them more for me.
column3: จอมยุทธน้อย {PlayerSurName} มีบางอย่างที่ต้องรบกวนเจ้า\nข้าหวังว่าเจ้าจะเป็นแบบอย่างให้กับจอมยุทธเหล่านี้และฝึกฝนพวกเขาให้มากขึ้นเพื่อข้า

column2: Why doesn't the master do it himself, why do you need to ask for help from outsiders?
column3: ทำไมอาจารย์ไม่ลงมือทำด้วยตัวเองและทำไมต้องขอความช่วยเหลือจากคนนอกเช่นข้า?

column2: So many disciples, I can't handle it alone if I train them one by one.
column3: ลูกศิษย์มีจำนวนมาก, ข้าคนเดียวไม่สามารถอบรมสั่งสอนได้ทั้งหมด

column2: How about this, you help me train the disciples once, as long as you beat them, I will give you a reward, okay?
column3: เอาอย่างนี้เป็นไง ข้ามีรางวัลให้ทุกครั้งที่เจ้ามาช่วยข้าฝึกสอนอบรมลูกศิษย์เหล่านี้ ?

column2: Okay, leave it to me!
column3: โอเค ปล่อยให้เป็นหน้าที่ของข้า!

column2: What level of disciple do you want to train today?
column3: วันนี้เจ้าต้องการฝึกฝนลูกศิษย์ระดับไหน?

column2: It's hard work, this is today's reward.
column3: ลำบากเจ้าหน่อยนะ นี้คือรางวัลสำหรับวันนี้

column2: No Relations, victory or defeat is a common thing for soldiers.\nHowever, there is no reward for today.
You have already trained them today, and you can continue tomorrow with a combination of work and rest.
column3: เจ้าได้ฝึกฝนพวกเขาเสร็จแล้วในวันนี้และเจ้าสามารถทํางานร่วมกันได้อีกในวันพรุ่งนี้

column2: Attacking from behind the target will cause more damage and is more likely to be Critical!
Attacking from the side of the target will cause more damage, and the target is not easy to Parry!
The internal strength that has been learned is set as the main function, which can play the greatest effect in battle.
Forcibly equipping equipment that does not meet the conditions will greatly reduce the actual effect.
Passive represents different fighting styles, and comprehension points can improve the understanding of Passive.
Frequent use of martial arts can also accumulate Experience, but it is much slower than learning through Manual.
Both attacking and getting hit will gain Spirit. When Spirit reaches 100, you can use martial arts to severely damage your opponent.
The more Spirit cost for a Super Move, the more noticeable its effect.
column3: สำหรับ "ท่าไม้ตาย" ยิ่งใช้ค่า "พลังใจ" มาก, ประสิทธิภาพก็จะยิ่งเห็นได้ชัดเจนยิ่งขึ้น

column2: High-quality martial arts cannot be used consecutively and require a period of Recovery.
Learning external skills can enhance your Attack attribute, while learning internal skills can enhance your HP and MP.
To use martial arts, you need to hold the corresponding Weapon. If you're holding a Folding fan and want to use a stick to hurt the enemy, it's simply a pipe dream.
What kind of illness do you want to treat, big brother?
Why are you treating the illness? Isn't the doctor here?
Master is out Gathering and hasn't come back yet, so he asked me to help watch the shop.
Alright... So, kid, what kind of illnesses can you treat?
For injuries, I give Healing medicine, for Qi stagnation, I give Healing ointment.
It seems alright, anything else?
...For injuries, I give Healing medicine, for Qi stagnation, I give Healing ointment.
Why do you only have these two things?
I can treat many things! It's just that Master only left two kinds of medicine.
Big brother, do you have an injury or Qi stagnation?
Big brother, here's your wound healing medicine, just apply it to the injured area. Don't take it orally~
Big brother, here's your Healing ointment, take it with warm water.
Why are you coming to the clinic if you're in good health...
Big brother, today's medicine has been distributed, if you still feel uncomfortable, you can only come back tomorrow.
Big brother, all the medicine left by Master has been distributed, if you want to see a doctor, you can only wait for Master to come back.
When will the doctor come back?
Hmm... I don't know, I only know that Master went to Wild Wolf Valley for Gathering. If you see Master in Wild Wolf Valley, can you ask him to come back quickly?
Wild Wolf Valley, got it, I'll keep an eye out.
Big brother, have you found Master?
Not yet, kid, wait a bit longer.
Help!
Oh no...
It's over, I'm afraid I'm going to die here...
There's a man dressed as a doctor being attacked up ahead, what should we do?
I'm sorry, it's not that I don't want to help, but I really can't do anything about so many wolves...
Stop hurting people, you beasts!
column3: หยุดทำร้ายผู้คนได้แล้วเจ้าสัตว์ร้าย!

column2: Great, there's hope!
I couldn't save the doctor, if only I were stronger...
I'm sorry, kid, I did find the doctor, but the situation was too dangerous, and he still met with an accident...
Master is actually...
The little medicine boy was silent for a long time, then suddenly crawled out from behind the counter and ran out of the Hall of Remedies.
You also ran out of the Hall of Remedies following her, but on the bustling streets of Chuxiang City, you couldn't see her anywhere.
This kid runs really fast, she disappeared in a flash...\nI hope she doesn't do anything foolish.
Big brother, where are you feeling uncomfortable today?
Kid, you ran away without saying a word yesterday, you scared me to death. Where did you go?
Wild Wolf Valley.
column3: หุบเขาหมาป่า

column2: Wild Wolf Valley?! What were you doing there, weren't you afraid of danger?
Master told me, "The more skills you have, the more responsibility you bear." Now that Master is gone, I might be the most knowledgeable about medicine in Chuxiang City.
I want to keep this Hall of Remedies for Master and pass on his years of hard work!
What a sensible child.
For bruises and sprains, use Healing medicine. For stagnant qi, use Healing ointment.\nBig brother, if you feel unwell, remember to come to me for medicine!
Thank you, young hero, for your help. If it weren't for you, I might have...
When a gentleman is in trouble, it's our duty to help!\nWhy did you come to such a dangerous place alone?

Alas, I am a doctor from the Chuxiang City Hall of Remedies. Recently, many people have been displaced to the nearby area,\nSome of them are injured and some have contracted local diseases, but they have no money for treatment.
Seeing their plight, I left the city to treat them for free,\nBut unfortunately, I ran out of medicinal herbs, so I had to risk coming to this Wild Wolf Valley to gather more.
column3: ข้าคิดว่าพวกเขาน่าสงสาร ข้าจึงออกไปในเมืองเพื่อให้การรักษาพยาบาลฟรีสำหรับพวกเขา\nแต่เขามีสมุนไพรไม่เพียงพอ ดังนั้นเขาจึงเสี่ยงและมาที่หุบเขาหมาป่าป่าเพื่อรวบรวมสมุนไพร

column2: Indeed, a doctor's benevolence. Your actions are a model for us all.
You flatter me, young hero. Thank you again for saving my life.\nI've gathered enough herbs now, so I should continue treating those unfortunate people.
(It seems he won't be returning to the Hall of Remedies for a while. What should I do?)
column3: (ดูเหมือนเขาจะไม่กลับมาหอเยียวยาสักพักแล้ว ข้าควรทำอย่างไร?)

column2: Once I've finished treating the refugees, I'll return to the Hall of Remedies.\nWe'll meet again then, young hero.
I've found the doctor,\nHe's gone to treat the refugees and should be back in a few days.
What about the sick people in the city...
Well... we can only wait for him to return.
Great, with your help, young hero, we'll surely be more efficient!
You and the doctor run away from the Wild Wolf Valley and arrive at the Refugee Camp.
Doctor, you're finally back. Little Third's wound has burst open again!
Doctor, my stomach hurts after chewing on tree bark...
Doctor, doctor, my husband is delirious and his forehead is burning hot--
Don't worry, everyone. One at a time.
In the Refugee Camp, there are many sick and injured people, and the doctor is overwhelmed with work.
You assist the doctor, bustling around, too busy to attend to all.\nHalf a day passed like this, and the patients' conditions finally stabilized.
Thank you, doctor, my third son has been given a second chance at life...
The doctor is truly a miraculous healer, a reincarnation of Hua Tuo!
This is all within my duty, you don't have to be so grateful.\nIf there is any situation, feel free to find me at the Hall of Remedies.
Thank you, doctor!
Thank you for your help, young hero. Without you, I wouldn't have been able to take care of so many patients.
Not at all, I was just assisting you,\non the contrary, I learned a lot.
Young hero, you are too modest. I don't have anything valuable, only these to thank you.
Now that things are settled here, I will return to the Hall of Remedies.
Would you like to return to the Hall of Remedies with me, young hero?
Then let's set off.
In that case, I will take my leave.\nSee you at the Hall of Remedies, young hero.
Why hasn't master returned yet...
Young hero, we are short of medicine here, if there is anything, let's talk when I return to the Hall of Remedies.
Thank you all for participating in this test.
If you like this game, please add it to your wish list on STEAM.
TapTap has opened a special section for "The Hero's Journey", where you can speak freely.
"Hero's Adventure" trial version ends here. To find out what happens next, please wait for the official version.
Kid, I sense an unusual aura from you. Are you carrying something ancient, like a thousand-year-old artifact?
The only thing I have that looks old is this copper ring, but I'm not sure if it's a thousand years old.
Take out the Animal ring from the bag and hand it over
column3: นำแหวนนักษัตรออกจากกระเป๋าแล้วมอบให้

column2: I was right, the aura I sensed comes from this copper ring.\nI can't believe I get to see this Animal ring in my lifetime...
column3: ข้าคิดถูก, ออร่าที่ข้าสัมผัสได้มาจากวงแหวนทองแดงนี้\nไม่น่าเชื่อว่าจะได้เห็น แหวนนักษัตร นี้ในชีวิตนี้...

column2: You seem particularly excited. How about I give you this copper ring, and you teach me some skills that took you a hundred or eighty years to master in return?
Ignorant child, such a priceless treasure should not be given away lightly!
There were originally twelve of these, known as the twelve Animal rings.\nIt is said that gathering the twelve Animal rings can open the door of time and space...
column3: เดิมทีมีทั้งหมดสิบสองวง เรียกกันว่าวงแหวนสิบสองนักษัตร\nว่ากันว่าการรวบรวมวงแหวนนักษัตรทั้งสิบสองวงสามารถเปิดประตูแห่งกาลเวลาและอวกาศได้...

column2: Why do I feel like you're making things up? This isn't a fantasy martial arts story.
It may sound absurd, but it's not impossible.
There's a <color=#c44b0e>Nameless cave</color> not far from here that's related to this Animal ring. After you've been there, you won't think I'm talking nonsense.
column3: มี<color=#c44b0e>ถ้ำไร้นาม</color>อยู่ไม่ไกลจากที่นี่ซึ่งเป็นสถานที่ที่เกี่ยวข้องกับวงแหวนนักษัตรเหล่านี้ หลังจากที่เจ้าไปที่นั่น เจ้าจะไม่คิดว่า สิ่งที่ข้าพูดเป็นเรื่องไร้สาระหรอก

column2: The statues in this Mountain cave seem to be identical to the ones in Chuxiang City. I wonder what the connection is?
I didn't expect to see such a huge statue in this Mountain cave. I wonder who this statue is depicting.
There are exactly twelve peculiar stone tables here. I wonder if they have anything to do with the twelve Animal rings that Fu Yaozi mentioned.

column2: Young man, here are a few pounds of meat for you! After a year of running around, make a rich New Year's Eve dinner to reward yourself.
Big brother, Xiao Bao wishes you good luck and everything goes well in the new year!
It seems that you are here to ask for lucky money, how much should I give?
Big brother, is your pocket cleaner than your face?
Thank you, big brother!
Big brother, your gift is too precious! Xiao Bao will also give you my treasured possession that has been collected for many years.
Wishing Xiao Bao good luck and everything goes well in the new year!
Big brother, Xiao Hua wishes you to be more handsome and richer in the new year!
It seems that you are here to ask for lucky money, how much should I give?
Big brother, is it appropriate for you to be so stingy?
Thank you, big brother!
Big brother's kindness is too precious!\nXiao Hua will also give the treasure that has been cherished for many years to big brother.
Wishing Xiao Hua to become more and more beautiful and smarter in the new year!
Big brother, Xiao Ya wishes you to become more and more capable and famous in the new year!
It seems that you are here to ask for lucky money, how much should I give?
As long as it's from big brother, no matter how much, Xiao Ya is very happy!
Wishing Xiao Ya to have more and more new toys and new clothes in the new year!
Let me tell you a secret, a mysterious person is staying in the village, see if you can find him.
I don't have any rare things to give you, I just picked up this item, I feel it might be useful to you, so I give it to you as a New Year's gift.

column2: Are you the mysterious person Bao Dating talked about! Is there a more affordable welcome gift?
