column2: This Enlightment Tower was originally used to suppress the river tide, later it became a place for dignitaries to play and sightsee, ordinary people are not allowed to enter.
column3: ที่หอรู้แจ้งนี้เดิมทีใช้เป็นที่กั้นกระแสน้ำในแม่น้ำ ต่อมาก็ใช้เป็นที่ชมทิวทัศน์สำหรับบุคคลสำคัญเท่านั้น คนธรรมดาไม่อนุญาตให้เข้าไป

column2: Recently, a big shot from the Imperial City Department visited the Enlightment Tower and set up a treasure hunt Arena, claiming that anyone who can reach the top floor will receive a priceless treasure and the opportunity to join the Imperial City Department.
column3: เมื่อเร็วๆ นี้ มีข่าวใหญ่จากกรมวังหลวง ผู้ที่เคยมายังหอคอยแห่งนี้ ได้จัดตั้งสนามแข่งขันล่าสมบัติ และยังรับประกันว่าหากผู้ใดที่สามารถขึ้นไปชั้นบนของหอคอยได้ ก็จะได้รับสมบัติล้ำค่า และยังมีโอกาสร่วมงานกับทางกรมวังหลวงด้วย

column2: I don't know what the Imperial City Department is, but if it can be listed alongside a priceless treasure as the final reward, it must not be bad.
column3: ข้าไม่รู้กรมวังหลวงคืออะไร แต่ถ้ามันเกี่ยวกับสมบัติล้ำค่าละก็ ข้าว่าคงไม่ได้เรื่องเลวร้ายนักหรอก

column2: We ordinary people only hear that the Imperial City Department is very powerful, even the royal family and relatives dare not provoke them, I heard that even His Highness, Duke Kang, is very polite to that big shot.
column3: คนธรรมดาอย่างพวกเราได้ยินเพียงว่ากรมวังหลวงมีอำนาจมาก แม้แต่ราชวงศ์และเครือญาติก็ไม่กล้ารบกวนพวกเขา ข้ายังได้ยินมาว่าแม้แต่อ๋องคังก็ยังต้องสุภาพด้วย

column2: In that case, I'm interested in trying my hand, maybe I can get a high position in the Imperial City Department.
column3: ข้าสนใจจะลองดู บางทีข้าอาจได้ตำแหน่งสูงๆ ในกรมวังหลวงก็ได้

column2: Oh, that's good. If you become a high official in the future, I can also benefit from your good fortune.
column3: โอ้ ดียิ่ง หากเจ้าได้เป็นข้าราชการระดับสูงจริงในอนาคต ข้าก็จะได้ประโยชน์จากความโชคดีของเจ้าเช่นกัน

column2: I came here for this reason, I'll give it a try, maybe the treasure will be mine.
column3: เอาละ ข้าจะลองดู บางทีสมบัตินั่นอาจเป็นของข้า

column2: There's going to be a show~
If you want to participate in the treasure hunt, go talk to the general in front of the tower.
column3: ถ้าเจ้าอยากเข้าร่วมการล่าสมบัติละก็ ไปคุยกับพลทหารที่หน้าหอคอยได้เลย

column2: Thanks for the information.
column3: ขอบคุณสำหรับข้อมูล

column2: General, I want to participate in this treasure hunt Arena.
Are you familiar with the rules of this Arena?\nThis Arena is not something you can win just by brute force.
I'm about to request the rules of the Arena from the general.
This Enlightment Tower has 6 floors, each floor has a gatekeeper, you can only enter the next floor after defeating the gatekeeper.
The rules don't sound special, just defeat the gatekeeper on each floor, right?
Nothing special? These gatekeepers are martial arts masters carefully selected by the commander, if you underestimate them, you will definitely suffer.
Are you sure you want to participate in the treasure hunt now?
Get out of the way, don't interfere with my work.
Go in quickly, the commander is waiting anxiously.
Good luck, young hero.
Oh, someone is going for the treasure again!
Come on!
Tsk, doesn't look as good as me.
You look weak, and you dare to challenge the Enlightment Tower?
We'll see.
It's hard to guard the first floor, all kinds of people come to fight, it's exhausting.
If you talk so much to everyone who comes to challenge, it will indeed be very hard.
Humph, I'll show you my power on the horse!
It's nothing great to beat me, I'm just the bottom of the barrel.\nThere are more powerful guys upstairs, if you're not afraid of getting beaten, just go upstairs.
I've finished my work for today, I'll take my leave.
column3: วันนี้ข้าทำงานของข้าเสร็จแล้ว ข้าจะขอลา

column2: You're really a low-level character, get out of here, don't get in the way.
Do you want to give up the treasure hunt?
Young hero {PlayerName}, I'm sorry, according to the rules, you need to have 6 people in your team to hunt for treasure, now you have violated the rules, please run away from the Enlightment Tower.
Finally, someone decent has come, I hope this will be an interesting fight!
You're an interesting guy, go upstairs.
By the way, let me remind you, the guy upstairs is much more powerful than me, you have to be careful~
You scared me!
Hahahaha——
Is that all you've got? It seems I can be wrong about people too.\nYou'd better go home and practice more, your current skills are not enough!
column3: แค่สองช่วงเวลานี้เองเหรอ? ดูเหมือนว่าบางครั้งข้าก็ตัดสินคนอื่นผิด\nท่านควรกลับบ้านไปฝึกซ้อมใหม่ดีกว่า กังฟูแมว 3 ขาที่คุณมีตอนนี้ไม่เพียงพอโดยสิ้นเชิง!

column2: Someone's coming, you're in luck.
{yell}This guy is crazy, run——
What's going on?
The treasure belongs to me alone, you are not worthy!
If you have the ability, go challenge the next level, why are you competing with me? We are both challengers.
He just tried to blow up the stairs to the third floor, but I stopped him.
Blow up... indeed a despicable madman.
You rats are simply wasting my time, Blitz attack!
You are very powerful...
Wait until my swordsmanship is perfected, I will make you feel the pain from hell!
How are your injuries?
They are all superficial wounds, I won't die...
Come on, gatekeeper, I'm in a hurry.
Stop joking, you've driven that madman away, I admit I can't beat you, you've passed this level.
I don't know how many ribs were broken by that guy, I'm going to have to rest for several months now.
Alas, you really disappoint me, it seems that the madman you drove away is also mediocre.
What just happened downstairs?
A madman didn't want other challengers to climb the tower, he wanted to blow up the stairs, but I drove him away.
Since you say so, I suppose your skills won't disappoint me.
If I didn't have some skills, I wouldn't have reached the fourth floor of this Enlightment Tower.
Make your move, as long as you defeat me, you can go to the fifth floor.
I won't hold back, be careful!
Impressive, indeed there are always people better than oneself.\nPlease go to the fifth floor, young hero.
Yo~ I thought the person who could reach the fifth floor must have some extraordinary abilities, but it turns out to be a green kid.
I originally thought the fifth floor gatekeeper would either be a handsome gentleman or a heroic woman, but it turns out to be neither male nor female.
You little kid, you are good at verbal fights, if I have the chance in the future, I will definitely take you back to the palace and train you well.
I don't want to waste words with you, a disgusting person, let's fight quickly!
You are really impatient, but I like it.
Now that I've won, you can get lost, I feel uncomfortable seeing you.
Don't be too proud too early, the commander won't be as soft-hearted as me!
You are still a kid after all, your Amateurish Strike can't catch the commander's eye.
Finally someone has reached the sixth floor, it's worth my long wait.
{PlayerName}! It's you, this is beyond my expectation.
Tong Daofu, so you are the big shot from the Imperial City Department!
column3: ถงเต๋าฟู่ ดังนั้นเจ้าคือบุคคลสำคัญจากกรมวังหลวง!

column2: In the Imperial City Department, I am the most respected, the power of the Imperial City Department is second only to one person and above all others...
column3: ในกรมวังหลวงข้าเป็นที่เคารพนับถือมากที่สุด อำนาจของกรมวังหลวงเป็นรองเพียงคนเดียวแต่อยู่เหนือทุกสิ่ง...

column2: I fought all the way here, not to listen to your bragging about the Imperial City Department.
column3: ข้าต่อสู้มาตลอดทางที่นี่ ไม่ได้มาเพื่อฟังคำโอ้อวดของเจ้าเกี่ยวกับกรมวังหลวง

column2: Good, let me see how much your martial arts have improved, {PlayerSurName} young hero!
Now that I have reached the top, should the reward be fulfilled?
Oh, there are still people in the martial arts world who don't know me, I'm so sad.

I am the commander of the Imperial City Department - Tong Daofu, in the Imperial City Department, I am the most respected, the power of the Imperial City Department is second only to one person and above all others...
column3: ข้าเป็นผู้บัญชาการของกรมวังหลวง - ถงเต๋าฟู่ ในกรมวังหลวงข้าเป็นที่เคารพนับถือมากที่สุด อำนาจของกรมวังหลวงเป็นรองเพียงคนเดียวแต่อยู่เหนือทุกสิ่ง...

column2: I fought all the way here, not to listen to your bragging about the Imperial City Department.\nSo how can I get that priceless treasure?
column3: ข้าต่อสู้มาตลอดทางที่นี่ ไม่ได้มาเพื่อฟังคำโอ้อวดของเจ้าเกี่ยวกับกรมวังหลวง\nดังนั้นเจ้าจะมอบสมบัติล้ำค่านั้นให้ข้าได้หรือยัง?

column2: Want a treasure? That's easy.\nLet's see what you, who have reached the sixth floor of the Enlightment Tower, are capable of!
Huh, I didn't expect you to be so mediocre, it's disappointing.\nThose lazy guys on the first five floors must have let you through.
Guards, kick this kid out of the Enlightment Tower!\nThe previous five tower guards are banished to the wilderness, unforgivable till death!
I don't know which bastard pissed off the commander, the treasure hunt in the tower is cancelled, you all can leave, there's no more excitement.
Who's so unkind, I won't let him off
What, no more excitement?
I haven't participated yet, how can it end
The commander is as capricious as a woman
Disperse, disperse
...What a handsome kung fu!
I concede!\nThis priceless treasure...
I always keep my word. The treasure of the Enlightment Tower is in that box over there. Here's the key, you can take the treasure.
Then I won't be polite~
I have a question for you, you must answer honestly.
What's the matter?
{PlayerName}, would you like to join Duke Qi's Manor and work for Duke Qi?
So the real purpose of using the treasure as a cover is to recruit talents for Duke Qi!
Right, Duke Qi is closely watched by those Yan people. Otherwise, we wouldn't have to come all this way to act in such a lousy play!
Duke Qi? He's just a phony who is bowing and scraping to the Yans. {PlayerName}, you mustn't listen to this eunuch's deceitful words!
Lady Ye, I didn't ask for your opinion, you better step aside.
Bah, he's just a puppet being manipulated!\nIf he really had the intention, he would have sent troops to fight those Yan dogs long ago!

You reckless little fellow, you only knows how to charge forward like a mad bull. How could you understand the hardships endured by His Highness, Duke Qi, as he endures humiliation and patiently bides his time?
Old monster, believe it or not, I'll smash you with a hammer!
{PlayerName}, your father's last wish was to drive out the barbarians and restore the country, and you agreed at the time. If you listen to this eunuch, you are a traitor!

Oh, I thought it was someone else, isn't this the young master of the Yang family?\nIt seems that those who arrested your Yang family back then were really useless, they didn't cut the grass and remove the roots, leaving a little trouble.
You dare to disrespect my father! My father was loyal to the country, but was framed, how can you, a eunuch, point fingers here!

{PlayerName}, our family is waiting for your answer. Think about it, once Duke Qi's plan is successful, you will be above everyone else! As long as you agree, the wealth and glory of the rest of your life are within easy reach.
Duke Qi is weak and willingly serves the people of Yan; this is widely known throughout the realm.
f I were to join Duke Qi, wouldn't I be serving a dog? Isn't that even worse than being a dog?
I'll take a step back, {PlayerName}, you are one of the few young talents who can catch my eye, our Imperial City Department is recruiting talents from all over the world, would you like to join us?
column3: ข้าจะถอยกลับไป {PlayerName} เจ้าเป็นหนึ่งในเด็กที่มีพรสวรรค์เพียงไม่กี่คนที่ดึงดูดสายตาของข้า กรมวังหลวงของเรากำลังรับสมัครผู้มีความสามารถจากทั่วทุกมุมโลก เจ้าต้องการเข้าร่วมกับเราไหม?

column2: The Imperial City Division sounds impressive, but the one in charge is not a real man.\nI wonder if staying inside for a long time will make you neither male nor female like you?
{PlayerName}, I have been tolerating you because I see you as a talent. I didn't expect you to not appreciate my kindness and keep insulting me. Do you really think I'm easy to bully?
His Highness, Duke Qi, instructed me that if we could recruit this talent, we should do so; if not, even if we have to ruin him, we must ensure he is not used by others!
{PlayerName}, you are here, just like a turtle in a jar, a meat on the case. You can take your arrogance and go on your way!
You think you can take me down with this little skill?\nHave you been sitting in the position of the commander of the Imperial City Division for too long, and your brain is not working well?
Hehehehe——
Kid, you're still too green.\nI am the commander of the Imperial City Division, how could I have only this trick.
Do you have any other tricks?
{yell} Come here, kill him for me!
Tsk, how is this brat so powerful...
Kid, you offended me, just wait for your ten clans to be implicated!
The things in this box are finally mine!
column3: ในที่สุดสิ่งของในกล่องนี้ก็ตกเป็นของข้าแล้ว!

column2: This box has been tampered with and a gunpowder fuse has been installed, luckily I'm good at cracking machinery!
column3: กล่องนี้ถูกงัดแงะและติดตั้งผงดินปืนไว้ โชคดีที่ข้าแก้กลไกลเครื่องจักรเก่ง!

column2: Done, it's safe now.\nThis old guy is really cunning, he actually wanted to kill me with this method.
This old guy is really cunning, he actually wanted to kill me with this method.\nFortunately, I dodged quickly, otherwise I would have been blown up!
This old guy is really cunning, he actually wanted to kill me with this method.\nFortunately, I have a hard life, otherwise I would have been blown up!
The old guy is really cunning...
I don't know if I just saw it wrong, how did I see Lord Tong flying away from the top of the tower?
Hey, you are the challenger who just entered, how did it go, did you get the treasure?
What is the treasure, show it to us
We've been waiting for a long time and can't wait in vain
Can he also finally get the treasure?
Why didn't the commander show up?
This kid doesn't seem too happy...
I'm sorry to disappoint you all. This time I not only offended Lord Tong of the Imperial City Division, but I almost died inside just now.
Lord Tong threatened me when he left, saying that he would execute my ten clans...\nAh, everyone is so enthusiastic about me, I don't know if I will be counted in the ten clans in the future.
I, the general, know nothing and heard nothing.\nWhere did this wild kid come from, get out of my way, don't get in the way here!
We don't know you at all
Don't try to build Relations, whose family are you from?
What just happened?
It's too late, it's time to go home and sleep
There's nothing interesting to see, go home
Do you know what this place is?\nYou dare to break into Duke Qi's Manor!
column3: เจ้ารู้ไหมว่านี่คือสถานที่อะไร?\nเจ้ากล้าที่จะบุกเข้าไปในตำหนักของอ๋องฉี!

column2: (What should I do to get in?)
column3: (ต้องทำอย่างไรจึงจะเข้าได้?)

column2: {yell} There are thieves breaking into the mansion, come here!
column3: {yell} มาที่นี่เร็ว มีโจรบุกเข้าไปในตำหนัก!

column2: Kid, you're in such a hurry to reincarnate, let us send you on your way!
column3: ไอ้หนู เจ้ารีบร้อนไปเกิดใหม่ ให้พวกเราส่งเจ้าออกเดินทางเถอะ!

column2: Who is in such a hurry to reincarnate? Do you want me to send you on your way?
column3: ใครกันรีบร้อนไปเกิดใหม่? เจ้าอยากให้ข้าส่งเจ้าไหม!

column2: Oh, my eyes are blinded by the wind...
column3: โอ้ ตาข้ามองไม่เห็นเพราะลม...

column2: It's so uncomfortable not being able to see clearly
column3: มันอึดอัดมากที่มองเห็นได้ไม่ชัดเจน

column2: Considering our Relations, I'll help you this time. If you get caught, don't say you know me.
column3: เห็นแก่ความสัมพันธ์ของเรา คราวนี้ข้าจะช่วยเจ้า ถ้าถูกจับได้ อย่าบอกว่ารู้จักข้า

column2: Princess, you're finally back! His highness, Duke Kang, can now rest assured!\nHis highness found that you are not in the mansion and was worried about your safety, so he sent many people to find you.
column3: องค์หญิง, ในที่สุดท่านก็กลับมาแล้ว! ตอนนี้อ๋องคังทรงวางพระทัยได้แล้ว!\nองค์ชายพบว่าองค์หญิงไม่ได้อยู่ในตำหนักและกังวลเรื่องความปลอดภัยของท่าน จึงส่งคนจำนวนมากออกไปตามหา

column2: {PlayerSurName} The young hero is my husband, can you let us in?
column3: จอมยุทธ์หนุ่ม{PlayerSurName}คือสามีของข้า ให้เราเข้าไปได้ไหม?

column2: Unexpectedly, it's Lord {Horse} who has graced us with his presence!\nPlease forgive my rudeness, please come in.
column3: ไม่คาดคิด เป็นใต้เท้าที่ให้เกียรติเราด้วยการมาของเขา!\nโปรดอภัยในความหยาบคายของข้า กรุณาเข้ามาด้านใน

column2: I am the newly appointed scholar {PlayerName}, invited by Duke Qi.
column3: ข้าเป็นบัณฑิตที่ได้รับการแต่งตั้งใหม่{PlayerName} ซึ่งได้รับเชิญจากอ๋องฉี

column2: So you are the distinguished guest of His Highness, I apologize for my rudeness, please come in.
column3: ท่านเป็นแขกผู้มีเกียรติของฝ่าบาท ขออภัยในความหยาบคาย โปรดเข้ามาข้างใน

column2: {PlayerSurName}'s performance in the Hero Convention really impressed me.
column3: ฝีมือของ{PlayerSurName} ในงานชุมนุมยอดยุทธ ทำให้ข้าประทับใจมากจริงๆ

column2: Don't make fun of me, I clearly lost miserably.
Not at all, your courage to face difficulties and never give up is admirable.
No, no, I was just lucky!
column3: ไม่ ไม่หรอก ข้าแค่โชคดีเท่านั้น!

column2: Whether it's luck or skill, I can tell at a glance, you don't need to be modest.
Although the Hero Convention has ended, there will be a Peak Swordsmanship Tournament here. If you are interested, you are always welcome.
column3: แม้ว่างานชุมนุมยอดยุทธจะสิ้นสุดลงแล้ว แต่จะมีงานชุมนุมวิจารณ์กระบี่ที่นี่ หากเจ้าสนใจ ข้ายินดีต้อนรับเสมอ

column2: Peak Swordsmanship? What are the rules, tell me about it?
The Peak Swordsmanship Tournament is arguably the biggest event in the martial arts world today.\nAll participants are top-notch martial artists from various sects or wandering the world.
The tournament is open all day, with no time limit.\nIt is divided into three levels, suitable for martial artists of different skills.
First is the "Shrimp" level, only the top disciples and young talents of each sect are eligible to participate.
Next is the "Chief" level, those eligible to participate in this level are all well-known in the martial arts world, or are heroes who can dominate one side.
Finally, there is the "Grandmaster" level, as the name suggests, only those who can establish their own sects are eligible to participate.
The competition method is the same as the Hero Convention, using an elimination system. If you can win <color=#c44b0e>ten</color> games in a row, you will be the leader of the current level.
column3: วิธีการแข่งขันจะเหมือนกับงานชุมนุมยอดยุทธโดยใช้ระบบคัดออก หากเจ้าสามารถชนะได้ <color=#c44b0e>สิบ</color> ครั้งติดต่อกัน เจ้าจะเป็นผู้นำในระดับปัจจุบัน

column2: However, if you are unlucky and fail to win, it doesn't matter, both the runner-up and the third place can get Swordsmanship Tokens that can be used to exchange for some rare materials.
Do you have any other questions?
column3: เจ้ามีอะไรจะถามอีกหรือไม่?

column2: Would you like to sign up for this Peak Swordsmanship Tournament?
Come find me when you are interested.
column3: มาหาข้าเมื่อท่านสนใจ

column2: Good, I wish you a successful start and victory in every battle.
Congratulations on your victory!\nDon't forget me when you become successful in the future~
Victory or defeat is a common occurrence in the military, don't be discouraged, just win next time.
I didn't expect this competition to attract the attention of legendary figures...
You were able to win the Grandmaster level! It seems that no one in the martial arts world today is your match.
You're just in time!\nYou helped us solve a big problem, I was just about to thank you.
I don't remember helping you with anything.
Did you recently encounter a stray cat nearby...
Oh, so it's about that.\nBut how did you know?
Although we are lowly people, our information is top-notch.\nEven though you were secretive, you were still discovered by those who are interested...
That stray cat was very cunning, it used to sneak into the kitchen to steal fish.\nYou helped us solve this problem, our business has improved a lot, thanks to you.
These things are not much, but please accept them.
Ah... what should I do?
column3: อา.. ข้าควรทำเช่นไรดี?

column2: You look worried, is there something bothering you?
Sir, you flatter me. To be honest, a wild cat has been sneaking into the kitchen to steal fish recently...
Cats naturally love fish, and it can't eat much. Why not prepare some kitchen scraps for it?
Ah, sir, you only know half of the story. That cat is very picky, it only eats the most expensive <color=#c44b0e>Golden carp</color>.
I didn't expect this cat to be a gourmet.\nCan't you just catch it or drive it away?
No use! The cat is very alert, it disappears as soon as we approach it.
Ah, sir, you seem to be quite capable. If you could help us deal with this wild cat, we at Sorrowless Tavern would be very grateful!
column3: เอ่อ, ดูเหมือนนายท่านจะมีความสามารถมากทีเดียว หากนายท่านสามารถช่วยเราจัดการกับแมวป่าตัวนี้ พวกเราที่หอสุราลืมทุกข์จะขอบคุณท่านมาก!

column2: Well... I'll give it a try.
Shopkeeper, I've dealt with the wild cat. You can rest assured now.
Shopkeeper, the wild cat won't come again. You can rest assured now.
Really? That's great!\nPlease accept these as a token of our gratitude.
Meow~
column3: เหมียว~

column2: What's going on? Why isn't it hiding from me anymore?
Meow~
column3: เหมียว~

column2: Did it smell the fishy scent on me?\nShould I feed it a fish?
(Reluctantly eats a few bites)
Meow--
column3: เหมียว--

column2: It doesn't seem very satisfied.
(Slowly finishes the fish)
Meow--
column3: เมี้ยว--

column2: This fish doesn't seem to appeal to it much.
Meow~ Meow~
column3: เมี้ยว~ เมี้ยว~

column2: Purr... Purr...
It seems to be enjoying it a lot, this fish seems to be to its taste.
Hey? Where are you going...
Meow~
column3: เหมียว~

column2: Are you saying this is for me?
I don't understand what you mean.
Meow~
column3: เหมียว~

column2: Are you thanking me for taking care of you for so long?
It's a small thing, not worth mentioning.
Cross-species communication is really hard.\nNow I know how important it is to master a foreign language.
The kitten left something behind and ran away. It seems it won't come back.
An animal ring! It's one of the twelve animal rings - The Mouse!\nThis cat is too amazing, where did it find it!
Indeed, good deeds are rewarded. It seems I need to do more good deeds in the future.
Meow~
column3: เมี้ยว~

column2: It seems to be craving the fish on me again.\nShould I feed it a fish?
Meow--
column3: เหมียว--

column2: It's full now, so it's not interested in the fish I brought.\nI'll come back in a few shichen.
What does it mean? It's not enthusiastic at all when it sees me, has it forgotten that I fed it?
This is... a copper ring engraved with a mouse?\nThe mouse is so lifelike, just like a real one. The cat didn't mistake it for a real mouse, did it?
Young man, young...
Are you calling me?
Yes, young man, come here...
What's the noise?
What's the matter?
I see that you, young man, are not of the same ilk as those bandits, so I have a favor to ask.
I was tricked by these bandits and ended up in this situation.\nCould you please inform Lord Lü Wenhuan of Chuxiang City about my situation and ask him to come and rescue me as soon as possible?
Our leader never catches innocent people. You must have been caught for a reason. Why should I help you?
I must confess to you, young man, that I have indeed done some wrongs in the past. But now, I have come to my senses and decided to start anew. I hope you can help me.
These bandits are lawless, daring to kidnap a court official!
You are indeed a reasonable and understanding person!
If you can save me, the <color=#c44b0e>10 taels of silver</color> on me will be yours.
(Should I agree to his request?)
Please take my token and inform General Lu to come and save me as soon as possible.\nI entrust my life and all my possessions to you!
Alas... it seems I am destined to die here.
Your heroic act of eliminating the Blue Wind Camp has truly moved me!\nYou are indeed a promising young hero!
Oh, you flatter me.
I was tricked by these bandits and ended up in this predicament.\nNow that the Blue Wind Camp has been destroyed, please let me out.
Of course.
Thank you for your help, Righteous. I will definitely spread your good name once I escape.
Hey, you don't even know my name, how can you spread my good name?
My apologies, may I ask for your name?
I am {PlayerName}!
Ah, {PlayerName}, a good name!\nI will remember it and I promise to keep my word.
Do you need anything?
column3: ต้องการสิ่งใดหรือไม่?

column2: (Should I tell him about the official who was tied up at the Blue Wind Camp?)
What did you say!\nHe actually joined the Blue Wind Camp?
column3: เจ้าพูดว่าไงนะ!\nเขาเข้าร่วมค่ายวายุครามจริงหรือ?

column2: What evidence do you have to make me believe you?\nSlandering a court official is a serious crime, you can't afford it!
Here is his Official seal!\nHe said he was tired of being an official and wanted to be a bandit for a few days, so he casually threw away his Official seal.
column3: นี่คือตราประทับทางการ!\nเขาบอกว่าเขาเบื่อที่จะเป็นข้าราชการและอยากเป็นโจรสักสองสามวัน เขาก็เลยโยนตราประทับอย่างเป็นทางการทิ้งไป

column2: This is indeed his Official seal!\nSince he disregards the dignity of the court, don't blame me for punishing him for colluding with bandits!
column3: นี่คือตราประทับทางการของเขาจริงๆ!\nในเมื่อเขาไม่คำนึงถึงศักดิ์ศรีของศาล อย่าโทษฉันที่ลงโทษเขาที่สมรู้ร่วมคิดกับโจร!

column2: {PlayerName}, to preserve the dignity of the court, I order you to go to the Blue Wind Camp and eliminate this official who colludes with bandits, and enforce justice!
There will be a great reward afterwards, but you must not leak any information.
Yes, sir!
Although I don't believe what you said, this Official seal is undoubtedly genuine...
column3: แม้ว่าข้าจะไม่เชื่อสิ่งที่คุณพูด แต่ตราประทับทางการอันนี้เป็นของแท้อย่างไม่ต้องสงสัย...

column2: Here's what, I'll give you a squad of soldiers, you go and rescue that useless official.\nIf you can rescue him, there will be a great reward. If you can't, don't show up in front of me again!
If you were not my man, I would have kicked you out.\nBut I trust my people, since you said so, it must be true.
Here's what, I'll give you a squad of soldiers, you go and rescue that useless official.\nIf you can rescue him, there will be a great reward. If you can't, don't show up in front of me again.
How dare you, slandering a court official is a serious crime!
I'll let you off this time considering your youth and ignorance.\nIf you dare to do it again, I will punish you severely!
You are incorrigible!\nGuards, kick this man out of the General's mansion!
How dare you, acting so recklessly in front of me, do you intend to assassinate me!

I, a humble citizen, dared to ask for help for the official who fell into the bandit's den, but now I am misunderstood by the general.\nIn that case, let that official fend for himself, I will take my leave.
Why act so impulsively, young hero?\nJust now, this general was merely testing you. After all, this is a matter of great importance and must be handled with caution.

{PlayerSurName}Young hero, this general entrusts you to lead a team of soldiers to the Blue Wind Camp for a rescue mission.\nOnce the mission is accomplished, this general will reward you accordingly.
Alright, I'll do my best.
What a presumptuous stray cat and dog daring to run wild in the General's mansion, you're asking for it!
If the general doesn't believe my words, are we really going to let those officials in distress fend for themselves?
{PlayerName}You have good intentions, you may leave if there's nothing else.
Get lost, this general's time is not to be wasted on the likes of you.
Damn, I accidentally killed him...\nI haven't even gotten the money yet, this is a big loss...
It turns out to be the official I saved ten days ago, he really kept his promise and sent 50 taels of money.
Young hero {PlayerSurName}, General Lü has ordered us to follow your command.\nWhat should we do now, please give your orders.
General {PlayerSurName}, we are all under your command.\nWhat should we do now, please give your orders.
{PlayerName}!\nI can't believe you're colluding with the court, I must be blind!
Leader, as long as you release the captured official, I will speak well of you in front of General Lu and spare your life.
That dog official is already dead, I don't mind sending you on your way too!
Shut your damn mouth!\nToday, I'm going to clean house myself!
Leader, this Blue Wind Camp is always against the court, it will be wiped out sooner or later.\nWe've known each other for a while, why not give this fortune to me.
Shut your damn mouth!\nToday, I'm going to clean house myself!
It's really lively in the stronghold today.\nBrothers, the court has sent people to deliver weapons to us again, let's give them a warm welcome.
Sir, come out, the Blue Wind Camp has been wiped out, you are free now.
It took you so long to rescue me, you're useless!
Hmph, back to the mansion!
Releasing such a person is a disaster, I should have killed him in the chaos just now.
This time I failed to rescue the official, I don't know how General Lu will punish me, I can only leave it to fate.
Yes, sir!

Under your instruction, the soldiers set fire to the trees around the stronghold.
The fire grew bigger and bigger, gradually surrounding and engulfing the entire Blue Wind Camp.
The heart-wrenching screams came from the direction of the Blue Wind Camp.
An hour later, apart from the sound of the fire burning everything, no other sound could be heard.
In this man-made fire, no one could escape.
The unknown Blue Wind Camp silently ended in this fire...
The mission is completed, let's go back to report, goodbye.
column3: ภารกิจเสร็จสิ้นแล้วข้าขอตัวกลับไปรายงานก่อน

column2: Yes, sir!
Under your instruction, a group of soldiers quietly sneaked into the Blue Wind Camp.\nAll the bandits guarding outside the house were cleanly killed.
The mission is completed, let's go back to report, goodbye.
column3: ภารกิจเสร็จสิ้นแล้วข้าขอตัวกลับไปรายงานก่อน

column2: Hero, over here, come here!
What's this noise again?
Hero, when will General Lu come to rescue me?
The general asks you to be patient, he will rescue you when the time is right.
Could General Lü be planning to sacrifice the pawn to save the king?\nI don't want to die, I still have a bright future, I haven't enjoyed enough of my beautiful wives and concubines...
Sacrifice the pawn to save the king? Do you know something?
No! Nothing at all, you heard wrong!
How did you get this PrisonKey?\nSo you mean I can Run away from this damn place on my Horse!
(This official wants me to save him, but General Lü wants me to kill him, what should I do?)
What!!!\nHow is that possible, General Lü wouldn't do that!
Do you know something about him? Is he worried about leaks and wants to get rid of you?
This...
General Lü promised me a great reward for accomplishing this task.\nI'm not interested in any secrets between you two, the more I know, the shorter I live.
column3: นายพลหลู่สัญญากับข้าว่าข้าจะได้รับรางวัลหากทุกอย่างทำได้ดี\nข้าไม่สนใจความลับใดๆ ระหว่างท่าน ยิ่งรู้มากเท่าไหร่ อายุยืนยาวก็ยิ่งน้อยลงเท่านั้น

column2: Wait, isn't it all about money!
I have plenty of money, as long as you let me escape, not only will I give you 10 Guan on the spot, but I will also give you <color=#c44b0e>50 Guan</color> in 10 days!
(Considering he's willing to pay for his life, should I let him escape?)
I can let you escape, but whether you make it out alive depends entirely on your own abilities.
Thank you, young hero, thank you!\nI promise you that the reward I promised will not be less!
Although there's money to be made, how am I going to explain this to General Lü...
I'm sorry, but I don't want to offend General Lü.\nSo I have to send you to the afterlife.
Lü Wenhuan, you despicable man, you actually wanted to silence me!
Lü Wenhuan is actually in cahoots with...
Uh--
The task is done, it's time to go back for the reward.\nI hope everything goes smoothly and there are no hitches.
Young hero, how did you get in?
Do you really need to bother General Lü with such trival matters?\nThe prison door is already open, you should hurry up and leave.
Are you kidding me!\nYou're asking me to go out now, isn't that suicide?
Just be careful not to be discovered by them, I don't have time to protect you.
No, no, I'd rather wait here for reinforcements.
If you want to wait, then wait, but if the reinforcements don't come, don't blame me.
Thank God, I really don't want to stay in this ghost place for a moment longer.
Hey, did you forget something?
Hehe, I won't forget, I won't forget.\nThe reward I promised you will not be less.
You officials really are rich, I can't even earn a few pennies even if I work my ass off.
What's the big deal, it's just the cost of a meal.
Oh~ You're getting rid of me with the cost of a meal, isn't this reward mismatched with your status?
I misspoke, I misspoke.\nYoung man, we'll meet again.
Why hasn't General Lü's reinforcements arrived yet...
The prison door is already open, why are you still waiting for his reinforcements? You should hurry up and leave.
How did the task I assigned you to Blue Wind Camp go?
Hmm, very good.\nAs the saying goes, a dying man's words are good, did he say anything before he died?
It seems he said something, but he died before he could finish.
I see...
column3: อย่างนี้นี่เอง...

column2: {yell} Help, there's an assassin!
What do you mean by this!
I can't trust you, General. Maybe you've been in cahoots with him all along!\nOnly when you're dead can I truly be at ease.
Hehehe, do you dare to kill me, General?
Let me tell you, the Iron Army of Yan Kingdom will soon march south. Without me, the hundreds of thousands of people in Chuxiang City will be reduced to ashes.
Damn it, using this to threaten me, what should I do?
Go to hell!
column3: ไปลงนรกซะ!

column2: Uh--
Sooner or later, you will all accompany me in death...
For the people of Chuxiang City, I will spare your life. I hope you will behave yourself!\nFrom now on, we will not interfere with each other!
{PlayerName}, you handled this matter very well, I am very satisfied.\nI always reward and punish clearly, this is your reward.
Missing?\nYou let him go, didn't you?
This...
Do you know what kind of person I hate the most in my life?
The last person who tried to deceive me, his grave grass should be half a person high now.
So what if I do?
I think, you should go and keep them company!
Report to me after the matter is resolved!
Well... forget it, I won't argue with you anymore.
What are you still doing here? Waiting for me to reward you?
Oh, I was wondering why I was restless in the middle of the night, turns out a handsome young man is passing by my door~
column3: อุ๊ย ข้าสงสัยอยู่ว่าเหตุไฉนข้าจึงนอนไม่หลับในค่ำคืนนี้ ที่ไหนได้ มีหนุ่มน้อยรูปงามคนหนึ่งกำลังผ่านประตูบ้านของข้านี่เอง~

column2: Young master, I'm alone at home in the middle of the night, I can't sleep because I'm scared~\nWhy don't you come into my room and give me some courage~
column3: คุณชาย ข้าอยู่บ้านคนเดียวในยามค่ำคืนเช่นนี้ มันช่างเงียบเหงาและน่ากลัวเหลือเกิน~ \nเหตุใดท่านจึงไม่เข้ามาห้องของข้าแล้วมอบความกล้าให้ข้าเสียหน่อยล่ะเจ้าค่ะ~

column2: Is there no one else in your house?
column3: ไม่มีใครสักคนอยู่ในบ้านของเจ้าเลยหรอ?

column2: You're joking, young master. Who in the city doesn't know that my husband passed away from illness three years ago?\nThese three years, I have been alone, living a lonely life...
column3: ท่านกำลังล้อเล่นอยู่สินะคุณชาย ในเมืองนี้มีใครบ้างที่ไม่รู้ว่า สามีข้าเสียไปเพราะอาการป่วยเมื่อสามปีที่แล้วกันล่ะ?\nสามปีนี้ ข้าใช้ชีวิตคนเดียวอย่างโดดเดี่ยว อ้างว้างเหลือเกิน...

column2: Alas, it's all your fault, young master, for bringing up my sad past. You have to take responsibility!\nCome in and talk to me.
column3: โธ่เอ๊ย ทั้งหมดนี้เป็นความผิดของท่านนะคุณชาย ที่ทำให้ข้าต้องเอ่ยถึงอดีตอันแสนเศร้า ท่านต้องมีส่วนรับผิดชอบ! ตามเข้ามาคุยกับข้าเดี๋ยวนี้เลยนะเจ้าค่ะ

column2: (What... should I do?)
column3: ("ข้า...ควรทำเช่นไรดี?")

column2: Tsk, all you talk about is morality, it's so boring.
column3: เชอะ พูดแต่เรื่องศีลธรรมอยู่ได้ น่าเบื่อชะมัด

column2: To avoid idle talk, I'd better stay away from this house.
column3: เพื่อหลีกเลี่ยงเรื่องไร้สาระ ข้าควรอยู่ให้ห่างจากบ้านหลังนี้เสียดีกว่า

column2: Young master, you're back? I knew you couldn't forget about me.\nYou must be tired from working all day, come in and rest your feet~
column3: คุณชาย ท่านกลับมาแล้วหรือเจ้าค่ะ? ข้ารู้ว่าท่านยังคงมิอาจลืมข้าไปได้ ท่านคงเหนื่อยล้าจากการงานมาทั้งวันแล้วกระมัง \nเชิญเข้ามาพักผ่อนก่อนสักครู่เจ้าค่ะ~

column2: (Here we go again, what should I do?)
column3: (อีกแล้วหรือเนี่ย ข้าควรทำอย่างไรดี)

column2: Please come in, young master~
column3: เชิญท่านเข้ามาด้านในเจ้าค่ะคุณชาย~

column2: {PlayerName}, we're not interested in entering a widow's house in the middle of the night, we'll wait for you outside.
column3: {PlayerName} พวกเราไม่ประสงค์ที่จะเข้าเรือนหม้ายในยามวิกาล พวกเราจะรอเจ้าอยู่ข้างนอก

column2: Young master, you have a strong physique~
column3: คุณชาย ท่านมีร่างกายที่บึกบึนมากเลย~

column2: It's this kid!\nI saw him sneaking around this widow's house, I knew he was up to no good!
No, no, it was her——
column3: ไม่ ไม่ มันเป็นนางนั่นแหละที่——

column2: Officer, please help me!
column3: ท่านเจ้าหน้าที่เจ้าค่ะ โปรดช่วยข้าด้วย!

column2: I was about to go to bed when this man suddenly broke into my house and forced me to share the bed with him.\nIf it weren't for you officers coming in, I might have...
column3: ในขณะที่ข้ากำลังจะเข้านอน ทันใดนั้น ชายผู้นี้ก็บุกเข้ามาในบ้านข้าและบังคับให้ข้าร่วมหลับนอนกับเขา หากไม่ใช่เพราะท่านเจ้าหน้าที่เข้ามาช่วย ข้าก็คงจะ...

column2: You sure know how to change your tune.
column3: เจ้านี่ช่างรู้จักเปลี่ยนท่าทีได้ไวเสียจริง

column2: Kid, the evidence is clear. According to the laws of our dynasty, breaking into a widow's house at night is a crime punishable by imprisonment!
column3: เด็กน้อย หลักฐานชัดเจนยิ่งนัก ตามกฎมณเฑียรบาลของเรา การบุกรุกเข้าไปในเรือนของหญิงหม้ายในยามวิกาล ถือเป็นโทษหนักต้องจำคุก!

column2: Hey, if you don't want to go to jail, you'd better pay the fine now!\nThere are so many witnesses here, you can't win this lawsuit no matter how far you take it.
column3: เฮ้ย! หากเจ้าไม่อยากนอนตาราง รีบจ่ายค่าปรับมาเดี๋ยวนี้! \nมีพยานพบเห็นเหตุการณ์อยู่ที่นี่มากมาย เจ้าไม่มีทางที่รอดตัวไปได้หรอก

column2: (I can't afford to lose face as a hero... What should I do?)
column3: (ข้ามิอาจยอมให้เสียหน้าในยุทธภพได้... ข้าควรทำเช่นไรดี?)

column2: You must be tired from wandering around, young master.
column3: ท่านคงต้องอ่อนล้าจากการออกเดินทางอยู่เป็นแน่สินะ คุณชาย

column2: Oh, my dear heavens!
column3: โอ้ ขอบคุณสวรรค์!

column2: You're finally here——
column3: ในที่สุดท่านก็มาเสียที——

column2: Fine, you're sensible. I'll let you off this time, now get lost!
column3: ดี ในเมื่อเจ้าสำนึกแล้ว ข้าจะปล่อยเจ้าไปสักครั้ง ตอนนี้ก็ไปให้พ้นซะ!

column2: I just suffered a big loss, I'd better not ask for trouble.
column3: ข้าเพิ่งพบกับความสูญเสียครั้งใหญ่ ไม่ควรหาเรื่องให้ตัวเองต้องลำบาก

column2: Tsk, with such little skill, you dare to fight? You're really making me laugh!
I'm sorry, here's the money, I won't dare to do it again.
Why suffer a beating when you could have paid earlier? You're really asking for trouble.\nGet out of here now.
Stop hitting me, I know I was wrong.\nThis is all the money I have on me, it's all yours.
Tsk, is this all the money you have? It's not even enough to fill my teeth!
Well, since I can't get any money today, I might as well beat you up to vent my anger!
<size=200%>No, don't——!</size>
With your level of skill, you dare to play the Immortal Jump?\nShame on you as law enforcers, knowingly breaking the law, isn't this a double crime?
column3: พวกเจ้ามีฝีมือแค่นี้ ยังกล้ามาหลอกลวงข้างั้นหรอ？พวกเจ้าช่างน่าละอายในฐานะผู้รักษากฏหมายเสียจริง \nจงใจละเมิดกฏหมายเองซะได้ นี่ไม่ใช่ความผิดร้ายแรงกว่าเดิมดอกหรือ?

column2: Hey, fatty, I remember you're from Young Master Lu's side, right?\nIf Young Master Lu knew you were involved in this business, what do you think he would do to you?
column3: เฮ้ย เจ้าอ้วน ข้าจำได้ว่าเจ้าเป็นคนของนายน้อยลู่มิใช่หรือ? \nหากนายน้อยลู่ล่วงรู้ว่าเจ้ามีส่วนพัวพันกับเรื่องนี้ เจ้าคิดว่าเขาจะลงโทษเจ้าอย่างไรกันล่ะ?

column2: This is what Young Master Lv taught me...
column3: นี่เป็นสิ่งที่นายน้อยลู่สอนข้า...

column2: The apple doesn't fall far from the tree.
column3: ถ้าหัวไม่ส่าย หางก็ไม่กระดิกสินะ

column2: So, how should we resolve this matter today?
column3: ดังนั้นแล้ว เราจะสะสางเรื่องนี้อย่างไรดีล่ะ?

column2: Good sir, I was wrong, I won't do it again!\nI've disturbed your good mood, sir. Please take this money as compensation.
column3: นายท่าน ข้าผิดไปแล้ว แล้วจะไม่ทำเช่นนั้นอีก! ข้าเสียใจเป็นอย่างยิ่งที่ข้าได้ขัดจังหวะความรื่นเริงของท่าน โปรดรับเงินนี้เป็นค่าชดเชย

column2: You may leave. If I catch you doing this kind of thing again, a little compensation won't solve the problem.
column3: เจ้าจงไปเสีย หากข้าพบเจ้าทำเช่นนี้อีก ค่าชดเชยเพียงเล็กน้อยย่อมไม่อาจแก้ไขได้"

column2: So you——
column3: แล้ว เจ้า——

column2: Young master! You have finally avenged me!
column3: คุณชาย! ท่านอย่าได้แค้นเคืองข้าเลยเจ้าคะ!

column2: It's all their fault, they forced me to do this, I didn't want to!
column3: ทั้งหมดเป็นความผิดของพวกเขา พวกเขาบีบบังคับให้ข้าทำเช่นนี้ ข้ามิได้มีความต้องการเลยแม้แต่น้อย

column2: Sir, you are skilled in martial arts and understand righteousness, you surely won't make things difficult for a suffering weak woman like me, right?
column3: คุณชาย ผู้มีทักษะวรยุทธ์อันสูงส่งและเที่ยงธรรม ท่านย่อมจะไม่ทำร้ายหญิงที่อ่อนแอเช่นข้าให้ต้องยากลำบากดอกใช่ไหมเจ้าค่ะ?

column2: You really are fickle.
column3: เจ้าช่างกลับกลอกเสียจริงนะ

column2: Sigh, as long as you don't seduce and deceive people in the future, I won't hold it against you.
column3: เฮอ หากเจ้าไม่ล่อลวงผู้คนอีกในภายภาคหน้า ข้าก็จะให้อภัยเจ้า

column2: Thank you, sir, for your magnanimity.
column3: ขอบคุณสำหรับความใจกว้างของคุณชายเจ้าค่ะ

column2: Young Master, it's getting late today, why not rest at my place for the night...
column3: คุณชายวันนี้ก็ดึกมากแล้ว เหตุไฉนไม่พักที่เรือนข้าสักคืนกันล่ะเจ้าคะ...

column2: I, I'd better decline...
column3: ข้า ข้าขอปฏิเสธดีกว่า...

column2: Young Master, how dare you come to find me...
I don't know why, I just came in inexplicably...
You again? Don't you have any memory?
Does this kid have a masochistic addiction?
We have a profit, not a loss.
Since you already have Experience, I won't waste words, be conscious and pay up.
What should I do?
column3: ข้าควรทำอย่างไรดี?

column2: Young Master, please sleep at my place tonight...
(She glared at you, shook her head and sighed, standing far away)
{PlayerName} Young hero, you are young but have achieved so much, your future is limitless.
I, Ding, have no son, only a daughter, who is the apple of my eye.\nNow my daughter is at the age of marriage, but there is no young master in Chuxiang City who is worthy of her.
Wait, you're not planning to—

The young hero is talented and handsome, and my daughter is a beauty. They are a perfect match.\n{PlayerName} If the young hero doesn't mind, I, Ding, would like to take you as my son-in-law, which would also ease my worries.
This lifelong matter can't be decided hastily, let me think about it.
I, Ding, am not in a hurry, the young hero can take his time to consider.
My daughter has suffered a misfortune, I, Ding, will definitely investigate the murderer and avenge her!
I, Ding, will give you money, but you must ensure that my daughter is not harmed.
I hope you can keep your promise and return my daughter safely as soon as possible...
Such a shameless person actually wants to marry into my Ding family, could it be that you are coveting my property? I, Ding, will never entrust my daughter to someone like you, give up this idea!
{PlayerName}Young hero, would you be willing to marry into my Ding family?
The Ding family is quite wealthy, marrying into the Ding family would at least not worry about money. The daily expenses of the young hero will be provided by the Ding family.
There is even a secret chamber in the house, filled with countless gold, which is also to be handed over to the son-in-law to manage.

If you form a good relationship with my daughter, you can still travel around, but <color=#c44b0e>don't have too much contact with other girls, otherwise you will be punished by the ancestors of the Ding family!</color>
Please think about it, young hero.
A good son-in-law is hard to find, I will wait here for your answer.
Even so, let's drop the matter, I won't mention it again.
This is a great joy!
I need some time to prepare for the wedding banquet, the auspicious time is set <color=#c44b0e>after Xu Shi and before Zi Shi</color>, please don't forget, son-in-law!
Don't worry, son-in-law, the auspicious time is set <color=#c44b0e>after Xu Shi and before Zi Shi</color>, there is still some time.
Sir, according to the rules, we can't see each other before we get married...
Being able to accompany you in this life, I am satisfied.
Would you be willing to accompany me for a lifetime, sir...
After getting married, sir, don't go flirting with other women, otherwise...
Congratulations on your new marriage!
The auspicious time has come, the wedding banquet is about to begin, I should be the only one missing.\nIt's not too late to back out now, do you decide to marry into the Ding family?
You have fulfilled your wish to marry into the Ding family, and finally have a place to settle down after half a lifetime of wandering.

Son-in-law, now that you have married into the Ding family, you can know the secret of the Ding family:\n<color=#c44b0e>Turning the two vases in the room can open the secret chamber of the Ding family.</color> From now on, it's up to you to manage.
Son-in-law, don't forget my advice to you, you are a married man, don't have ambiguous relationships with those women in the rivers and lakes, be careful of backlash!
You vaguely feel the complex gazes of the guests, jealousy, ridicule, hatred...
You face it calmly, because this is your own choice, you know the warmth and coldness.
Now is the auspicious time! Don't delay, the wedding banquet starts now!
The auspicious time has come! Don't delay, the wedding banquet starts now!
This is the key to the entrance of the secret chamber mentioned by my father-in-law, let me try it.
column3: นี่คือกุญแจสู่ทางเข้าห้องลับที่พ่อตาของข้าพูดถึง, ไหนข้าขอลองดูหน่อยสิ

column2: Husband, this is your home from now on.\nFrom now on, I am yours, you must not let me down.
Husband, how can you bring other women home?\nHave you forgotten my father's advice? Don't let down our Ding family!
Husband, I feel that you are getting colder and colder towards me, did I do something wrong?
Husband, this is the meal I cooked today, taste it and see how it is.
Husband, keep these drinks on you, they might come in handy when you visit friends.
Husband, how can you go out without money?\nKeep this money, don't spend it recklessly.
Husband, you have ambitions, I can't accompany you, I just hope you take care of yourself.
Husband, you must be tired after a day outside?\nIt's getting late, do you want to sleep at home tonight?
Take care of yourself, my lord. Don't overwork yourself.
A night has passed...
{PlayerName}, you dare to come back!
An eye for an eye, I have reported to the authorities, today I must avenge my father!
Do you have anything else to say?
I have nothing to say, if you want to kill me, just do it.\nIt's our fault for trusting you, a beast in human skin!
(What should I do?)
column3: (ข้าควรทำอย่างไรดี?)

column2: Father, your daughter has failed you...
We were once husband and wife, I don't want to be so ruthless.\nNext time I won't be merciful, don't bother me again.
{yell}{PlayerName}, I don't want to see you again!
This case only involves {PlayerName}, anyone else who interferes will be guilty as {PlayerName}!
Come at me all together, if I'm afraid of you, I'm not {PlayerName}!
{PlayerName}! You have committed a capital crime, the evidence is conclusive, if you resist, there is only one way to death!
{PlayerName} young hero, today is a special day, besides the regular arena, there is another Arena.
Another Arena? What kind of Arena is this?
A powerful figure is holding a martial arts competition for marriage here.
A powerful figure is holding a martial arts competition for marriage?\nTell me, how does this martial arts competition for marriage work?
The rules are similar to the Arena competition, you need to defeat ten competitors in a row, and pass the test of that powerful figure, then you can win the beauty.
This <color=#c44b0e> martial arts competition for marriage is held from Si Shi to You Shi every day</color>, and the regular arena will not stop.
column3: <color=#c44b0e>งานประลองเลือกคู่ จะจัดขึ้นทุกวัน ยามซื่อ(Si) ถึงยามโหย่ว(You) </color>และลานประลองปกติจะไม่หยุด

column2: In addition, the host is generous, so there is no registration fee for the competition, but each person only has one chance to participate, if eliminated, they cannot continue to register.
Did you hear that clearly?
What do you think? Are you interested in participating in this martial arts competition for marriage?
If {PlayerName} young hero is interested in this martial arts competition for marriage, please register with me during Si Shi to You Shi. If you miss the time, you will miss the chance of marriage.
column3: หากจอมยุทธ์หนุ่ม{PlayerName} สนใจงานประลองเลือกคู่ โปรดมาสมัครเข้าร่วมกับข้าในระหว่าง ยามซื่อ(Si) ถึงยามโหย่ว(You) หากพลาดเวลาก็จะพลาดโอกาสแต่งงานด้วย

column2: Good! I wish you success!
column3: ดี! ข้าขอให้เจ้าประสบความสำเร็จ!

column2: Alas, it's a pity, it seems this marriage is not destined for me.
column3: อนิจจามันน่าเสียดายดูเหมือนว่าการแต่งงานครั้งนี้ไม่ได้ถูกกําหนดไว้สําหรับข้า

column2: No, I can't just leave like this, at least I have to see the beauty of this young lady!
{yell} Who else is not convinced!
Congratulations to this hero for becoming the final winner of the martial arts competition for marriage!
What are we waiting for, bring out my future wife, let me kiss her.
What a cute girl!\nIt's a pity, a beautiful flower is stuck on cow dung.
Congratulations to this hero for winning the first place!\nWhether you can marry my daughter in the end, you still need to pass my daughter's test.
My daughter's test?\nCould this girl be the powerful figure the host mentioned?
column3: บททดสอบของนาง?\nเป็นไปได้ไหมว่าผู้หญิงคนนี้คือบุคคลสำคัญที่พิธีกรพูดถึง?

column2: Test? What a hassle, no test is a problem for me.
As long as the hero can take a punch from my daughter, he has passed my daughter's test.
What kind of test is this, it's too obvious that she's going easy on me.
Just one punch, simple, let the girl hit me!
Just being punched by such a weak girl, this guy is really lucky...
Be careful, brave man, it might hurt a bit...
Come on, pretty lady, after this punch, we'll go and worship heaven and earth!
Stop it~
What just happened! One palm, just one palm and this big guy was sent flying?!
Miss, why don't you hold back at all...
He just mentioned worshipping heaven and earth, and couldn't control himself...
I, I think I just saw my dead mother...
Did it hurt you?
{yell} You, you, you, don't come over!
column3: {yell} เจ้า เจ้า เจ้าอย่าเข้ามานะ!

column2: {yell} I'm not getting married! Not getting married! Whoever wants to marry, marry, I can't bear it!
Mother...
Miss, you've made such a big fuss, you should have had enough fun.\nLet's go back to Lin'an with the old servant, the master should not force you anymore.
Well... okay, at worst we'll sneak out again.
Who would have thought that this young lady, who looks so delicate, is so powerful.\nIndeed, you can't judge a book by its cover...
Congratulations to {PlayerSurName} young hero for winning the first place, this is my young lady.
(What a cute girl, this is a real bargain!)
I, {PlayerName}, have seen the young lady.
{PlayerSurName} Young master, may you be blessed.
column3: อาจารย์น้อย {PlayerSurName} ขอให้ท่านโชคดี

column2: Whether the young master can finally have the honor of marrying my young lady depends on the young lady's test.
The young lady's test?\nCould it be that this young lady is the big shot mentioned by the host?
As long as you can take a punch from the young lady, you will be the new master of the old servant.
It's so obvious that you're going easy on me, how can I be so shameless.
Be careful, young master, it might hurt a bit...
Hurt???
My apologies!
column3: ต้องขออภัยด้วย!

column2: Such a strong force, if it weren't for my sturdy body, I would have been blown away just now.
Young master, did it hurt you?
No, it didn't hurt, it's nothing!
Young master is really capable, he is indeed worthy of the young lady!
Wait, what's going on, why is your young lady so strong...

Young master, you have passed the young lady's test, now there is only one last step left.\nThe young master needs to present <color=#c44b0e>20 taels of betrothal gifts</color> to show his sincerity, so that the old servant can entrust the young lady to you with peace of mind.
Wait, did you just avoid my question?\nAnd you're asking for money as soon as you open your mouth, you're not a scammer, are you?

Don't worry, young master, the old servant has no such intention, and our family is not short of money.\nIt's just that the young lady has been pampered all her life, and the old servant is afraid that she will suffer with the young master.
(What should I do now?)
column3: (ตอนนี้ข้าควรทำอะไรดี?)

column2: This... young hero, can I have a word with you...
Actually, the young lady looks delicate, but she has Herculean strength and can't control herself, often accidentally hurting people.
The fact that the young master could take the young lady's punch is a sign of destiny...
What are you whispering about, can you include me?
Ahem, about the betrothal gift...
The young master is wealthy, and the young lady should not live a poor life with the young hero.\nThe old servant has a <color=#c44b0e>Lucky pill</color> here, as a gift to the two of you.
column3: นายน้อยมีฐานะร่ำรวย และหญิงสาวไม่ควรมีชีวิตที่ย่ำแย่กับจอมยุทธ์หนุ่ม\nคนรับใช้เก่ามี <color=#c44b0e>โอสถโชคสวรรค์</color> อยู่ที่นี่ เป็นของขวัญให้กับท่านทั้งสอง

column2: This is all the money I have on me, take it all...
The young hero's willingness to give all his money for the lady speaks volumes about his character. This old servant believes that the young hero will not mistreat the lady.
Well...
Young master...
column3: อาจารย์น้อย...

column2: Miss, you're here, we've been looking for you!
Princess, His Highness misses you very much and hopes that you can return soon.
He doesn't miss me at all, he just wants me to marry that Lu guy, I don't want to.
Princess... His Highness has his difficulties...
I don't care, if he wants to marry, let him marry himself.
The prince already knows about your martial arts competition for marriage here.
The prince ordered, if the princess refuses to return, I can only arrest all these related people to prevent them from spreading rumors and damaging the prince and the princess's fame.
What if he doesn't come?
If he doesn't come, it means that he is not the right match for the princess, and the lady doesn't need to worry about it.
In that case, I'll listen to you.
Young master, I'm sure you understand the situation now.\nThe lady can't go with you for now, this old servant needs to accompany her back to Lin'an to handle some matters.
Explain yourself! Who are you guys?
column3: พูดอย่างชัดเจน! เจ้าคือใคร?

column2: This young lady is Princess Fuqing, from Duke Kang's manor in Lin'an City.\nIf the young hero is fond of the lady, please come to Duke Kang's manor to propose marriage as soon as possible.
column3: สตรีผู้นี้คือองค์หญิงฟู่ชิงจากตำหนักอ๋องคังในเมืองหลินอัน\nหากจอมยุทธน้อยชื่นชอบองค์หญิง โปรดมาที่ตำหนักอ๋องคังเพื่อขอแต่งงานโดยเร็วที่สุด

column2: {PlayerSurName} Young master...
Congratulations! Oh my, I didn't expect that she is the princess of Duke Kang's manor!\nPrince consort, you're really lucky. Don't forget to take care of me in the future!
I've given the betrothal gifts, I won't give up.\nIsn't it just Duke Kang's manor? Princess, wait for me!
Miss, listen to this old servant.
Are you serious, young master?
I was a bit interested at first, but with all the fighting and paying, I've lost interest.
I'll just consider today as a day for exercise, let's forget about the marriage proposal.
You...you...
Young man, what you're doing is not right.
What's the right way then?
Everyone in the city knows this is a martial arts competition for marriage, you won, of course, you should marry her.
I don't want to marry, if you like her, you can marry her.
Sigh...
column3: เฮ้อ...

column2: Let's go, I want to go back.
Princess, sigh, alright...
Huh? Why am I lying here?
What happened?
Young hero, you're finally awake, you were knocked out by the lady's punch, I was afraid something happened to you.
A punch... I seem to remember...
Where are they?
That old steward saw that you couldn't even take a punch, he sighed and ran away with the lady.
Sigh, the good marriage that was within reach flew away...
Are you {PlayerName}? I've heard of your name and know your abilities.\nBut if you think I will let the princess marry you, it's a pipe dream!
Tell me, what do I have to do for you to agree to this marriage?
column3: บอกข้าว่าข้าต้องทําอะไรเพื่อให้ท่านเห็นด้วยกับการแต่งงานครั้งนี้?

column2: If you are sincere, bring me the treasure from the top of the Enlightment Tower.\nIf you can do it, I will recognize you as my brother-in-law.
You are a prince, isn't everything within your reach? Why do you want me to do this?
Although I am a royal noble, there are many constraints in doing many things.

According to the royal rules, the royal family is not allowed to marry commoners.\n{PlayerName}, if you help me with this, not only will I facilitate this marriage, but I will also personally arrange your wedding, making you the center of attention!
Deal!
The treasure on the top floor of the Enlightment Tower...\nCould this be the treasure that Duke Kang wants?
How is the progress?\nThat Enlightment Tower is not a place where ordinary people can enter.
Your Highness Duke Kang, I have brought you the thing you wanted.
The Seal of the Common People! It really is this treasure, finally it's mine!
column3: ตราประทับแห่งปวงชน! มันคือสมบัติชิ้นนี้จริงๆ ในที่สุดมันก็เป็นของข้า!

column2: This is a treasure? I can't see anything special about it.
Knowing too much can be harmful to you.

How did this thing end up in the hands of Tong Daofu? It seems that he is using it as bait to attract some powerful people in the martial arts world to serve Duke Qi, and even join his Imperial City Division.

Tong Daofu was once highly appreciated by the king. Since the king was trapped, the status of the Imperial City Division has plummeted, so he has to look for backers everywhere. He not only works for Duke Qi, but also for me. However, whether he is sincere or not, only he himself knows.
You let me know such a big secret, are you planning to kill me to keep it quiet?
{PlayerName}, do you think so little of me?\nYou are a rare talent, and now you are about to become my brother-in-law. How could I harm myself by hurting you?
Have you agreed to let the princess marry me?
What I promised will certainly be fulfilled!
Martial artists don't care about trivial matters. It's better to choose a day than to bump into it. How about getting married today?
Happiness came so suddenly, should I accept it right away?
I still need him, so I can't afford to fall out with him. That's why I asked you to steal the treasure. This way, no one would suspect that the treasure would end up in my hands.
Do you think the princess is not suitable for you, or do you feel that the position of being my brother-in-law is beneath you?
Your Highness, Duke Kang, please calm down. I still have some mundane matters to attend to, but I will make haste to arrive and marry the princess as soon as possible.
Good, don't keep me waiting too long.
Good, from this moment on, you {PlayerName} are my brother-in-law!
Duke Kang's manor is indeed luxurious and extravagant. The guests arriving for the banquet are numerous, and as far as the eye can see, they are all high-ranking officials and nobles.
column3: ตำหนักอ๋องคังนั้นหรูหรามากจริงๆ มีแขกหลั่งไหลมามากมายนับไม่ถ้วน เท่าที่ข้าเห็น พวกเขาล้วนเป็นเจ้าหน้าที่และขุนนางระดับสูง

column2: Amidst the congratulatory cheers of these people, you marry the Princess, Princess Fuqing.
column3: เจ้าสมรสกับองค์หญิงฟู่ชิง ท่ามกลางความยินดีจากผู้คนเหล่านี้

column2: A few days ago, you were just an insignificant figure, and now you are adorned in red, becoming the royal son-in-law.
column3: เมื่อไม่กี่วันก่อน, เจ้าเป็นแค่คนธรรมดาแต่ตอนนี้เจ้าสวมชุดสีแดงและกลายเป็นราชบุตรเขย

column2: Such a marriage seems like a farce yet feels destined. Regardless, what's done is done.
column3: งานสมรสนี้ดูเหมือนเป็นเรื่องตลกและดูเหมือนเป็นโชคชะตาด้วย อย่างไรก็ตามตอนนี้ล้วนเสร็จสิ้นพิธีแล้ว

column2: The gentle township is the grave of heroes. Will such wealth and honor hinder your future endeavors?
column3: เมืองที่อ่อนโยนคือหลุมศพของวีรบุรุษ ความมั่งคั่งและเกียรติยศดังกล่าวจะหยุดความก้าวหน้าในอนาคตของเจ้าหรือไม่?

column2: Today is just a new turning point in your life...
column3: วันนี้เป็นเพียงจุดเปลี่ยนใหม่ในชีวิตของเจ้า....

column2: How are you considering, will you marry the princess today?
Happiness comes so suddenly, should I agree right now?
Husband, you brought other sisters to Duke Kang's manor, aren't you afraid of being punished by my brother?
Husband, it's so boring to stay in the palace, when can you take me to experience the martial arts world?
Young Master {PlayerSurName}, I knew you would come to find me.\nHas my brother caused you any trouble? Did he mention any conditions to you?
column3: นายน้อย {PlayerSurName} ข้ารู้ว่าท่านจะมาหาข้า\nพี่ชายของข้าทำให้ท่านลำบากใจบ้างไหม? เขาได้กล่าวถึงเงื่อนไขใดๆ กับท่านหรือไม่?

column2: Brother Wang has has been trying to arrange a marriage for me with Lü Zixu from Chuxiang City, hoping to appease and win over the Pacifying Envoy, Lü Wenhuan. But everyone knows that Lü Zixu is a notorious playboy. How could I possibly marry him?
Hey, can you consider the feelings of the person involved when you're having a private conversation?
This martial arts competition is a bet I made with Brother Wang. He said that if anyone could take my punch without injury, he would no longer force me to do things I don't like.
Brother wasn't like this before. Ever since our father was taken away by the Yan army, Brother has become extremely eager for power and influence.
Although Brother Wang didn't punish me when I returned from the martial arts competition, the people who went with me were all driven out of the Wang's mansion. I got them into trouble.

I've sought many famous doctors for this strange strength of mine, but none of them could cure it. Brother Wang simply found some people to teach me martial arts, hoping that I could control this strange strength, but so far it hasn't been very effective.
For a girl to have this kind of strength, it's actually quite troublesome at times...
Husband, what place is this? It's so beautiful, I've never seen it before.
This is the God of Marriage's Shrine.
God of Marriage's Shrine? The matchmaker who ties the red thread for men and women all over the world?
Yes, young men and women who make a wish here can receive the blessing of the Moon Elder.
In that case, I also want to make a wish for the Moon Elder to bless us.
We're already married, do we still need his blessing?
What did you wish for, my lord?
As long as I know what I wished for, it's okay. If I say it out loud, it won't come true.
Hmm, hmm, I've heard others say that too, but I still wanted to tell you my wish.
Are you also from the Ye Family Battalion, miss?\nYou don't look like a general or a common soldier.
Are you also a visitor from the martial arts world who came to visit out of admiration, like me?
Admiration visit?\nHahaha, my father is far away in the sky and close at hand.
What, you are the daughter of Marshal Ye?
Hehe, I am indeed his unambitious daughter - Ye Yinping.
I am {PlayerName}, I apologize for my rudeness.
Ah-
column3: ฮะ-

column3: ฮะ--

column3: <size=150%>ฮัดชิ้ว!!!</size>

This is the moon...
No, no, I can't stay here!
Ah-

Alright, alright, I believe whatever you say, get up quickly, it's embarrassing to be seen by others.
From now on, I can't just do whatever I want anymore...
Whether it's the ends of the earth or the sky above, you're no longer alone, from now on, I'll be with you.
My name is {PlayerName}, may I ask how to address you, senior brother?
So it's junior brother {PlayerSurName}, my Taoist name is Chang Chunzi, I'm usually in charge of supervising the practice of swordsmanship among my fellow disciples.
I am {PlayerName}, may I ask how to address the Taoist master?

column2: I, Chang Chunzi, have met the young hero {PlayerSurName}.
Junior brother {PlayerSurName}, you have done many righteous deeds recently, which makes me proud.\nIf you need my help in the future, just come and find me.
When walking in the rivers and lakes, one should do more righteous deeds, which is the true nature of us Taoist Sect disciples.
Young hero {PlayerSurName}, you have done many righteous deeds recently, which I quite appreciate.\nIf you need my help in the future, just come and find me.
When walking in the rivers and lakes, one should do more righteous deeds, which is the true nature of us chivalrous people.
Only those who are truly righteous are worthy of my following, I can't stand those who are hypocritical.
I have nothing to say to you!
