column3: ขอบคุณสำหรับความเมตตาของผู้อาวุโส แต่ข้าสามารถดูแลตัวเองได้ ไม่จำเป็นต้องรบกวนท่านเลยแม้แต่น้อย

column2: Latter waves of the Yangzi River always push front waves ahead.
column3: คลื่นลูกใหม่ย่อมแรงกว่าคลื่นลูกเก่าจริงๆ

column2: Disciple {PlayerName} pays respects to the master.
column3: ศิษย์ {PlayerName} ขอคารวะท่านอาจารย์

column2: {PlayerName}... It's a worthy name for my first disciple, loud and imposing!
column3: {PlayerName}... คือชื่อศิษย์คนแรกของข้าสินะ, ช่างน่าประทับใจยิ่งนัก!

column2: Let me ask you, what's your ambition when you first ventured into the martial arts world?
column3: ขอถามเจ้า ปณิธานดั้งเดิมที่จะเข้าสู่ยุทธภพของเจ้าคือสิ่งใดกัน?

column2: My ambition is......
column3: ปณิธานดั้งเดิมของข้าคือ

column2: Hmm, indeed ambitious, you will definitely be extraordinary in the future.
column3: อืมม เป็นปณิธานที่ดี ในอนาคตเจ้าจะต้องไม่ธรรมดาแน่นอน

column2: Now that you've become my disciple, I will aid you on achieving your lifelong ambition. This way, our master-disciple relationship in this lifetime will not be in vain.
column3: ในเมื่อเจ้ามาเป็นลูกศิษย์ของข้าแล้ว ข้าจะช่วยให้เจ้าบรรลุปณิธานอย่างแน่นอน เพื่อไม่ให้ความสัมพันธ์ระหว่างอาจารย์กับลูกศิษย์ของเราต้องสูญเปล่าในชีวิตนี้

column2: May I ask for the name of my respected master?
column3: ศิษย์ยังไม่ได้ถามชื่อของท่านอาจารย์เลย?

column2: My name... you will learn it in the future. There's no need to ask for that at this moment.
column3: ชื่อของข้า... เจ้าจะได้รู้เองในวันหน้า ตอนนี้ยังไม่จำเป็นต้องถาม

column2: What is the name of our sect? I should at least know that.
column3: แล้วสำนักของเราชื่ออะไรล่ะ ข้าควรต้องรู้ไว้นะ

column2: Hmm, indeed, we should name the sect...
column3: อืมม จริงสิ เราต้องมีชื่อสำนักด้วยสินะ...

column2: Since your ambition is to be the best in the world, let's name our sect Unparalled Sect! \nOur sect's purpose is to wholeheartedly assist you in becoming the best in the world. Take a look at the unique trait I've designed for you.
column3: ในเมื่อปณิธานของเจ้าคือเป็นอันดับหนึ่งของยุทธภพ เช่นนั้นจงเรียกสำนักของเราว่า สำนักไร้เทียมทาน!\nจุดประสงค์ของสำนักเราคือการผลักดันเจ้าอย่างเต็มที่ เพื่อให้เจ้าเป็นยอดคนที่เก่งที่สุด มาดูความพิเศษของสำนักเราที่ข้าได้เตรียมไว้ให้เจ้ากันเถอะ

column2: Since your ambition is to unify the martial arts world, let's name our sect Heavenly Path Gang! \nOur sect's purpose is to wholeheartedly assist you in unifying the martial arts world and acting on behalf of Heaven. Take a look at the unique trait I've designed for you.
column3: ในเมื่อปณิธานของเจ้าคือการรวมยุทธภพเป็นหนึ่ง เช่นนั้นจงเรียกสำนักของเราว่า เส้นทางสวรรค์!\nจุดประสงค์ของสำนักเราคือการช่วยเจ้ารวบรวมยุทธภพและทำตามบัญชาสวรรค์ มาดูความพิเศษของสำนักเราที่ข้าได้เตรียมไว้ให้เจ้ากันเถอะ

column2: Since your ambition is to protect your family and defend your country, let's name our sect National Protection Society! \nOur sect's purpose is to wholeheartedly assist you in making meritorious deeds, protecting your family and defending your country. Take a look at the unique trait I've designed for you.
column3: ในเมื่อปณิธานของเจ้าคือ ปกป้องประเทศชาติและบ้านเกิด เช่นนั้นจงเรียกสำนักของเราว่า สมาคมพิทักษ์แผ่นดิน!\nจุดประสงค์ของสำนักคือการช่วยเหลือเจ้าในการสร้างความดีความชอบ ปกป้องประเทศและบ้านเกิดของเจ้า มาดูความพิเศษของสำนักเราที่ข้าได้เตรียมไว้ให้เจ้ากันเถอะ

column2: Since your aspiration is to be the best in the world, let's name our sect Wealthy Gate! \nOur sect's purpose is to wholeheartedly assist you in becoming the richest person in the world. Take a look at the unique trait I've designed for you.
column3: ในเมื่อปณิธานของเจ้าคือการเป็นคนที่ร่ำรวยที่สุดในโลก เช่นนั้นจงเรียกสำนักของเจ้าว่า ประตูมั่งคั่ง!\nจุดประสงค์ของสำนักเราคือการผลักดันเจ้าอย่างเต็มที่ เพื่อให้เจ้าเป็นคนที่รวยที่สุดในโลก มาดูความพิเศษของสำนักเราที่ข้าได้เตรียมไว้ให้เจ้ากันเถอะ

column2: Since your ambition is to to have numerous beauties, let's name our sect the Flower Sect!\nOur sect's purpose is to wholeheartedly assist you in becoming the best in the world. Take a look at the unique trait I've designed for you.
column3: ในเมื่อปณิธานของเจ้าคือการถูกรายล้อมด้วยสาวงาม เช่นนั้นจงเรียกสำนักของเราว่า สำนักบุปผา!\nจุดประสงค์ของสำนักเราคือการช่วยเหลือเจ้าอย่างเต็มที่ เพื่อให้เจ้าเป็นยอดคนที่เก่งที่สุด มาดูความพิเศษของสำนักเราที่ข้าได้เตรียมไว้ให้เจ้ากันเถอะ

column2: The sect's name is too random, and what's this 'unique trait' you mentioned!
column3: ตั้งชื่อสำนักมักง่ายไปไหมเนี่ย ความพิเศษของสำนักเราคืออะไรกัน!

column2: Don't be surprised, the name of the sect is just a code, it has no practical significance. Any sect will gradually decline and die after thousands of years. Instead of caring about the name of the sect, it's better to live in the present, work hard and become someone you could be proud of.
column3: ไม่เห็นจะแปลกอะไร ชื่อสำนักเป็นเพียงแค่ชื่อเรียก ในทางปฏิบัติมิได้มีความสำคัญใดๆ ไม่ว่าสำนักไหนๆเมื่อเวลาผ่านไปล้วนเสื่อมถอยและล่มสลาย แทนที่จะยึดติดกับชื่อสำนัก มิสู้อยู่กับปัจจุบันอย่างสง่าผ่าเผยดีกว่าดอกหรือ

column2: {PlayerName}, you are the eldest disciple of this sect, and the responsibility of revitalizing the sect falls on you. The position of the head of the sect will be yours sooner or later, don't think about it too early.
column3: {PlayerName} เจ้าเป็นศิษย์คนโตของสำนักเรา ความรับผิดชอบในการฟื้นฟูสำนักตกอยู่ที่เจ้าแล้ว ไม่ช้าก็เร็วตำแหน่งเจ้าสำนักย่อมเป็นของเจ้า จงอย่าได้วิตกเร็วเกินไป

column2: I wish you could pass it on to others, I feel a bit pressured as the founding disciple.
column3: ข้าหวังว่าท่านจะส่งมอบภาระนี้ให้ผู้อื่น ในฐานะศิษย์รุ่นแรก ข้ารู้สึกกดดันจริงๆ

column2: In the times ahead, master will be by your side and provide guidance when necessary. I won't reveal myself unless it's a matter of life and death, after all, the future of our sect relies on you.
column3: ต่อไปอาจารย์จะคอยอยู่เคียงข้างเพื่อชี้แนะเจ้าตลอดเวลา เว้นแต่จะมีสถานการณ์ความเป็นความตาย จึงจะไม่ยอมปรากฏตัวง่ายๆ เจ้าจะต้องยืนหยัดด้วยตนเองเพื่ออนาคตของสำนักเรา

column2: Master, master?
column3: อาจารย์ อาจารย์?

column2: Stop yelling, your master has many enemies and can't show up easily.
column3: หยุดโวยวายได้แล้ว อาจารย์ของเจ้ามีศัตรูมากมายจะปรากฏตัวพร่ำเพรื่อได้อย่างไร

column2: Disciple, do you plan to be a lone wanderer in the future, or will you invite several companions to venture into the martial arts world together?
column3: เจ้าลูกศิษย์ เจ้าคิดจะท่องยุทธภพคนเดียว หรือจะหาสหายร่วมท่องยุทธภพด้วยกันกับเจ้าล่ะ?

column2: Since you have made up your mind, master won't need to spend much more effort teaching you about social skills.
column3: เมื่อเจ้าคิดเช่นนี้ อาจารย์ก็จะไม่เสียเวลาสอนเจ้าเกี่ยวกับวิถีทางโลก

column2: If you want to stand out in the martial arts world, relentless violence will only leave you isolated and helpless. The martial arts world values interpersonal relationships. Having an extra ally means an increase in strength and one less enemy at the same time.
column3: หากเจ้าอยากยืนหยัดอยู่ในยุทธภพ การต่อสู้ฆ่าฟันไม่เลือกหน้าจะทำให้เจ้าตกอยู่ในสถานการณ์ที่โดดเดี่ยวและอับจนหนทาง ยุทธภพให้ความสำคัญกับการผูกมิตรกับผู้อื่น การมีผู้ช่วยเพิ่มคนหนึ่ง จะช่วยเพิ่มความแข็งแกร่งของเจ้า และในขณะเดียวกันก็ลดศัตรูลงไปหนึ่งคนด้วย

column2: Let me take the physician in this nameless village as an example for guiding you on how to build a relationship with him and eventually invite him to join your team and fight alongside you.
column3: ให้ข้าพาไปพบหมอในหมู่บ้านไร้นามแห่งนี้เป็นตัวอย่าง เพื่อแนะนำเจ้าว่าจะผูกมิตรกับเขาได้อย่างไร จากนั้นเชิญเขาเข้าร่วมทีมของเจ้าและต่อสู้เคียงข้างกัน

column2: The physician has a fondness for <color=#c44b0e>tea leaves</color>, which are sold by the peddler in the village. You can purchase some <color=#c44b0e>low-grade tea</color> from him to give as a gift to the physician.
column3: หมอชอบ<color=#c44b0e>ใบชา</color>ที่พ่อค้าเร่ขายในหมู่บ้าน เจ้าสามารถซื้อ<color=#c44b0e>ชาคุณภาพต่ำ</color>จากพ่อค้าเร่เพื่อมอบให้กับเขา

column2: I'll hand over all the money I have for your practice. If you run out of money, you'll have to hunt for game in the Lost Forest to earn more money.
column3: อาจารย์จะมอบเงินทั้งหมดให้กับเจ้าเพื่อฝึกฝน หากเงินหมด เจ้าสามารถไปที่ป่าสาปสูญเพื่อล่าสัตว์หาเงินได้

column2: The physician has a fondness for <color=#c44b0e>tea leaves</color>, which are sold by the peddler in the village. However, the peddler hasn't show up yet. You can purchase some <color=#c44b0e>low-grade tea</color> from him during the day to give as a gift to the physician.
column3: หมอชอบ<color=#c44b0e>ใบชา</color>ที่พ่อค้าเร่ขายในหมู่บ้าน แต่พ่อค้าเร่ยังไม่มาเลย เจ้าสามารถซื้อ<color=#c44b0e>ชาคุณภาพต่ำ</color>จากเขาได้ในระหว่างวัน เพื่อมอบเป็นของขวัญให้กับเขา

column2: I'll hand over all the money I have for your practice. If you run out of money, you'll have to hunt for game in the Lost Forest to earn more money.
column3: อาจารย์จะมอบเงินทั้งหมดให้กับเจ้าเพื่อฝึกฝน หากเงินหมด เจ้าสามารถไปที่ป่าสาปสูญเพื่อล่าสัตว์หาเงินได้

column2: Raise the Relations of Doctor {郎中·白头翁} to <color=#c44b0e>Close (Relations value 40)</color> through Gift. If Low-grade tea is not enough, you can wait for the Peddler to restock tomorrow and Buy more.
column3: พัฒนาความสัมพันธ์กับแพทย์ { 郎中·白头翁} โดยใช้ <color=#c44b0e>ของขวัญ (ค่าความสัมพันธ์ 40)</color> หากใบชาหยาบไม่เพียงก็รอให้พ่อค้ามาขายใหม่ในวันรุ่งขึ้น

column2: When your Relations with others reach a certain level, you may be asked to help complete some tasks. It's best to help others, as you may receive unexpected rewards.
column3: เมื่อความสัมพันธ์ของเจ้ากับผู้อื่นถึงระดับหนึ่ง เจ้าอาจถูกขอให้ช่วยทำบางอย่างที่ได้รับมอบหมายให้สำเร็จ ในเวลานี้ เป็นการดีที่สุดที่จะช่วยเหลือผู้อื่น เพราะเจ้าอาจได้รับผลตอบแทนที่ไม่คาดคิด

column2: Try to help the physician complete his tasks, as it is his long-held wishes.
column3: ลองไปช่วยหมอทำภารกิจของเขาให้สำเร็จ นี่เป็นความปรารถนาของเขามาหลายปีแล้ว

column2: You have fulfilled his wish, now you can <color=#c44b0e>Invite</color> him to join your team.
column3: เจ้าได้เติมเต็มความปรารถนาของเขาแล้ว ตอนนี้เจ้าสามารถ <color=#c44b0e>เชิญชวน</color> เขาเข้าร่วมกลุ่มของเจ้าได้

column2: Well, now that you have a physician who is good at healing in your party, the threats you might face in the future will be significantly reduced.
column3: ตอนนี้ เจ้ามีหมอที่เก่งในการรักษาในงานกลุ่มของเจ้าแล้ว ต่อไปภัยคุกคามที่เจ้าต้องเผชิญในอนาคตจะลดลงอย่างมาก

column2: Disciple, the <color=#c44b0e>Lost Forest</color> is a dwelling place for vipers and wild boars. It's an excellent place for you to enhance your cultivation in the early stages. Eliminating these beasts will earn you EXP, and as you accumulate it up to a certain level, you will level up.
First, level up to <color=#c44b0e>Level 10</color>, and then I will formally teach you the unique martial arts of our sect.
Keep this medicine with you, don't hesitate to use it.
column3: รับยานี่ไป อย่าลังเลที่จะใช้มันล่ะ

column2: Well done, well done. My disciple is indeed extraordinary. It's time for you to start practicing our sect's martial arts now.
column3: ดี ดีมาก ศิษย์ของข้าไม่ธรรมดาจริงๆ ถึงเวลาที่เจ้าจะได้เรียนรูวรยุทธของสำนักเราแล้ว

column2: I'm responsible for developing our sect's martial arts. They were developed through combining the strengths of various martial arts into a cohesive whole. It is believed that one technique can encompass all techniques. Although our sect's martial arts primarily focus on fist and palm techniques, they also confer substantial benefits to other forms of martial arts!
column3: วรยุทธของสำนักเราถูกคิดค้นโดยท่านปรมาจารย์ โดยหลอมรวมจากวรยุทธหลายแขนง กล่าวกันว่าหากเข้าใจเพียงหนึ่ง ก็จะสามารถเข้าใจได้ทั้งหมด แม้ว่าวรยุทธของเราจะเป็นวิชาหมัดและฝ่ามือ แต่ก็มีประโยชน์อย่างมากเมื่อสู้กับวรยุทธอื่นๆ!

column2: I will now officially impart our sect's martial arts to you. You must practice diligently and not slack off. I hope that in the future, you can bring glory to our sect, so that my efforts can be passed down to the next generations.
column3: ตอนนี้อาจารย์จะสอนวรยุทธให้ เจ้าต้องหมั่นฝึกฝนอย่าได้เกียจคร้าน ข้าหวังว่าเจ้าจะนำพาสำนักเราให้เจริญรุ่งเรืองในอนาคต เพื่อสืบทอดปณิธานของอาจารย์ต่อไป

column2: Don't forget to <color=#c44b0e>locate this manual in the [Item] section, select 'Learn,' and then you can level up in actual combat.</color> Once you've practiced this palm technique to the sixth level, you can learn the internal strengths of our sect.
column3: จงอย่าลืม<color=#c44b0e>ค้นหาตำรานี้จาก【สิ่งของ】เลือกตำราเรียน แล้วเจ้าจะสามารถเพิ่มระดับได้จากการสู้จริง</color> เมื่อเจ้าฝึกฝนวิชาฝ่ามือนี้ถึงระดับหนึ่งแล้ว เจ้าจะสามารถเรียนวิชากำลังภายในของสำนักต่อไปได้

column2: Good lad, you are now qualified to practice our sect's internal skill, and I shall teach you now.
column3: เจ้าลูกศิษย์ทำได้ดีมาก ตอนนี้เจ้ามีคุณสมบัติที่จะเรียนวรยุทธ์ภายในของสำนักแล้ว และข้าจะสอนเจ้าเดียวนี้

column2: Learning martial arts is like rowing upstream; if you don't advance, you'll regress. You can't slack off for a day.\nGo and practice the 'Sigh Method' I just taught you to the sixth level.
column3: การเรียนรู้วิทยายุทธก็เหมือนกับการแล่นทวนกระแสน้ำ ถ้าไม่ก้าวหน้าก็จะถอย เจ้าไม่สามารถหย่อนยานได้สักวัน\nไปฝึกฝน "เคล็ดปรับลมปราณ" ที่ข้าเพิ่งสอนเจ้าให้ถึงระดับที่หก

column2: Now, to test if you have truly made progress, I will assign you an important task!
Suddenly, speaking so seriously, I have a bad feeling about this.
There is a red-haired wild boar in the depths of the Lost Forest. Go and kill or subdue it to prove your current strength.
Before attempting this task, it's best to <color=#c44b0e>level up to Level 20</color>, so you won't be at too much of a disadvantage and have no chance of defending yourself.
Master, I have completed the "important task" you assigned me. What reward will I get this time?
Master? Master! Master~~~~
column3: อาจารย์? อาจารย์! อาจารย์~~~~

column2: Oh, you're so noisy. You've done such a trivial thing and you're disturbing my dream. You're really unfilial!
(Master is really grumpy when he wakes up.)
Take this manual and practice diligently. If you can master it, the lowlifes in the martial arts world won't pose much of a threat to you.
Since you have completed the task arranged by the master, there is naturally a special benefit...

The <color=#c44b0e>Bandit Chief Stronghold</color> in the Nameless Region is a menace to the community and ravages the neighbors. As the founding elder disciple of this sect, you have the responsibility to eliminate these demons that harm the world!
column3: <color=#c44b0e>ค่ายหัวหน้าโจร</color> ในพื้นที่ไร้นามกำลังสร้างปัญหาและสร้างความเดือดร้อนแก่เพื่อนมนุษย์ ในฐานะศิษย์อาวุโสผู้ก่อตั้งสำนัก เจ้ามีหน้าที่รับผิดชอบในการกำจัดมารร้ายที่ก่อความวุ่นวายในยุทธภพเหล่านี้!

column2: Master, you seem to have forgotten something. \nDidn't I already wipe out this Bandit Chief Stronghold?
column3: อาจารย์ ดูเหมือนท่านจะลืมอะไรบางอย่าง\nค่ายหัวหน้าโจรนี้ถูกข้ากวาดล้างไปแล้วไม่ใช่หรือ?

column2: Ah, well done! I'm very pleased to see that you have such a righteous heart, my disciple.
column3: โอ้ ทำได้ดีมาก ลูกศิษย์ของข้า ข้าดีใจมากที่เห็นว่าเจ้ามีใจคุณธรรมเช่นนี้

column2: Master, you've only had me kill a few snakes and wild boars before, but now you want me to wipe out a bandit camp. Are you trying to end our sect?
column3: ท่านอาจารย์ ท่านเคยให้ข้าฆ่างูและหมูป่าเพียงไม่กี่ตัวเท่านั้น แต่ตอนนี้ ท่านต้องการให้ข้ากวาดล้างค่ายโจร ท่านกำลังพยายามที่จะยุบสำนักของเรางั้นหรือ?

column2: Is the Frost Fist taught by the master just for show? If you can't even destroy a nameless bandit den, you'd better go home and stay away from the Martial World.
column3: หมัดเหมันต์ที่อาจารย์สอนไม่ใช่เพียงเพื่อการแสดง? หากเจ้าไม่สามารถทำลายค่ายหัวหน้าโจรได้ เจ้าควรกลับบ้านและอยู่ให้ห่างจากยุทธภพจะดีกว่า

column2: With the Bandit Camp easily wiped out, Master, if you know of any other bandit hideouts or thief dens, please let me know, and I'll eliminate them one by one, for the sake of the people!
column3: เมื่อค่ายหัวหน้าโจรถูกกวาดล้างอย่างง่ายดาย ท่านอาจารย์ถ้าท่านรู้จักค่ายโจรหรือรังโจรอื่นๆ โปรดบอกข้า แล้วข้าจะกำจัดพวกมันทีละคน เพื่อกำจัดภัยคุกคามเหล่านี้ให้ผู้คน!

column2: Just because you've wiped out a group of insignificant bandits and you're already getting ahead of yourself? Not to mention that there are always bigger fish to fry, not all bandits and thieves in this world are bad people. Many of them have been forced by the authorities to take up such a path.
If you can't distinguish between good and evil and resort to brute force, aren't you ultimately aiding the wicked?
They don't have labels on their faces indicating who's good or evil. How should I distinguish between them?

Reading ten thousand books is not as good as traveling ten thousand miles, and it's the same for us martial artists. We shouldn't just focus on martial arts but also need to travel to various places, experience the hardships of the common people, Then you will gradually understand how to distinguish things for yourself.
Where are we going to travel now?
First, let's go to the Nameless village and find the Coachman. Have him take us to <color=#c44b0e>Chuxiang City</color> for a visit. It's been a while since master lived comfortably.
Aren't we supposed to walk ten thousand miles? Although riding a horse carriage is convenient, won't we miss a lot of the scenery along the way?

Master has worked hard for half of his life and doesn't want to waste time in such a meaningless place. If you don't mind the effort, you can capture a pet to use as a means of transportation. It might even be faster than a carriage.
I forgot to tell you, it will take some time for the Coachman to arrive. In the meantime, you can go to the Lost Forest to practice your skills, so you'll be prepared for the future.
I have finally returned to Chuxiang City. I wonder if my old friends are still the same as before...
Disciple, since we're in Chuxiang City, let's go visit an old friend with your master.
column3: เจ้าลูกศิษย์ พวกเรามา ถึงเมือง  Chuxiang City แล้ว พวกเราไปหาเพื่อนเก่าของอาจารย์เจ้ากันเถอะ

column2: Who is this old friend of yours, Master?
column3: ท่านใดคือ เพื่อนเก่าของท่านอาจารย์?

column2: Back then, he was just an insignificant figure, but now he's the pacifying envoy that is responsible for guarding the city.
column3: เมื่อก่อนเจ้านั้นเป็นเพียงบุคคลไม่สำคัญ แต่ตอนนี้เขาคือทูตความสงบสุขที่รับผิดชอบในการปกป้องเมือง

column2: Where can we meet this pacifying envoy?
column3: เราจะพบทูตความสงบสุขท่านนี้ได้ที่ไหน?

column2: You'll probably find him in the General's mansion in Chuxiang City, but with your current status, it might not be easy to meet him. Try to adapt to the situation accordingly.
column3: เจ้าอาจพบเขาในทําจวนแม่ทัพในฉู่เซียง แต่ด้วยสถานะปัจจุบันของเจ้า อาจไม่ใช่เรื่องง่ายที่จะพบเขา พยายามปรับตัวให้เข้ากับสถานการณ์ให้เหมาะสม

column2: General Lü, long time no see.
Who are you... Identify yourself!
"Obtaining shelters of ten thousand spacious houses, protecting all the poor smiling scholars under the sky!"
The sorrow and joy finger method, you are, you are Yan Gexing!!!\nIt's been many years, and you've changed so much.
(So Master's real name is Yan Gexing, why didn't he tell me before?)
What brings you here?

Back then, it was you who invited my second senior brother to a feast in Chuxiang City, and after that, he went missing. Meanwhile, you became the pacifying envoy of Chuxiang City. This is the reason I've come to see you today.

Yan Gexing, times have changed. Who in the martial arts world doesn't know that you've lost all your martial skills, and your meridians are ruined? In the past, you and your brothers were invincible, but now, hehe...
If I capture you, I can exchange favors with those martial arts sects.
My disciple, they want to capture me to exchange favors, what do you think?
Whoever dares to disrespect you will have to pass me first!
I didn't expect the pretty boy to be quite powerful.\nSir, how about letting us to play with him?
Beauty, this kid has received Yan Gexing's true teachings, you have to be careful, don't hurt yourself.
Thank you for your concern, my lord.
I'm incompetent; please punish me, my lord.
The beauty is innocent. Quickly, go and rest aside.
Yan Gexing, I never expected a wastrel like you would take in such a prominent disciple. It seems like you intend to accomplish some tasks through this disciple of yours, don't you?
Indeed, this young one has unlimited potential. The things I couldn't achieve in the past, he might be able to accomplish.

The incident back then was orchestrated by Cai Yuanchang of the Confucius Temple, all the three religious sect was invovled as well. Your senior brother was ambushed by them, defeated. However, I've no idea about his whereabouts.
Aren't you planning to capture me and hand me over in exchange for their favor?
Now that I am living a life of luxury, why should I get involved in your messy affairs, don't bother me in the future.
Disciple, don't disturb General Lü's indulgent life in his paradise. Let's go.
I don't know where the three religions have taken my senior brother. The matter of Nine Factions Sect still needs my senior brother to solve.
At this point, it is necessary to go to Confucius Temple as soon as possible.
Master isn't able to come forward, so I need you to inquire Cai Yuanchang whether he knows about the whereabouts of Chu Kuangsheng.
Where did this junior come from? How dare you trespass into the Confucius Temple!
What brings Young Master {PlayerSurName} to the Confucius Temple?
I'm here to seek for information about the whereabouts of Chu Kuangsheng.
Where did you hear this person's name?
No comment, I was commissioned to inquire about this person's whereabouts.
It's no harm to tell you, he is being held in <color=#c44b0e>Lin'an City Yunlin Temple</color>, and I will take you to see him soon!
{yell} Come here, catch the remnants of the devil!
I have a feeling you wouldn't readily share his whereabouts.
Because I'm about to take you to meet him, there's no need to hide anything.
Not good!
Your kung fu seems a bit familiar, could it be...
Step back, my disciple!
Yan Gexing, you're still alive!
I didn't expect you to recognize me in the end.

You sent this little one to inquire about that person's whereabouts, didn't you? Even if I let you know, what's the use? You think you are capable of saving that person? Besides, do you think I will let you leave?
How dare a puny dojokeeper from Confucius Temple show off in front of me.
Let's go!
It turns out to be bluffing...
As expected, there's not much left of your skills...
Master, what should we do next?

Since our whereabouts have been exposed, we can't be foolish enough to go to the Yunlin Temple.\nYou need to quickly enhance your cultivation, master on the other hand needs to eliminate the injury on his body.
How do you plan to rid yourself of the injury?
Over these years, master has traveled extensively and has already learned a way to eliminate his injury. However, due to a lack of reliable escorts, he has not been able to make the trip.
Your strength and character are passable. Now that I have accepted you as a disciple, whether the master can achieve Nirvana restoration this time depends on you.
Before this long journey, let's go back to <color=#c44b0e>Nameless village</color> first. The master once left some things there, and it's time to take them out.
Disciple, do you find this stone tower a bit strange?
Don't see anything unusual?
Ya—Hei—
Master Yan, this old monk has been waiting for a long time!
Hmph, I thought there would be a grand welcome for me. It seems that my reputation is about to be forgotten. Well, let me play with you today!
Master, you are still recovering from your injuries, can you handle it?
Master spends his days eating, sleeping, and enhancing his cultivation, which is not comparable to ordinary people. Today, let me show you the master's methods!
Master Yan's skills are indeed extraordinary, but there are more than just us monks blocking your way...

Master has a premonition that this trip will not be smooth sailing, and you may encounter some difficult enemies. Your cultivation level must reach at least <color=#c44b0e>level 70</color> to barely cope.
Disciple, this step is unpredictable, your current cultivation level is shallow, do you really want to enter the temple?
(With my current strength, the master thinks that my cultivation is shallow. Do I need to reach level 70 or 80 to be sure? Should I insist on entering Yunlin Temple now?)
column3: (ด้วยความแข็งแกร่งของข้าในปัจจุบัน อาจารย์คิดว่าการฝึกฝนของข้ายังตื้นเขินเกินไป ข้าจำเป็นต้องเร่งฝึกไปถึงระดับ 70 หรือ 80 เพื่อให้แน่ใจหรือไม่? ข้าควรยืนกรานที่จะเข้าสู่วัดป่าเมฆาตอนนี้หรือไม่?)

column2: Since you are so determined, be extra careful.
Master, master, how are you?
Disciple, you finally came out... Did you save the person?
I, as a disciple, was incompetent, and uncle master has succumbed to his internal demons, and perished due to an explosion of his own body.
{yell} What, what did you say!!!
Second senior brother, why do you have to compete with me for everything, even death, why do you have to die before me...
column3: ศิษย์พี่รอง, ทำไมท่านต้องแข่งขันกับข้าเพื่อทุกสิ่ง แม้แต่ความตาย ทำไมท่านต้องตายก่อนข้า...

column2: Disciple, your master can't hold on any longer, I'm going to follow your uncle master. When I took you as a disciple, I planned to make you surpass your uncle master, to show him that the disciple I trained is a thousand times stronger than his disciple...

Your master and your uncle master were as close as brothers, but because of the past, there was a rift between us. We had different philosophies, and eventually went separate ways, leading to today's disaster...
Cough, cough, cough...
column3: แค่ก แค่ก แค่ก...

column2: Before master leaves, I'll leave you a memento...
One should worry before everyone's concern, and enjoy after everyone's rejoice—
Thinking of the vastness of the world, I can't help but shed tears in solitude—
With this move in your arsenal, there are few in the martial arts world who can match you. Your master can now leave with a peace of mind...
<size=200%>Master—</size>
If I hadn't rushed out in time, your old life would have been lost!
Hehe, my senior brother can't bear to see me die, our bet is not over yet.
{PlayerName}, come and kowtow to your uncle master.
Junior {PlayerName}, pay his respects to uncle master.
The boy you took in has extraordinary roots and a temperament that suits my taste. If one day you kick him out of the sect because you don't like him, I'll take him in.
Dream on, I'm counting on him to take care of me in my old age.
Senior brother, you have been imprisoned for these years and know nothing about the outside world. Do you know what the Nine Factions Sect has become now?
Junior brother, are you still thinking about the position of the Nine Factions Sect? Are you still holding onto some resentment from back then?
Pah, who cares about this crappy position. I just can't bear to see it ruined!
It seems you still have prejudice against my disciple!

Senior Brother! Over the years, you've been imprisoned and cut off from the world. The Nine Factions Sect is now causing chaos and wreaking havoc everywhere. If we don't take action, it will surely lead to a great disaster!
Sigh... still this bad temper.
Master and Uncle Master seem to have a deep connection with the Nine Factions Sect. What exactly is this Nine Factions Sect?

The Nine Factions Sect was originally created by your master and uncle master to shelter the poor and unfortunate children across the world. But eventually, the Nine Factions Sect became a gathering place for all kinds of people, causing trouble everywhere, stirring up trouble for fear of the world not being chaotic.

Master and your Senior Uncle had a disagreement over the future direction of the Nine Factions Sect, and were forced to run away. Since then, the Nine Factions Sect has become increasingly reckless, even disregarding the three schools, and has finally been suppressed by their joint forces.

Your uncle master was obsessed with martial arts, disinterested in managing the Nine Factions Sect, and left everything in the care of his disciple. Unfortunately, his disciple, although expanding the Nine Factions Sect, also led it into an irreparable situation.
Now, master can no longer allow Nine Factions Sect to run rampant, it's time to clean up Nine Factions Sect and return it to its original essence.
The disciple will do everything possible to help Master achieve his wish!
Our master-disciple relationship is a matter of fate, we won't have many opportunities to be together in the future, I want to leave you with some memories, so as not to leave regrets later...
Disciple, watch carefully~
Burp~~~
With this move in your arsenal, there are few in the martial arts world who can match you.

The location of the Nine Factions Sect's main hall has been moved multiple times, and even Master doesn't know its whereabouts now. Your team is full now, so Master will return to the Nameless Village first. If you find out the location of the Nine Factions Sect's main hall, don't forget to inform Master.

The location of the Nine Factions Sect's main hall has been moved multiple times, and even Master doesn't know its whereabouts now. We are weak and can only hope that those well-informed forces can help us find clues.
May I ask if the clan leader knows where the Eternal Spring is located?
Given our relations, I don't want to reveal such important information to you.
Hehe, the Eternal Spring is at the end of the Melody House. Cross a pavilion, and you'll see it. If you see something you shouldn't, it's up to your luck.
May I ask if Lady Caidie knows where the Eternal Spring is?
Caidie seems to have overheard brother mentioning the "Eternal Spring", but Caidie doesn't know where it is.
May I ask if the abbess knows where the Eternal Spring is?
Huh? You dare to inquire about the Eternal Spring. Are you trying to die?
May I ask if Lady Qingcheng knows where the Eternal Spring is?
I'm sorry, Young Master {PlayerSurName}, this matter cannot be disclosed.
The Eternal Spring is at the end of Melody House, just beyond a pavilion. However, I advise Young Master {PlayerSurName} not to go there casually.
Hmm, the Eternal Spring... I seem to have heard the abbess mentioned about it, but I can't quite remember.
The place ahead must be the legendary Eternal Spring. It seems inconvenient now, let's wait a while before we come.
This must be the legendary Eternal Spring...
Disciple, go and keep a lookout for your master. Your master needs to heal his injuries.

The highest good is like water. Water benefits all things and does not compete with them. It dwells in places that all dislike. Therefore it is close to the Way. Living in a good place; Heart remains calm yet unfathemable; Treating others with kindness and sincerity; Words are trustworthy; Governance with simple dealing; Matters are solved by utilizing talents; Movement is timely. Only by not competing, there is no mistakes nor blames...
Ah--Ha!!!
Congratulations, Master, congratulations, Master!

To go to the southwest, you need to pass through the <color=#c44b0e>West Border Patrol</color> of the Nameless area. The guards there are somewhat unreasonable, it's best not to have a conflict with them.
The master is no longer there, and now I am the only one left in the sect. Should I continue to persist for this sect?
column3: อาจารย์เองก็ไม่อยู่แล้ว และข้าก็เป็นคนเดียวที่เหลืออยู่ของสำนัก ข้าควรคงสำนักไว้ต่อไปไหม

column2: What does it matter to me to glorify the sect? The ambition I promised to the old man was just nonsense when I was hot-headed, who would remember it?
How could I possibly hang myself on a tree, there are more and stronger martial arts waiting for me in other sects!
Even if I am the only one left in the sect, for the sake of my master's legacy and the ambitions I promised to fulfill to my master, I will persevere!
I heard that someone at <color=#c44b0e>Hotel Prosperous</color> is discussing the <color=#c44b0e>Chu Xiang Hero Meeting</color>, you go and find out what this Hero Meeting is all about.
column3: ได้ยินคนที่ <color=#c44b0e>โรงเตี๊ยมรุ่งโรจน์</color> คุยกันเรื่อง <color=#c44b0e>ชุมนุมวีรบุรุษแห่งฉู่เซียง</color> เจ้าลองไปดูว่าชุมนุมที่ว่านั้นคืออะไร

column2: Disciple, this is a great opportunity for you to show your face, you must win the championship of this Hero Meeting!
column3: ศิษย์ข้า นี่เป็นโอกาสอันดีที่เจ้าจะได้สร้างชื่อ เจ้าต้องเป็นผู้ชนะของงานชุมนุมนี้ให้ได้!

column2: A good teacher produces a good student, my first disciple is not comparable to these mediocre people.
column3: อาจารย์ที่ดีย่อมสั่งสอนศิษย์ที่ดี ศิษย์คนแรกของข้าย่อมเหนือกว่าคนทั่วไปพวกนั้น

column2: Today you won the championship in the field, taking this opportunity, the master will teach you a second-class finger method to add icing on the cake!
column3: วันนี้เจ้าได้เป็นผู้ชนะ เป็นโอกาสอันดี อาจารย์จะสอนวิชาดรรชนีขั้นที่สองแก่เจ้าเพื่อให้นี่เป็นโอกาสที่ดียิ่งไปอีก!

column2: Disciple, do you know what is the most famous place in this Lin'an City?
column3: ศิษย์ข้า เจ้ารู้หรือไม่ว่าสถานที่ใดมีชื่อที่สุดในเมืองหลินอัน

column2: How would I know, it's my first time here.
column3: ข้าจะรู้ได้ยังไง นี่เป็นครั้งแรกที่ข้ามาที่นี่นะ

column2: It's the most famous place for entertainment and pleasure in Wu Yue - Maiden House.\nWhen I was young, tsk tsk...
So Master is a regular customer there.
column3: ที่แท้อาจารย์ก็เป็นลูกค้าประจำนี่เอง

column2: Nonsense, I was handsome when I was young, I didn't need to go to such places!
column3: ไร้สาระ สมัยหนุ่มๆข้าน่ะรูปงามขนาดไหน ไม่จำเป็นต้องไปสถานที่เช่นนี้หรอก!

column2: When one reaches old age, there's a bit of regret upon realizing they haven't seen enough of the world. Just right, I'll take you to broaden your horizons.
Hey, so this is what it's like inside Maiden House...
column3: เฮ้, ภายในตำหนักพิสุทธิ์เป็นแบบนี้นี่เอง...

column2: Alas, they are all vulgar, only the owner of this place is barely acceptable.
column3: เฮอะ พวกนี้ล้วนเป็นของชั้นต่ำ มีเพียงเจ้าของนั่นที่พอใช้ได้

column2: With such high standards, it's not easy to serve you here.
column3: ท่านมาตรฐานสูงเช่นนี้ คงยากนักจะทำให้ท่านพอใจ

column2: Hey, so this is what it's like inside Maiden House...
column3: เฮ้, ภายในตำหนักพิสุทธิ์เป็นแบบนี้นี่เอง...

column2: Alas, they are all vulgar, this Maiden House is not as good as its name.
column3: อนิจจาพวกเขาล้วนหยาบคาย ตำหนักพิสุทธิ์แห่งนี้ไม่ได้ดีเท่ากับชื่อของมัน

column2: With such high standards, it's not easy to serve you here.
column3: ท่านมาตรฐานสูงเช่นนี้ คงยากนักจะทำให้ท่านพอใจ

column2: Good disciple, you forced Tong Daofu of the Imperial City Division to fight you with Blood reversal, it shows that you are not only talented, but also diligent and hardworking, I am really proud of you!

The Wind and Cloud Arena in Daliang City is quite famous in the martial arts world, with numerous experts at the fourth tier of the Heaven, Earth, Mysterious and Yellow level. I wonder where my first disciple ranks in the hierarchy.
column3: ลานประลองวายุเมฆาแห่งเมืองต้าเหลียงนี้ได้รับการยกย่องเป็นอย่างยิ่งในยุทธภพ ด้วยลำดับชั้นการประลองถึง 4 ระดับ สวรรค์ โลก ลึกลับ เหลือง ไม่รู้ว่าศิษย์คนแรกของข้าจะไปได้ถึงขั้นไหนกันนะ

column2: Why not go and fight a match to find out, as the first disciple, if you can't become the first of the Heavenly Tier, it's a bit unreasonable.
Master, your disciple is now the top of the Heavenly Tier, aren't you going to praise me?
What's there to be proud of for defeating a bunch of small fry? \nIf you have the guts, go and win the Peak of Jianghu to make your master proud.
column3: มีอะไรน่าภาคภูมิใจในการเอาชนะแมลงตัวเล็กๆ ได้บ้าง?\nหากเจ้ามีความกล้า จงไปและพิชิตหนึ่งในใต้หล้าเพื่อทำให้อาจารย์ของเจ้าภูมิใจ

column2: Master, all the Coins on the disciple can't add up to 1 Guan, if this continues, I will have to sleep on the streets.
column3: อาจารย์ ศิษย์มีเงินติดตัวไม่ถึง 1 ตำลึงด้วยซ้ำ ถ้ายังเป็นอย่างงี้ต่อไป ข้าคงต้องนอนกลางถนนแล้ว

column2: You're really usless. When I was young, I wasn't as miserable as you.

Well, I'll take you to make some money, let's get through the current difficulties first. There is a <color=#c44b0e>Relic House</color> in the city, you go there and "borrow" a few Guan for emergency.
Disciple, I must earnestly warn you that making money here is not the right path. You must know when to stop and not get addicted. Don't forget your ambition.

What are you doing with so much money on you!\nWhat you need to do now is to improve your strength as soon as possible, otherwise no matter how much money you save, you can't keep it, don't you know the principle of "Innocent of Honorable, guilty of holding a jade"!
column3: เจ้าคิดจะยังไงทำเงินมากมายของเจ้า!\nสิ่งที่เจ้าต้องทำตอนนี้คือฝึกฝนวรยุทธของเจ้าในเร็วที่สุดไม่เช่นนั้น ไม่ว่าเจ้าจะมีเงินเท่าไหร่ก็รักษามันไว้ไม่ได้\nเจ้าไม่รู้หรือว่า! "สุจริตและเที่ยงธรรม ถือหยกมีความผิด"

column2: <color=#c44b0e>Chuxiang City's Dirty Street, Daliang City's Glittering Artifact Auction, and Zhongzhou's Night Auction Market</color> all hold auctions from time to time. You can use your money to find many good things, you should really go and take a look.
column3: <color=#c44b0e>ตรอกเล้าหมูเมืองฉู่เซียง, หอไข่มุกของเมืองต้าเหลียง และตลาดประมูลราตรีในจงโจว</color> ล้วนมีการประมูลเป็นครั้งคราว เจ้าสามารถใช้เงินหาของดีๆ มากมายได้ที่นั่น เจ้าควรจะลองไปดูมันสักครั้ง

column2: Feeling dizzy, weak in the limbs...
column3: ข้ารู้สึกวิงเวียน แขนขาอ่อนแรง...

column2: What you have is a symptom of excessive Stamina exhaustion, which not only greatly weakens your damage and Defense effects in battle, but may also induce sudden death!

column2: Master, what should I do now? I don't want to die young!

column2: You can recover your stamina by staying at the <color=#c44b0e>inn in the village</color>. If you don't have money, you can make do with a night on the <color=#c44b0e>straw mat in the broken house</color> in the village.
column3: เจ้าสามารถฟื้นฟูแรงกายได้ด้วยการพักผ่อนที่<color=#c44b0e>โรงเตี๊ยมในหมู่บ้าน</color> หากเจ้าไม่มีเงิน ก็สามารถค้างคืนบน<color=#c44b0e>เสื่อฟางในบ้านร้าง</color>ในหมู่บ้านได้

column2: With your current strength, you can venture into the <color=#c44b0e>Wild Wolf Valley</color> in the Xiangfan region. It's a good place to hone your skills and grow. Additionally, you can collect animal skins and meat to sell to merchants.
Although the <color=#c44b0e>Epiphyllum Valley</color> in the Wuyue region is dangerous, it's just the whetstone you need to sharpen your skills right now.

With your current strength, you should be able to handle the beasts in the <color=#c44b0e>Forest of Broken Souls</color> in Xiangfan. Don't always pick on the weak, fighting tough enemy is the fastest way to increase your EXP.

column3: "จอมยุทธน้อย{PlayerName}"

column2: "Today is the Mid-Autumn Festival, no matter where you are, whether you are homesick or reunited, we are grateful for your acquaintance in this world of martial arts."
"To express our gratitude, we specially offer you mooncakes from our studio for you to taste. Thank you again for your tolerance and support for 'Hero's Adventure'."

column2: You have chosen someone else, this general does not like fickle people, you better not come to this general to join in the fun.
Go away, this general is not in the mood to deal with you people from the rivers and lakes, don't be an eyesore in front of this general.

Your passion is commendable, young hero, but the training of the Ye Family Battalion is extremely harsh, and you can't keep up with your current physical condition. If you really want to join the army, come to me when you <color=#c44b0e>level up to 25></color>.

Every man has his duty in the rise and fall of the world, young hero, there is more than one way to serve the country if you are willing.\nYoung hero, you gather heroes from all walks of life, resist foreign enemies, punish the evil within, and it is more convenient to do things than to join the army.
I can't stand scoundrels like you the most!
I didn't expect you to be such a person, daring to slander Marshal Ye!
Marshal Ye is blind to let a scum like you join the Ye Family Battalion!
The thing I hate the most in my life is shameless villains like you!
I, {PlayerName}, am just an insignificant person in the martial arts world.
The show is about to start...
Kid, are you trying to lure my disciple into joining the Yan Yun Iron Army?
(What a great body technique, I didn't notice when he appeared behind me)
Old man, good birds choose trees to nest, and wise ministers choose masters to serve.\n{PlayerGivenName} brother, you are such a talent, it would be a pity if you can't use your martial arts.
Who says he can't use his martial arts? When his martial arts trainings are complete, he will drive you Yan dogs back to the Yan Kingdom, and he will be famous in history.
My disciple will never be a traitor. I will not let him rot as a traitor in history.
In that case, I should take action as soon as possible to avoid future troubles.
You can try.
Haha, I was just joking, why do you take it seriously?
In that case, I won't force you.\n{PlayerGivenName} brother, we will meet again.
Master, at least let me speak, why did you reject him directly for me?
Kid, I can't stand by and watch you be bewitched and become a sinner of the ages!\nIf you want to be a running dog for Yan Kingdom, wait until I die, out of sight, out of mind.
What I mean is, let me reject that guy in person, and then scold him a few more words, wouldn't it be more refreshing, and it can also completely cut off their thoughts of pulling me.
Well, that's the disciple I taught.

Lin'an City in Jiangnan...

column2: Jiujiang Fotress leader, Ding Fengbo accepts the order!
column3: หัวหน้าค่ายน้ำจิ่วเจียง ติงเฟิงป๋อรับคำสั่ง!

column2: The ten-day limit of the Jianghu Master token has arrived, I should return to the water camp.
Although the ten-day agreement has not arrived, but this time you let me run away, then our agreement is terminated.
Get out, how dare you come to see me!
Since {PlayerSurName} brother sincerely invites, I will accompany you!
Your team doesn't even have an extra space, how can I help you.
I am Han Hongyu, the current head of Tiger Escort. Now Tiger Escort is recruiting powerful escorts, I wonder if any friends in Jianghu are interested in trying?
Tiger Escort is no longer as prestigious as it used to be!
How come the head of the escort is a woman?
I heard that the former head of the escort is still missing...
Is there a future in this?
Nobody with a sane mind will work for them...
How much can you earn as an escort...
Recruiting escorts...
No one responded after shouting for a long time...
It's not proper for a woman to be in charge!
Let's just wait and see her make a fool of herself.
The mighty Tiger Escort has fallen to this...
Who would dare to marry such a tomboy in the future?
Only a fool would be willing to do this life-threatening job here!
I didn't expect that no one is interested in the position of Tiger Escort's escort, in that case...
I am {PlayerName}, willing to apply for the position of Tiger Escort's escort, what are the requirements?
It's Young Hero {PlayerSurName}!\nI remember the favor you did for me in the past, I didn't expect Young Hero {PlayerSurName} would be willing to support Tiger Escort.
The most important thing about being an escort is to have excellent skills, so that you can ensure the safety of the goods and companions to the greatest extent in case of emergencies.
I need to test your martial arts skills first, please follow me, Young Hero {PlayerSurName}.
Disperse, disperse, there's no more excitement to watch!
Can this pretty boy do it?
There really is a fool willing to be an escort.
That kid is no escort material.
Tiger Escort is done for...
Young Hero {PlayerSurName}, I have specially arranged a few escorts for you, let me see your true skills. If you can beat these escorts, you can officially join Tiger Escort.
Young Hero, you can come to find Hongyu later when you are confident enough to take on the challenge.
Young Hero {PlayerSurName}, are you ready to accept the challenge of these escorts?
Congratulations, young hero {PlayerSurName}, on joining Tiger Escort. From today, you are one of the five main escorts of Tiger Escort.
This is not a place for conversation, please follow me, Escort {PlayerSurName}, to the escort bureau for a detailed discussion.
So it's young hero {PlayerSurName}!\nSince young hero {PlayerSurName} is willing to join Tiger Escort, Han Yu is more than happy. From today, you are one of the five main escorts of Tiger Escort.
This is not a place for conversation, please follow me, Escort {PlayerSurName}, to the escort bureau for a detailed discussion.
Elite Escort, those people outside the door just now had quite a few criticisms of Tiger Escort, and it seems that the Elite Escort also has some unspeakable difficulties. What's going on?
column3: หัวหน้าสำนักคุ้มภัย ผู้คนที่อยู่นอกประตูตอนนี้กำลังวิพากษ์วิจารณ์สำนักคุ้มภัยพยัคฆา ดูเหมือนว่าหัวหน้าสำนักคุ้มภัยก็มีปัญหาบางอย่างที่ไม่สามารถบรรยายได้ มันเกิดอะไรขึ้นกัน?

column2: Escort {PlayerSurName}, you are one of us, Hongyu can't hide it, this is a long story...

This Tiger Escort was founded by my father and was once the leader of the four major escort bureaus. My father had a high reputation, and both the rivers and lakes and the local government gave him some face, so there has never been any mistake in the escorts protected by Tiger Escort.

Until a few years ago, my father received a special business, requiring him to escort a person to the north, and he had to lead the team himself. It was this business that caused my father to disappear without a trace, and we have no news of him.
This matter is quite strange, I still don't know who commissioned it, who is being protected, and where to go.

My father has been away for a long time, rumors are flying around the escort bureau, and people's hearts are scattered. Soon, most of them left, leaving only some old brothers who my father trusted very much to guard this sign with Hongyu.
Hongyu can't let Tiger Escort be ruined in my hands, I want to make Tiger Escort regain its former glory, I want to wait here for the day my father returns.
The recruitment of escorts today is a helpless move. Although the remaining escorts in the bureau are loyal, they are weak and unable to cope with slightly risky escorts.

Now that Tiger Escort has the help of Escort {PlayerSurName}, it is truly like a tiger with wings added. From now on, the escort bureau will rely on you for the <color=#c44b0e>escort business</color>.
Escort {PlayerSurName}, this is your first time escorting, there are some precautions I need to explain to you.

<color=#c44b0e>You can choose the value of the goods to be escorted here, the higher the value, the higher the risk, and the greater the return. However, if you fail, it will damage the reputation of the escort bureau, so you must be cautious.</color>
After selecting the goods, you can find <color=#c44b0e>Tripper</color> in the courtyard next door to start the escort mission, or you can deliver the goods by Horse cart or other means.
Delivering the goods to the designated recipient is considered a successful escort. The escort bureau can gain reputation, and you can also get a dividend based on the value of this order.
You seem to care a lot about the reputation of Tiger Escort?
Of course, if we want to revive Tiger Escort and make the escort bureau recognized as one of the four major escort bureaus again, we need to have at least 1500 reputation.
So how is the reputation of the escort bureau now?
Zero...
My father also started from scratch back then, and now the skinny camel is bigger than the horse, I will definitely make Tiger Escort return to the ranks of the four major escort bureaus!
{PlayerSurName} still has goods that have not been delivered, please deliver them before accepting new goods.
Tiger Escort's reputation is currently <color=#c44b0e>{TagNum:虎威镖局声望}</color>.\nWhich escort mission are you planning to choose now?
column3: ปัจจุบันชื่อเสียงของ สำนักคุ้มภัยพยัคฆา คือ <color=#c44b0e>{TagNum:虎威镖局声望}</color>\nตอนนี้เจ้าวางแผนที่จะเลือกภารกิจคุ้มกันแบบไหน?

column2: Here are your goods, please check and accept them.
Hmm, the goods are intact. Tiger Escort is indeed a reputable brand, trustworthy.
Hmm, Tiger Escort did a good job on this escort mission. I look forward to the day you rise again.
It's a pity that Tiger Escort has fallen to delivering these ordinary goods. How unpredictable life is.
Thank you for your hard work. I will continue to do business with Tiger Escort next time.
Tiger Escort, as the former leader of the four major escort agencies, still works meticulously without any mistakes.
Although Tiger Escort did a good job on this order, I don't think you have the possibility of making a comeback.
The goods are complete and undamaged. The current Tiger Escort is really impressive.
I didn't expect Tiger Escort to deliver this order that other escort agencies dare not accept. It's really amazing.
Tiger Escort didn't disappoint the old customers. I will still entrust my goods to you in the future.
It seems that the recipient of this escort is not here. I'll leave the goods here for him to pick up. Anyway, the goods have been delivered intact.
Kid, this mountain is mine, this tree is mine. If you want to pass, leave some money!
The goods were robbed by bandits. Now there's no way to explain to the customer, the reputation of the escort agency will be damaged.
You are smuggling contraband and violating the law. All goods are confiscated. If you don't want to go to jail, get out of here.
What kind of world is this? The soldiers openly rob property, just like bandits.
Do you Tiger Escort still want to become one of the four major escort agencies one day? Today I will smash your goods, and see who will hire you for escort in the future!

Deliberately targeting Tiger Escort, smashing goods, damaging the reputation of the escort agency, this is not something ordinary bandits do. It must be a competitor trying to trip us up, it's too much!
The atmosphere seems a bit wrong. Should I step forward to help Han Hongyu?
You all, as the heads of the escort agencies, ignore the friendship with my father. Not only do you not help, but you also take the chance to force me to transfer Tiger Escort!
Master Han, you are wrong. We are doing this for your own good, not wanting the old escort master to have no descendants.
Now that Tiger Escort has regained some reputation, it's better to make plans early, retreat bravely, and you can also sell it for a good price.
We have seen a lot of flash in the pan. If you don't think about yourself, you should also think about the livelihood of your subordinates.
{yell}'s father will come back, Tiger Escort will not be transferred, no need to waste your breath!
Master Han, how about a gamble between you and me?
What to bet on, how to bet?
You pick 2 good hands from your subordinates to compete with our three people, the stake is your Tiger Escort...
No need to say, I won't bet with you.
Also, the news about your father now.
If you win, I'll tell you about your father; if you lose, Tiger Escort will be ours, and you will run away from Tiger Escort!
{yell}I'll bet with you! I won't lose!
Alright, we'll wait for you at the training field of your escort agency.
Did you hear all that?
Yes.
Can you help me participate in this bet?
Since I am the head of Tiger Escort...
Well, the other side is well prepared for this competition, to be honest, I'm not sure either. But as long as there's a chance to know about my father, I'm willing to take any risk.
Today's battle is unpredictable, thank you for helping the escort agency to this extent. I will give you my family's treasured sword as a token of our friendship.
Now, the matters of Tiger Escort have nothing to do with you, please leave.
Father, I will fight to the death today!
Sigh, please take care, Miss Han...
I knew you wouldn't disappoint me. Let's go and see the bet set up by those guys, let them know that the power of Tiger Escort is as strong as ever!
Let me see what you three can do against me!
Where did Xiao Ya find such help?
Years of planning gone in an instant!
Unexpectedly, there are experts around Han, the head of the escort agency. This is really beyond our expectation.
You lost, tell me about my father now!
Alright, I'll keep my promise.
You all saw it, we can't take over Tiger Escort. Do you two still want to persist?
I have nothing to say if I'm not as skilled, I'll take my leave.
column3: ข้าไม่มีอะไรจะพูด ถ้าข้าไม่เก่ง ข้าจะลาออก

column2: I don't believe this kid can protect you forever!

Your father was actually commissioned by the court to escort the current emperor to Yan Kingdom. Because this matter is not very honorable, very few people know about it. Only your father and a few palace guards accompanied him.

Later, I heard that the emperor was detained by the Yan army, and the whereabouts of the other escorts are unknown. If you want to know where your father is now, I'm afraid you have to ask the emperor in person.
Do you know where the emperor is now?
In the Yan army camp, but the exact location is not something we people in the martial arts world can find out.

I advise you, now that Tiger Escort's reputation is growing, and you have a young expert to help you, don't seek your own death. The power of Yan Kingdom is not something ordinary people like us can resist.
No need to worry, I know my limits.
I've said all I can, I'll take my leave.
column3: ข้าพูดไปหมดแล้ว ข้าจะลาออก

column2: It seems that the most urgent task is to find the emperor who is detained by Yan Kingdom, so that I can find out the real whereabouts of my father.
Actually... you shouldn't hold any hope, this emperor is already dead.
What did you say? How do you know?!
column3: เจ้าพูดว่าไงนะ? เจ้ารู้ได้อย่างไร?

column2: Because, I saw it with my own eyes.
It's over... all the clues are gone.
{PlayerName}, leave me, I want to be alone for a while.
Your business is my business, I will do my best to help you find your father.
This is my personal matter, and it seems that this path will be extremely dangerous. Don't you regret it?
Whether it's bloody rain or a sea of fire, I've already embarked on this path of no return in the martial arts world, and I'm not afraid of any danger.
This is the treasured sword passed down by my father, and I give it to you today. This is one of the few things I can give you in return.
column3: นี่คือดาบล้ำค่าที่พ่อของข้าส่งต่อ และข้าจะมอบมันให้กับท่านในวันนี้ นี่เป็นหนึ่งในไม่กี่สิ่งที่ข้าสามารถตอบแทนท่านได้

column2: {PlayerGivenName}, thank you so much.
Isn't this the same guard from Xiao Ya's team before? What are you doing here?
I'm here to find the head of Tiger Escort, Han Hongyu.
You don't need to look for Xiao Ya anymore, she's already dead.
What happened, how did she die?

The gambling fight that day was a losing situation from the start. In the end, she faced the three of us alone and refused to admit defeat until her death. Although she severely injured the other two heads, she still couldn't escape death from exhaustion.
I see you have some skills, how about working under me in the future?
Let me think about it...
Father, I have avenged you.
Now that my great revenge has been avenged, I don't know where to go from here...
You still have the foundation passed down by your father, now the future of Tiger Escort is all on your shoulders.
Just me alone...

column2: I've said it before, your business is my {PlayerName} business, how could I let you face the future alone.
{PlayerGivenName}, thank you...
column3: {PlayerGivenName}, ขอบคุณ...

column2: When my father was alive, he once joked with Hongyu that her dowry was in the Secret chamber of Tiger Escort, and the entrance to the Secret chamber was in Hongyu's Bedroom...
You told Han Hongyu about Xiao Yuanba's death.
Father, {PlayerName} has helped your daughter avenge you, you can rest in peace now.
Great kindness, Hongyu will never forget!
Miss Han, please get up, you're being too polite.
Now that my great revenge has been avenged, I don't know where to go from here...
You still have the foundation passed down by your father, now the future of Tiger Escort is all on your shoulders.
Just me alone...

column2: I've said it before, your business is my {PlayerName} business, how could I let you face the future alone.

column2: When my father was alive, he once joked with Hongyu that her dowry was in the Secret chamber of Tiger Escort, and the entrance to the Secret chamber was in Hongyu's Bedroom...
Unless I get definite news from my father, I won't stop defending the escort bureau for my father's return.
Our relations end here, I don't want to have anything to do with you!
Hongyu will spread the Fame of Tiger Escort to every corner of the world in her lifetime.
Even if it's a sea of swords and flames, Hongyu will take the enemy's head to avenge her father!
Even if I have to travel thousands of miles, Hongyu will find her father's whereabouts!
Your team has no vacancies, I can't join.
I didn't expect there to be a shrine here, why don't we make a wish here?
Okay--
Let me find the Wedding Stone first...
Pray for the escort agency to flourish under Hongyu.
To comfort my father's spirit in heaven...
Pray for Hongyu to find her father's killer soon.
Blood for blood, to comfort my father's spirit in heaven.
Pray for Hongyu to get news of her father soon.
Even if it's thousands of miles, I will bring my father back.
I hope the gods here can make it come true...
{PlayerGivenName}, let's go.
This is a bit awkward...
There's a Machinery here, let's try my father's method to see if it works...
Sure enough, this is the Secret chamber of Tiger Escort.
There's actually a blade...
The blade in the water seems to be the Hatori Hyoe. It seems he fell here from Cloud Shrouded Cliff. He should be dead from such a high fall.
column3: ดาบที่อยู่ในน้ำน่าจะเป็นของฮาโตริ เฮียวเอะ ดูเหมือนเขาจะตกลงมาที่นี่จากผาทะเลเมฆ เขาน่าจะตายจากการตกที่สูงขนาดนี้

column2: Do you want to pick up the blade in the water?
Thank you for the gift, Village Head.
column3: ขอบคุณสำหรับสิ่งของ ท่านหัวหน้าหมู่บ้าน

column2: What a young hero...
Received a pigeon letter...
column3: ได้รับจดหมายจากนกพิราบ...

column2: "Old man has an urgent matter to entrust to the young hero, please return to <color=#c44b0e>Nameless village</color> quickly"
column3: “ท่านผู้เฒ่ามีเรื่องเร่งด่วนที่จะเจอจอมยุทธน้อย โปรดกลับไปยัง <color=#c44b0e>หมู่บ้านไร้นาม</color> อย่างเร็ว”

column2: Something seems to have happened, I need to hurry back to Nameless village.

column2: You're a man of your word, I'm willing to be your brother.\nIf you ever need my help in the future, I will not hesitate.
I didn't expect you to be a disciple of Shifa Temple, you are my junior!
Hahaha, I have you as a junior, this life is worth it!\nIn the future, if there is a place where you need my help, I will do it for you no matter what!
Well, if you want to see a beauty, don't be stingy with money.\nThe location of Epiphyllum Valley is...

I heard that this <color=#097a76>Jiujiang Fotress</color> is recently expanding its manpower, regardless of background and character, as long as you can pass the test, you can join. Are you interested in trying?
Recently, for some reason, more and more people in Lin'an City are getting sick, vomiting and diarrhea, body pain and fatigue, and there is no cure for the time being, which makes people panic.
If the cause of the disease is not found, Lin'an City will soon become a ghost town.
So many people have the same strange disease at the same time, and there is no cure...
I should go to the doctor in the city to understand the situation, maybe I can find some clues to solve the problem.
I came here for the strange disease in the city, can you please tell me more about the situation of this strange disease?

It's strange to say that hundreds of people in the city are sick at the same time, and the symptoms are basically the same. At first, I thought it was a cold, but there are also symptoms of diarrhea and shortness of breath, which is puzzling.
I have asked each patient in detail about their onset of illness, hoping to find a commonality and trace the source of the disease...
Have you found anything, sir?
column3: เจออะไรบ้างไหมขอรับ?

column2: It's the water source. These patients have almost all fetched water from the well near Pier in the past few days. This is their only common experience.
Could there be a problem with the water in the well?
What's strange is that I have specifically fetched some well water for observation and found nothing unusual. I didn't get sick after drinking it either.
However, some patients have mentioned that the <color=#c44b0e>well water fetched at night is sweeter than that during the day</color>. I don't know what the difference is.
It seems I need to go to the well and take a look.
This seems to be the well that the doctor mentioned...
I didn't find anything unusual.
column3: ข้ายังไม่พบสิ่งใดผิดปกติ

column2: Could the patients' statement that "<color=#c44b0e>the well water fetched at night is sweeter than that during the day</color>" be the key to the difference in water quality? It seems I should come back at night.
Congratulations {PlayerName}, you are the world's number one...
Wait a minute!!!
Is it you?! I didn't expect you to escape. Are you here to make trouble today?
Since it's a contest for the world's number one, why didn't anyone notify me to participate?\nDo you want to close the door and secretly elect a world's number one? I'm the first one to disagree!
What do you want?
It's simple, let this little guy compete with me. If he can make me admit defeat, then I'll go my own way, and he can be the number one in the world.
{PlayerName} my friend, what do you think?
Obedience is better than politeness.
column3: การทำตามคำสั่งคือการแสดงความเคารพ

column2: {PlayerName} my friend, this person has already mastered his martial arts, don't be careless!
Thank you for the reminder, senior.
{yell} Little guy, take my iron fist!
What a powerful fist!
column3: ช่างเป็นหมัดที่ทรงพลังจริงๆ!

column2: Look at my Finishing Strike that has gathered twenty years of power!
It seems that it's true that the new generation surpasses the old one after thirty years.
Little guy, the title of the world's number one is yours now!
Are you guys serious?
Whoever is not convinced, come down and experience it.
Alright, congratulations to {PlayerName} young friend, now you are truly the "Peak of Jianghu"!
column3: ขอแสดงความยินดีกับสหายหนุ่ม {PlayerName} ตอนนี้เจ้าคือ "หนึ่งในใต้หล้า" อย่างแท้จริงแล้ว!

column2: It seems that he has been to the Forest Tower to pick Fungus, fished by the Pond, and also searched for bird nests in the trees...
I'll try my best to help you find it...
Yes, yes, the scent of sandalwood is too familiar, this is the one I lost.
Then let's return it to its rightful owner.

Since you've helped me so much, I have to thank you properly.\nI'll share some of my Sect contribution with you, from now on you're my junior brother, with me covering for you, I guarantee you won't be taken advantage of in the temple!
What do you need help with, little master?
I lost a string of prayer beads. Can you help me find it?
Where have you been recently, little master?
It seems that he has been to the Forest Tower to pick Fungus, fished by the Pond, and also searched for bird nests in the trees...
I'll try my best to help you find it...
Yes, yes, the scent of Sandalwood is too familiar. This is the one I lost.
Then let's return it to its rightful owner.
Amitabha, thank you, benefactor.\nI have nothing to repay you with. I just found a chicken egg this morning and have nowhere to put it, so I'll give it to you.
column3: อามิตาพุทธ, ขอบคุณ, ผู้มีพระคุณ.\nอาตมาไม่มีอะไรจะตอบแทนท่าน อาตมาเพิ่งพบไข่ไก่เมื่อเช้านี้และไม่มีที่ที่จะเก็บมัน ดังนั้นอาตมาจะมอบให้ท่าน

column2: The prayer beads are something I've had since I was a child. They might have been left to me by my parents. They mean a lot to me.
You are the latest to join, and your cultivation is not enough. You don't have the skills to compete with your senior brothers yet. Come back to me when your strength has improved.
During this time, you can go to your second senior brother, <color=#c44b0e>Shi Yu</color>, to practice and improve your martial arts skills.
column3: ในช่วงเวลานี้ เจ้าสามารถไปหา <color=#c44b0e>ซื่อหยู</color> ศิษย์พี่รองของเจ้า เพื่อฝึกฝนและพัฒนาทักษะวิทยายุทธของเจ้า

column2: It's not time to reopen the small competition yet, please be patient.
The small competition is reopening, are you ready to participate now?
The Shifa Temple is full of hidden talents. Your senior brothers are not to be underestimated. Are you ready for the small competition?
So you're {PlayerName}, I've heard of you.\nThe Grand Marshal is eager for talents. If you join the Yan army, the Marshal will surely value you.
Where did this nobody come from, daring to meet our Marshal? Get lost!
I am the daughter of the head of the Tiger Escort, Han. Please tell me where my father is.
You, you are the daughter of Han, the head of the escort?
Yes, I beg you to tell me where my father is.

Alas, we were ambushed by the Yan army back then. Han, the head of the escort, sacrificed himself to protect me. In the end, he was outnumbered and was killed on the spot by the Yan general, <color=#c44b0e>Xiao Yuanba</color>...
What... what did you say?
column3: อะไร... ท่านว่าอะไรนะ?

column2: Han, the head of the escort, was brave and loyal. It's a pity that he died young. The country has lost a great talent...
Xiao Yuanba... I will make you pay!!!

The most urgent task is to save me and escape from here. As long as we can escape, I will greatly reward the Han family, even making Han, the head of the escort, a great general is not out of the question.
Miss Han, I will remember the revenge for your father. Now is not the time for revenge, we need to escape from here as soon as possible.
It's not time to reopen the small competition yet, please be patient.
The small competition has reopened...
It's that simple.
I, the master, have calculated countless people and things, but I can't figure out your mind...
{PlayerName}, from now on you are no longer a part of my Confucius Temple. I will not blame you for the past, and I hope you can keep today's events a secret.
You're back so soon, have you already found out something from the Longevity Tomb?
(For some reason, the unease in my heart is getting stronger. Should I tell Cai Yuanchang the truth...)
I haven't found any news yet.
This is not like your usual style. Don't make me wait too long, go and do your job quickly.

Master Cai, if I were to spread the word about how you've turned yourself into something neither human nor ghost in your pursuit of longevity, do you think this Confucius Temple would still have any standing in the martial world?
I, as the master of this temple, have treated you well. Are you going to be a chance taker?
Treated me well? Hmph, we both know the truth. You can drop the pretense.
As long as you swear not to reveal what happened today, I, as the master of this temple, will give you the treasure of the temple and will not pursue today's matter in the future.
Since you're so sincere, then I, {PlayerName}, swear that I will not let a third person know about today's matter. If I break this oath, I will have no place to be buried when I die!
I will trust you this time, take the item and run away from Dacheng Hall now!
{yell}{PlayerName}, what are you doing!!!
Sorry, Master Cai, I've taken your cultivation. I won't talk about today's matter, but please be careful with your words and deeds in the future.
{yell}{PlayerName}, you're despicable!!!

Master Cai, if I were to spread the word about how you've turned yourself into something neither human nor ghost in your pursuit of longevity, do you think this Confucius Temple would still have any standing in the martial world?
I, as the master of this temple, have treated you well. Are you going to be a chance taker?
Treated me well? Hmph, we both know the truth. You can drop the pretense.
As long as you swear not to reveal what happened today, I, as the master of this temple, will give you the treasure of the temple and will not pursue today's matter in the future.
Since you're so sincere, then I, {PlayerName}, swear that I will not let anyone else know about today's matter. If I break this oath, I will have no place to be buried when I die!
I will trust you this time, take the item.
This Confucius Temple, this master, there's no need for a waste like me to exist here anymore.
I don't want to work for a madman who has lost his bottom line, I'm leaving.
Master Cai, your words and deeds today are no longer worthy of my following, I bid you farewell.
A father for a day, a father for life. Sigh...
Can't good food, good wine, and beautiful women attract you? Why do you have to focus on me?
What do you want to talk about with the master?
You've never heard of Miss Qincheng, the famous courtesan?
But it's not surprising, Miss Qincheng is so famous that she rarely shows up in a year, and spends the rest of her time in seclusion.

Miss Qincheng has close relations with a power called Melody House. Many top performers in various places come from Melody House. They are known for their exceptional beauty and talent, but they keep their bodies clean and sell their skills, not their bodies.

Practicing music scores such as piano, flute, and lute can improve your musical skills. Although the instruments used are different, they all lead to the same goal. I have beginner-level music scores available for purchase here and at the Tower of Prosperity in Daliang.

column2: If you want to further improve your musical skills, besides getting exquisite music scores by chance, you can only look for Melody House. It is said that they have collected all the strange and wonderful music scores in the world, and it is said that "all the wonderful sounds in the world come from Melody House".
I'm just a woman of the dust, it's better not to mention the past, so as not to offend your refined taste.
Would you like to hear a story from me?
Please speak, Master, I'm all ears.

There was a young lady from a noble family, who was proficient in the Four Arts since childhood. She should have met a good man and spent her life with him. However, her family suffered a disaster, and overnight, this lady became a lowly servant and was sent to the Ministry of Rites.

The court wanted to negotiate peace with the Yan Kingdom, and selected several beautiful singers from the Ministry of Rites. This lady was among the chosen ones, prepared to be sent to the Yan Kingdom as a gesture of sincerity.
What awaits these girls will be a place more cruel and torturous than the Ministry of Rites. It's not an exaggeration to say that it's a place of certain death.

Unexpectedly, they encountered a woman of Peerless Elegance on the way, who rescued all the singers being escorted. Most of the singers chose to follow this woman and leave their homeland, but the unfortunate lady insisted on returning to her hometown to find her lost relatives.
When this lady was searching in Lin'an City, she was discovered by the city patrol to be a lowly servant and was about to be severely punished...
Then, those officials suddenly became very respectful overnight. Not only did they stop making things difficult for this lady, but they also arranged a place for her to settle down...
Thank you, young master, for taking the time to listen to my boring old story.
Flowers bloom and fall in their own time, always relying on the Lord of the East.
Whether to go or to stay, how can one decide!
If I could have flowers in my hair, don't ask where I'm going.
Master, I'm sorry to have kept you waiting. I'm here for our appointment.
You are indeed a man of your word, young master.
Master, why have you invited me here tonight? Is there something you need?
I have a huge problem and I need {PlayerSurName} young master's help.
There's no need for such formalities, please get up, Master.
I beg {PlayerSurName} young master to help me escape from my lowly status and recover my noble identity.
How can I help you escape from your lowly status?
The Prefect controls the population and household registration of the whole city. This matter requires you to go to the Government Office and find the Prefect.

To be honest, this person was arranged by Prince Duke Kang to enter Maiden House, without his permission, no one can remove her lowly status.

I won't make it difficult for you, just help me find the Seal of Heaven or the Seal of the Nation, and I will let her go and restore her good family status.

Don't hit me, I'll go on guard right away!

I've seen you, you're {PlayerName} who just joined, right?
Don't laugh at me, we brothers just play a few rounds of dice here during our breaks.

It seems you're an expert, then I won't bother.

Brother, you're really lucky!\nI'm out of Coin now, let's play again when I've gathered some money.
I haven't gathered the money yet, brother, wait a few more days.
I've finally gathered some money, this time I must win it all back!
Brother, you're too lucky, all our money has gone into your pocket, please spare us.
I have a bad feeling about this...

Listen up, people of Jiujiang Fotress: You have no respect for the law, repeatedly plundering ships and injuring countless people. I, the general, am ordered to suppress you. If you don't surrender, when will you?
(They've actually blocked the entrance to the water camp, are they trying to prevent us from running away?)
Chief, we're in trouble, the government troops are here to suppress our Jiujiang Fotress!
It seems someone wants to test the strength of our water camp.
Follow me out to meet these fearless guys, let them witness the power of the chief.
You shrimp soldiers and crab generals dare to attack Jiujiang Fotress, it seems you've never heard of my notorious reputation.
Ding Fengbo, you're just a small loach in front of thousands of soldiers and horses, stop bluffing.
Today, you will see who is the loach in the mud and who is the dragon above the river!
This is not quite what I expected.
The bandit leader is weak, it's time to wipe out the water camp!
With me here, who dares to cross the line!
Go back and tell your master, Jiujiang Fotress is not a soft persimmon, if you insist on going your own way, I will accompany you to the end!
Yes, yes...
I have to admit I'm getting old, the world really belongs to the young.
Go back and tell your master, Jiujiang Fotress is not a soft persimmon, if you insist on going your own way, I will accompany you to the end!
Yes, yes...
Did you see my sword technique in the last fight?
The chief's Devouring Blade is extremely domineering and unparalleled, I have benefited a lot.

You shrimp soldiers and crab generals dare to attack Jiujiang Fotress, it seems ignorance is truly fearless.
You're just a small loach in front of thousands of soldiers and horses, stop bluffing.

I seem to have gained some insight from the last fight...
Kid, you single-handedly defeated the government troops who tried to wipe out the water camp, impressive, really impressive!
No wonder my precious sword has been humming non-stop, it seems it has found its new owner. Well, a precious sword should be given to a hero, and a beauty to a good man, today it belongs to you!
Doing this kind of business too much will harm your virtue, and only those who are rich and unkind are our targets, so there's nothing to do today, go and rest.

There's a wealthy man from the local village passing by on the waterway, it's said that the bodyguards he hired are weak and easy to defeat. Interested brothers might be able to make a small fortune if they hurry.

Leave your gold and valuables, and we'll let you run away; otherwise, we'll send you for a swim in the river.

Alas, looking down on people, I can only send you to the river.

There's a greedy and lustful general passing by on the waterway, it's said that he only has a few personal guards with him. Letting such a person pass freely in front of our Jiujiang Fotress is simply a disgrace.
The government official is here, you little bandits better back off!
What kind of bullshit official, I'm here today specifically to teach you a lesson.
Chop him up and feed him to the fish, don't delay my journey.

Beating such people is absolutely guilt-free.

Who dares to intercept the official ship of the Imperial City Bureau!

You lowly commoners not only intercept official ships, but also spy on the Imperial City Bureau! I want to see how bold you are to do these beheading things.
Since you don't seize the opportunity given to you, don't speak again.
The people of the Imperial City Bureau are indeed a bit powerful, no wonder they are so arrogant.

In the future, every time you complete the task given by the master, you will get a certain degree of <color=#c44b0e>Sect contribution</color>, which can be exchanged for many good things from the master. Now that you have the ability to defeat the red-haired pig, it seems that I should arrange some challenging tasks for you.

As the eldest disciple of this sect, you are the face of the sect. The most urgent task for you is to improve your Fame. My disciple can not be a nameless nobody.
I also want to be famous all over the world and known to everyone, but Fame is not so easy to improve, isn't it accumulated over a long period of time?
If it really takes you ten or twenty years to make a name for yourself, don't say you are my disciple by then, I will be so ashamed.
The fastest ways to increase Fame include: <color=#c44b0e>dueling</color> with people in the martial arts world, and you can gain considerable Fame by defeating them for the first time.
If you have the ability to <color=#c44b0e>eliminate or subdue</color> some martial arts forces, you can gain a lot of Fame.
In addition, actively participating in some martial arts events can also earn you a good amount of Fame.
Disciple understands, I will go and bring honor to our sect!
The trouble caused by Nine Factions Sect in Chuxiang City has been resolved.
The crisis in Daliang City has been lifted, Nine Factions Sect will not make a comeback for the time being.
Fortunately, we arrived in time, so they couldn't cause more chaos in Lin'an City.
Nine Factions Sect instigates various sects to be hostile to each other, kidnaps merchants to occupy their shops, and poisons the city, causing epidemics. What are they trying to do?
Create chaos, distract the attention of various sects, and provide more development opportunities for Nine Factions Sect. It seems that Nine Factions Sect is going to make a big move.
Those things can finally come in handy.
Disciple, the things are below, take them out.

A moment later...
Finally dug it out.
Disciple, these things are yours now.
Before leaving, the master will teach you a unique skill of our sect. This skill does not come with a scoll and is passed down orally. You must remember it in your heart.
The hand rises like an arrow and falls like thunder, a thousand mountains have passed and the birds have flown away!
One shichen later...

column2: Master, it's rare to see you so generous after knowing you for so long.
